prerequisites.zh: 准备未认证、普通用户和管理员三类合成主体，并为同一只读管理 canary 记录正常授权基线。
prerequisites.en: Prepare unauthenticated, regular-user, and administrator synthetic principals and record the normal authorization baseline for one read-only administration canary.

prerequisites.zh: 固定路径、方法、Cookie 与代理链，只改变 Referer 或 Origin，并记录边缘与应用最终看到的 Header 和主体。
prerequisites.en: Fix path, method, cookie, and proxy chain while changing only Referer or Origin, recording headers and principal as seen by the edge and application.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求无权限主体仅因伪造为环回/可信来源的 Header 而读取管理 canary，服务端授权日志显示该 Header 是决定因素。Header 被接收、风险分数变化、返回登录页/缓存模板、CORS 允许公开响应、原主体本有权限或状态码改变但对象未返回都属于假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires an unauthorized principal to read the administration canary solely because a header is forged as loopback or trusted, with server authorization logs showing that header as decisive. Header acceptance, risk-score changes, a login or cached template, CORS access to public content, a principal already authorized, or status change without the object is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 一个无敏感字段的 canary 首次因来源 Header 被放行后停止，不访问写接口或真实管理数据。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one canary without sensitive fields is first allowed by a source header; do not access write endpoints or real administration data.

opsecTips.zh: 删除合成主体和 canary，清除代理/授权调试日志与缓存，并恢复基于会话和对象的服务端授权。
opsecTips.en: Delete synthetic principals and the canary, clear proxy and authorization debug logs and caches, and restore session- and object-based server authorization.

name.zh: Referer/Origin 信任绕过

description.zh: 验证服务端是否把可伪造的 Referer 或 Origin 当作访问管理资源的授权依据。
description.en: Tests whether a server treats forgeable Referer or Origin headers as authorization for administrative resources.

overview.zh: 该集合以本地、内网和可信名称构造 Referer/Origin，目标是比较代理与应用对来源头的解释。本条按HTTP 授权与路由边界审查；应在隔离资源上逐项执行，固定身份、路径、方法和除当前变量外的所有请求条件。
overview.en: The set supplies loopback, internal, and trusted names in Referer and Origin to compare proxy and application interpretation. This entry is reviewed as a HTTP authorization and routing boundary; Execute one item at a time against an isolated resource while fixing identity, path, method, and every request condition except the tested variable.

vulnerability.zh: 若敏感路由仅依据这些客户端可控头判断“内部请求”，外部用户即可伪造来源并获得额外权限。确认标准是通过服务端主体、授权决策和资源内容确认伪造头是否真正改变权限；状态码变化、CSRF 拒绝页面或公开资源响应不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If a sensitive route identifies internal requests solely from these client-controlled headers, an external user can forge the source and gain privileges. Confirmation requires Confirm from server principal, authorization decision, and resource content whether the forged header changes privileges; Status-code changes, CSRF denial pages, or public-resource responses is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 使用低权限账号分别记录无来源头与正常外部来源头访问管理路径的拒绝结果；2. 逐项提交原始 Referer/Origin 行，每次只改变一个头并保持身份、方法和路径不变；3. 通过服务端主体、授权决策和资源内容确认伪造头是否真正改变权限。状态码变化、CSRF 拒绝页面或公开资源响应应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record denied access to the administrative path for a low-privilege account with no source header and with a normal external source. 2. Submit original Referer or Origin lines one at a time while keeping identity, method, and path unchanged. 3. Confirm from server principal, authorization decision, and resource content whether the forged header changes privileges. Treat Status-code changes, CSRF denial pages, or public-resource responses as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 所有敏感资源基于经过认证的主体和服务端权限表授权；2. 仅在受信代理清洗并重建后使用来源相关头做辅助判断；3. 为缺失、伪造和多值 Origin/Referer 建立负向测试与日志。
mitigation.en: 1. Authorize sensitive resources from authenticated principals and server-side policy. 2. Use source-related headers only after a trusted proxy strips and rebuilds them. 3. Add negative tests and logging for missing, forged, and multi-valued Origin or Referer.

title.zh: 建立来源头授权边界基线
title.en: Establish the Source-Header Authorization Boundary baseline

description.zh: 使用低权限账号分别记录无来源头与正常外部来源头访问管理路径的拒绝结果，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Record denied access to the administrative path for a low-privilege account with no source header and with a normal external source, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行来源头授权边界变体
title.en: Execute the Source-Header Authorization Boundary variants

description.zh: 逐项提交原始 Referer/Origin 行，每次只改变一个头并保持身份、方法和路径不变，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Submit original Referer or Origin lines one at a time while keeping identity, method, and path unchanged, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

attackChain.payload:
Referer: http://127.0.0.1/admin
Referer: http://localhost/admin
Referer: http://0.0.0.0/admin
Referer: http://[::1]/admin
Referer: http://internal/admin
Referer: http://admin/admin
Referer: http://backend/admin
Referer: http://management/admin
Referer: http://test/admin
Referer: http://staging/admin
Referer: http://dev/admin
Referer: http://development/admin
Referer: http://debug/admin
Referer: http://api/admin
Referer: http://app/admin
Referer: http://web/admin
Referer: http://server/admin
Referer: http://node/admin
Referer: http://service/admin
Referer: http://proxy/admin
Referer: http://gateway/admin
Referer: http://loadbalancer/admin
Referer: http://lb/admin
Referer: http://cdn/admin
Referer: http://cache/admin
Referer: http://db/admin
Referer: http://database/admin
Referer: http://mysql/admin

Referer: http://mongo/admin
Referer: http://elasticsearch/admin
Referer: http://rabbitmq/admin
Referer: http://kafka/admin
Referer: http://zookeeper/admin
Referer: http://consul/admin
Referer: http://etcd/admin
Referer: http://vault/admin
Referer: http://kubernetes/admin
Referer: http://docker/admin

Referer: http://mesos/admin

Referer: http://serf/admin

Origin: http://localhost
Origin: http://0.0.0.0
Origin: http://[::1]

title.zh: 核验Referer/Origin 信任绕过证据
title.en: Verify evidence for Referer and Origin Trust Bypass

description.zh: 通过服务端主体、授权决策和资源内容确认伪造头是否真正改变权限；同时排除状态码变化、CSRF 拒绝页面或公开资源响应。
description.en: Confirm from server principal, authorization decision, and resource content whether the forged header changes privileges; also exclude Status-code changes, CSRF denial pages, or public-resource responses.

review.rationale: 原始头部可直接用于验证错误的来源信任，应作为认证授权绕过载荷保留。

prerequisites.zh: 在测试 API 为 GET/POST 与 PUT/PATCH/DELETE 建立明确授权和 CSRF 矩阵，只使用可回滚 canary 对象。
prerequisites.en: Define an explicit authorization and CSRF matrix for GET or POST versus PUT, PATCH, and DELETE in a test API, using only a reversible canary object.

prerequisites.zh: 记录代理检查的外层方法、各 override Header、框架有效方法和最终处理器，每次只发送一个覆盖头。
prerequisites.en: Record the outer method checked by the proxy, each override header, framework-effective method, and final handler, sending only one override header per request.

analysis.zh: 阳性是边缘按允许的外层方法放行，而应用采用受限覆盖方法并在无相应授权/CSRF 的情况下改变 canary，双层日志可关联。返回 Allow Header、405/501、路由存在、框架解析覆盖值但随后授权拒绝、仅响应正文写 DELETE 或无状态变化都不是方法绕过。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is the edge allowing the outer method while the application applies a restricted override method and changes the canary without the corresponding authorization or CSRF check, correlated across both tiers. An Allow header, HTTP 405 or 501, route existence, parsing followed by authorization denial, DELETE text in a response, or no state change is not method bypass.

opsecTips.zh: 一个可回滚 canary 首次由覆盖方法改变后停止，不测试真实删除、上传或管理处理器。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one reversible canary is first changed by an override method; do not test real deletion, upload, or administration handlers.

opsecTips.zh: 回滚 canary，删除测试会话和 override trace，并恢复边缘与应用统一方法解析、授权和 CSRF。
opsecTips.en: Roll back the canary, delete test sessions and override traces, and restore consistent method parsing, authorization, and CSRF at edge and application.

name.zh: HTTP 方法覆盖头授权绕过

description.zh: 检查代理与应用是否对 X-HTTP-Method-Override 等头采用不同方法，并遗漏最终方法的授权。
description.en: Checks whether proxies and applications derive different methods from override headers and omit authorization for the effective method.

overview.zh: 原始集合覆盖多种方法覆盖头和危险动词，核心是前置层检查的外层方法与应用执行的有效方法是否一致。本条按HTTP 授权与路由边界审查；应在隔离资源上逐项执行，固定身份、路径、方法和除当前变量外的所有请求条件。
overview.en: The original set covers several override headers and sensitive verbs, focusing on consistency between the edge-checked method and the application-effective method. This entry is reviewed as a HTTP authorization and routing boundary; Execute one item at a time against an isolated resource while fixing identity, path, method, and every request condition except the tested variable.

vulnerability.zh: 如果网关按 POST 放行而应用按 DELETE、PUT 或 WebDAV 方法执行，方法级授权和 CSRF 控制可能被绕过。确认标准是核对应用路由、审计日志和最终资源状态，确认受限方法确已执行；OPTIONS 自动响应、405 页面差异或代理回显覆盖头不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If a gateway permits POST while the application executes DELETE, PUT, or a WebDAV verb, method-level authorization and CSRF controls may be bypassed. Confirmation requires Verify application routing, audit logs, and final resource state to confirm that the restricted method executed; Automatic OPTIONS responses, 405-page differences, or proxy reflection of the override header is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 以低权限身份对同一路径分别发送正常 GET、POST 和受限目标方法并记录拒绝基线；2. 逐项加入原始方法覆盖头，只改变头名或值并记录各层识别出的有效方法；3. 核对应用路由、审计日志和最终资源状态，确认受限方法确已执行。OPTIONS 自动响应、405 页面差异或代理回显覆盖头应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Send normal GET, POST, and the restricted target method to the same path as a low-privilege user and record denials. 2. Add original method-override headers one at a time, changing only header name or value and recording each layer's effective method. 3. Verify application routing, audit logs, and final resource state to confirm that the restricted method executed. Treat Automatic OPTIONS responses, 405-page differences, or proxy reflection of the override header as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 在边缘和应用统一解析有效方法，并默认禁用方法覆盖；2. 按最终有效方法执行认证、授权、CSRF 和审计；3. 明确允许的动词集合并拒绝重复或冲突的覆盖头。
mitigation.en: 1. Resolve the effective method consistently at edge and application and disable overrides by default. 2. Apply authentication, authorization, CSRF, and auditing to the final effective method. 3. Allowlist verbs and reject duplicate or conflicting override headers.

title.zh: 建立方法覆盖头基线
title.en: Establish the Method-Override Headers baseline

description.zh: 以低权限身份对同一路径分别发送正常 GET、POST 和受限目标方法并记录拒绝基线，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Send normal GET, POST, and the restricted target method to the same path as a low-privilege user and record denials, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行方法覆盖头变体
title.en: Execute the Method-Override Headers variants

description.zh: 逐项加入原始方法覆盖头，只改变头名或值并记录各层识别出的有效方法，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Add original method-override headers one at a time, changing only header name or value and recording each layer's effective method, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

attackChain.payload:
X-HTTP-Method: DELETE
X-HTTP-Method-Override: DELETE
X-HTTP-Method-Override: PUT
X-HTTP-Method-Override: PATCH
X-HTTP-Method-Override: TRACE
X-HTTP-Method-Override: OPTIONS
X-HTTP-Method-Override: CONNECT
X-HTTP-Method-Override: PROPFIND
X-HTTP-Method-Override: MOVE
X-HTTP-Method-Override: COPY
X-Method-Override: DELETE
X-Method-Override: PUT
X-Method-Override: PATCH
X-Method-Override: TRACE
X-Method-Override: OPTIONS
X-Method-Override: CONNECT
X-Method-Override: PROPFIND
X-Method-Override: MOVE
X-Method-Override: COPY

title.zh: 核验HTTP 方法覆盖头授权绕过证据
title.en: Verify evidence for HTTP Method-Override Authorization Bypass

description.zh: 核对应用路由、审计日志和最终资源状态，确认受限方法确已执行；同时排除OPTIONS 自动响应、405 页面差异或代理回显覆盖头。
description.en: Verify application routing, audit logs, and final resource state to confirm that the restricted method executed; also exclude Automatic OPTIONS responses, 405-page differences, or proxy reflection of the override header.

review.rationale: 原命令是方法覆盖头的直接负向输入，归入 API/HTTP 授权边界。

prerequisites.zh: 为一个合成管理对象保存规范 `/admin` 在未认证与普通用户下的拒绝基线，并固定 Host、方法和查询业务参数。
prerequisites.en: Retain denial baselines for canonical /admin against one synthetic administration object as unauthenticated and regular users, fixing Host, method, and business query parameters.

prerequisites.zh: 在 CDN、代理、框架和路由层记录原始路径、每次解码/规范化结果与最终 handler，每个请求只改变一个变体。
prerequisites.en: Record raw path, every decoding and normalization result, and final handler at CDN, proxy, framework, and router layers, changing one variant per request.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求某一大小写、分隔符、矩阵参数、编码或路径段变体最终路由到与 `/admin` 相同的受保护对象，却绕过该对象授权并返回 canary。404/403 变化、登录页 200、静态扩展页面、重定向、代理拒绝、不同 handler 的公开内容或仅日志中归一化为 admin 都是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires one case, separator, matrix-parameter, encoding, or path-segment variant to reach the same protected object as /admin while bypassing its authorization and returning the canary. A 404 or 403 change, HTTP 200 login page, static-extension page, redirect, proxy rejection, public content from another handler, or admin normalization only in logs is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 定位到一个最小路径变体并读取一次 canary 后停止，不继续组合编码或遍历其他管理路由。
opsecTips.en: Stop after locating one minimal path variant and reading the canary once; do not combine encodings or enumerate other administration routes.

opsecTips.zh: 删除 canary 和账户，清除各层路由/缓存 trace，并恢复先规范化后授权及唯一规范路径。
opsecTips.en: Delete the canary and accounts, clear routing and cache traces at every tier, and restore normalization before authorization with one canonical path.

name.zh: 管理路径规范化绕过

description.zh: 使用大小写、分隔符、参数、编码和路径段变体检查代理与应用是否对同一路径执行一致授权。
description.en: Uses case, separator, parameter, encoding, and path-segment variants to test consistent authorization across proxies and applications.

overview.zh: 该空尾 ID 实际保存大量 /admin 路径变体，测试重点是 CDN、代理、框架和文件系统的规范化顺序。本条按HTTP 授权与路由边界审查；应在隔离资源上逐项执行，固定身份、路径、方法和除当前变量外的所有请求条件。
overview.en: This ambiguous trailing ID contains many /admin path variants and targets normalization order across CDN, proxy, framework, and filesystem. This entry is reviewed as a HTTP authorization and routing boundary; Execute one item at a time against an isolated resource while fixing identity, path, method, and every request condition except the tested variable.

vulnerability.zh: 若前置访问控制检查原始路径而后端在解码或折叠后映射到受限路由，攻击者可能绕过路径级授权。确认标准是确认变体最终命中同一管理处理器并返回仅管理员可见的数据或状态变化；定制 404、公开登录页、前端路由回退或仅路径回显不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If edge access control checks the raw path while the backend maps it to a restricted route after decoding or collapsing, path-level authorization may be bypassed. Confirmation requires Confirm that a variant reaches the same administrative handler and returns administrator-only data or state change; Custom 404 pages, public login pages, client-route fallbacks, or path reflection is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 记录标准 /admin 路径在未认证与低权限会话中的拒绝状态、正文和后端路由；2. 逐项发送原始路径变体并保留原始请求目标、代理转发路径和框架归一化结果；3. 确认变体最终命中同一管理处理器并返回仅管理员可见的数据或状态变化。定制 404、公开登录页、前端路由回退或仅路径回显应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record status, body, and backend route for the canonical /admin path under unauthenticated and low-privilege sessions. 2. Send original path variants one at a time and retain raw request target, proxy-forwarded path, and framework-normalized result. 3. Confirm that a variant reaches the same administrative handler and returns administrator-only data or state change. Treat Custom 404 pages, public login pages, client-route fallbacks, or path reflection as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 在授权前采用单一严格路径规范化并拒绝歧义编码；2. 将授权绑定到后端路由和主体而不是边缘字符串规则；3. 对大小写、分号、点段、双重编码和尾分隔符建立回归测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Apply one strict path normalization before authorization and reject ambiguous encodings. 2. Bind authorization to the backend route and principal rather than edge string rules. 3. Add regression tests for case, semicolons, dot segments, double encoding, and trailing separators.

title.zh: 建立路径变换与授权基线
title.en: Establish the Path Transformation and Authorization baseline

description.zh: 记录标准 /admin 路径在未认证与低权限会话中的拒绝状态、正文和后端路由，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Record status, body, and backend route for the canonical /admin path under unauthenticated and low-privilege sessions, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行路径变换与授权变体
title.en: Execute the Path Transformation and Authorization variants

description.zh: 逐项发送原始路径变体并保留原始请求目标、代理转发路径和框架归一化结果，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Send original path variants one at a time and retain raw request target, proxy-forwarded path, and framework-normalized result, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

title.zh: 核验管理路径规范化绕过证据
title.en: Verify evidence for Administrative Path Normalization Bypass

description.zh: 确认变体最终命中同一管理处理器并返回仅管理员可见的数据或状态变化；同时排除定制 404、公开登录页、前端路由回退或仅路径回显。
description.en: Confirm that a variant reaches the same administrative handler and returns administrator-only data or state change; also exclude Custom 404 pages, public login pages, client-route fallbacks, or path reflection.

review.rationale: 路径集合直接测试规范化差异导致的授权绕过，应保留为认证授权载荷。

prerequisites.zh: 在测试路由建立每个标准 HTTP 方法的预期 handler、主体权限和副作用矩阵，使用可恢复对象。
prerequisites.en: Define expected handlers, principal permissions, and side effects for every standard HTTP method on a test route, using a recoverable object.

prerequisites.zh: 固定 URI、认证和请求内容，采集代理 method、应用 handler、授权决策及 OPTIONS/HEAD/TRACE 特殊行为。
prerequisites.en: Fix URI, authentication, and request content while collecting proxy method, application handler, authorization decision, and special OPTIONS, HEAD, or TRACE behavior.

analysis.zh: 阳性是无权限主体通过某个方法到达本应受限的同一资源 handler，并读取 canary 或产生可回滚状态变化，服务端审计确认授权缺失。OPTIONS 暴露方法、HEAD 无正文、TRACE 被启用、405、不同方法返回不同错误、公开健康响应或路由未实现都不等于方法级越权。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is an unauthorized principal reaching a restricted handler for the same resource through one method and reading the canary or causing a reversible change, with server auditing confirming missing authorization. OPTIONS disclosure, bodyless HEAD, enabled TRACE, HTTP 405, different errors, a public health response, or an unimplemented route is not method-level authorization bypass.

opsecTips.zh: 一个标准方法首次越权读取或改变 canary 后停止，不继续 CONNECT/TRACE 链或真实资源动作。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one standard method first reads or changes the canary without authorization; do not continue with CONNECT or TRACE chains or real-resource actions.

opsecTips.zh: 回滚对象，删除会话与方法矩阵日志，并恢复每个 handler 的统一服务端授权和允许方法白名单。
opsecTips.en: Roll back the object, delete sessions and method-matrix logs, and restore consistent server authorization and an allowed-method list for every handler.

name.zh: 标准 HTTP 方法授权一致性

description.zh: 用标准 HTTP 动词检查同一路由的读取、写入和元数据处理是否都执行等价授权。
description.en: Uses standard HTTP verbs to check whether read, write, and metadata handling on one route enforce equivalent authorization.

overview.zh: 原始请求行覆盖 GET、POST、PUT、PATCH、DELETE、OPTIONS、HEAD、TRACE 和 CONNECT，适合建立方法矩阵。本条按HTTP 授权与路由边界审查；应在隔离资源上逐项执行，固定身份、路径、方法和除当前变量外的所有请求条件。
overview.en: The original request lines cover GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS, HEAD, TRACE, and CONNECT for a method matrix. This entry is reviewed as a HTTP authorization and routing boundary; Execute one item at a time against an isolated resource while fixing identity, path, method, and every request condition except the tested variable.

vulnerability.zh: 如果只保护常用方法，而备用动词映射到相同处理器或泄露响应头，低权限用户可能获得受限能力。确认标准是核对有效处理器、响应字段和资源版本，证明低权限请求执行了受限操作；自动 Allow 头、空 HEAD 正文、通用 OPTIONS 或 TRACE 被边缘拒绝不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If only common methods are protected while alternate verbs reach the same handler or disclose headers, a low-privilege user may gain restricted capability. Confirmation requires Verify effective handler, response fields, and resource version to prove a restricted operation executed for the low-privilege request; Automatic Allow headers, empty HEAD bodies, generic OPTIONS, or TRACE blocked at the edge is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 以管理员和低权限账号分别访问标准管理路由，记录每个允许方法及预期结果；2. 按原始请求行逐个发送方法，使用无副作用测试资源并保持路径与身份一致；3. 核对有效处理器、响应字段和资源版本，证明低权限请求执行了受限操作。自动 Allow 头、空 HEAD 正文、通用 OPTIONS 或 TRACE 被边缘拒绝应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Access the canonical administrative route as administrator and low-privilege users and record allowed methods and expected outcomes. 2. Send methods from the original request lines one at a time against a harmless test resource while holding path and identity constant. 3. Verify effective handler, response fields, and resource version to prove a restricted operation executed for the low-privilege request. Treat Automatic Allow headers, empty HEAD bodies, generic OPTIONS, or TRACE blocked at the edge as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 为每个路由明确允许的方法并默认拒绝其他动词；2. 在业务处理器内部对所有方法执行相同主体授权；3. 关闭不需要的 TRACE、CONNECT 和 WebDAV 能力并持续测试方法矩阵。
mitigation.en: 1. Explicitly allow methods per route and deny all others by default. 2. Enforce principal authorization inside business handlers for every method. 3. Disable unnecessary TRACE, CONNECT, and WebDAV capabilities and continuously test the method matrix.

title.zh: 建立方法级访问控制基线
title.en: Establish the Method-Level Access Control baseline

description.zh: 以管理员和低权限账号分别访问标准管理路由，记录每个允许方法及预期结果，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Access the canonical administrative route as administrator and low-privilege users and record allowed methods and expected outcomes, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行方法级访问控制变体
title.en: Execute the Method-Level Access Control variants

description.zh: 按原始请求行逐个发送方法，使用无副作用测试资源并保持路径与身份一致，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Send methods from the original request lines one at a time against a harmless test resource while holding path and identity constant, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

attackChain.payload:
GET /admin HTTP/1.1
POST /admin HTTP/1.1
PUT /admin HTTP/1.1
PATCH /admin HTTP/1.1
DELETE /admin HTTP/1.1
OPTIONS /admin HTTP/1.1
HEAD /admin HTTP/1.1
TRACE /admin HTTP/1.1
CONNECT /admin HTTP/1.1

title.zh: 核验标准 HTTP 方法授权一致性证据
title.en: Verify evidence for Standard HTTP Method Authorization Consistency

description.zh: 核对有效处理器、响应字段和资源版本，证明低权限请求执行了受限操作；同时排除自动 Allow 头、空 HEAD 正文、通用 OPTIONS 或 TRACE 被边缘拒绝。
description.en: Verify effective handler, response fields, and resource version to prove a restricted operation executed for the low-privilege request; also exclude Automatic Allow headers, empty HEAD bodies, generic OPTIONS, or TRACE blocked at the edge.

review.rationale: 原始请求行是方法级授权验证载荷，应归入 API 安全。

prerequisites.zh: 明确唯一可信代理的地址范围及其覆盖规则，准备外部客户端、内部合成客户端和只读 canary 端点。
prerequisites.en: Define the sole trusted proxy range and overwrite rules, with an external client, synthetic internal client, and read-only canary endpoint.

prerequisites.zh: 固定连接源、认证、路径与方法，只改变一个转发 Header/地址编码，并记录代理追加链与应用选取的 client IP。
prerequisites.en: Fix connection source, authentication, path, and method while changing one forwarding header or address encoding, recording the proxy-appended chain and application-selected client IP.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求外部连接仅凭客户端提供的 Header 被应用识别为环回/内网，并因此读取只允许内部主体的 canary，日志显示错误选取位置。Header 被记录、显示的 IP 改变但授权不变、可信代理正确覆盖、地址解析失败、WAF 打标或接口本就公开均是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires an external connection to be classified as loopback or internal solely from a client-supplied header and consequently read an internal-only canary, with logs showing the wrong selected position. A logged header, changed displayed IP without authorization impact, correct trusted-proxy overwrite, parse failure, WAF tagging, or an intentionally public endpoint is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 一个内部 canary 首次因伪造 client IP 返回后停止，不访问真实运维或网络管理端点。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one internal canary is first returned because of a forged client IP; do not access real operations or network-management endpoints.

opsecTips.zh: 删除测试主体和 canary，清理转发链 trace 与缓存，并恢复入口剥离、可信代理追加和严格 IP 解析。
opsecTips.en: Delete test principals and the canary, clear forwarding-chain traces and caches, and restore ingress stripping, trusted-proxy appending, and strict IP parsing.

name.zh: 代理客户端 IP 头信任绕过

description.zh: 检查应用是否信任外部请求提供的 X-Forwarded-For 等头，从而误判为环回或内网客户端。
description.en: Checks whether an application trusts externally supplied forwarding headers and misclassifies the client as loopback or internal.

overview.zh: 原始集合覆盖多种转发 IP 头、环回编码和多跳列表，目标是识别受信代理边界和取值顺序。本条按HTTP 授权与路由边界审查；应在隔离资源上逐项执行，固定身份、路径、方法和除当前变量外的所有请求条件。
overview.en: The original set covers forwarding headers, loopback encodings, and multi-hop lists to identify trusted-proxy boundaries and selection order. This entry is reviewed as a HTTP authorization and routing boundary; Execute one item at a time against an isolated resource while fixing identity, path, method, and every request condition except the tested variable.

vulnerability.zh: 若应用直接读取攻击者提供的左侧或任意转发值用于授权、限流或审计，外部请求可冒充内部来源。确认标准是从边缘与应用日志确认解析出的客户端 IP，并验证权限或限流是否因此改变；日志字段变化但权限不变、代理统一覆盖或仅调试页面回显不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If an application directly uses attacker-supplied leftmost or arbitrary forwarding values for authorization, rate limits, or auditing, an external request can impersonate an internal source. Confirmation requires Confirm the parsed client IP in edge and application logs and verify whether authorization or throttling changes; Log-field changes without privilege changes, trusted-proxy overwrites, or debug-page reflection is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 记录不带转发头的外部低权限请求在管理接口上的真实客户端地址和拒绝结果；2. 逐项加入原始 IP 头和值，覆盖重复头、多跳顺序和不同环回表示；3. 从边缘与应用日志确认解析出的客户端 IP，并验证权限或限流是否因此改变。日志字段变化但权限不变、代理统一覆盖或仅调试页面回显应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record the actual client address and denial for an external low-privilege request without forwarding headers. 2. Add original IP headers and values one at a time, covering duplicates, hop order, and alternate loopback forms. 3. Confirm the parsed client IP in edge and application logs and verify whether authorization or throttling changes. Treat Log-field changes without privilege changes, trusted-proxy overwrites, or debug-page reflection as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 在入口删除外部转发头并由受信代理重新生成；2. 配置明确的代理跳数与地址允许列表，解析最接近的可信链；3. 禁止基于客户端 IP 单独授予敏感权限，并记录原始与规范化地址。
mitigation.en: 1. Strip external forwarding headers at ingress and rebuild them at a trusted proxy. 2. Configure explicit trusted proxy hops and addresses and parse the nearest trusted chain. 3. Never grant sensitive privileges from client IP alone and log both raw and normalized addresses.

title.zh: 建立转发 IP 头伪造基线
title.en: Establish the Forwarded Client-IP Spoofing baseline

description.zh: 记录不带转发头的外部低权限请求在管理接口上的真实客户端地址和拒绝结果，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Record the actual client address and denial for an external low-privilege request without forwarding headers, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行转发 IP 头伪造变体
title.en: Execute the Forwarded Client-IP Spoofing variants

description.zh: 逐项加入原始 IP 头和值，覆盖重复头、多跳顺序和不同环回表示，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Add original IP headers and values one at a time, covering duplicates, hop order, and alternate loopback forms, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

title.zh: 核验代理客户端 IP 头信任绕过证据
title.en: Verify evidence for Proxy Client-IP Header Trust Bypass

description.zh: 从边缘与应用日志确认解析出的客户端 IP，并验证权限或限流是否因此改变；同时排除日志字段变化但权限不变、代理统一覆盖或仅调试页面回显。
description.en: Confirm the parsed client IP in edge and application logs and verify whether authorization or throttling changes; also exclude Log-field changes without privilege changes, trusted-proxy overwrites, or debug-page reflection.

review.rationale: 原头部集合用于验证代理信任边界，应保留为认证授权绕过载荷。

prerequisites.zh: 固定目标 IP、TLS SNI、路径和未授权主体，为公开与内部虚拟主机分别配置唯一无敏感 canary。
prerequisites.en: Fix target IP, TLS SNI, path, and unauthorized principal, configuring unique nonsensitive canaries for public and internal virtual hosts.

prerequisites.zh: 记录边缘允许的 authority、上游 Host、后端 vhost 与路由目标，每次只改变一个完整 Host 值。
prerequisites.en: Record ingress-allowed authority, upstream Host, backend virtual host, and route target, changing one complete Host value per request.

analysis.zh: 阳性是外部连接通过内部/环回 Host 被路由到未发布虚拟主机并返回其唯一 canary，代理与后端日志可关联。默认站点内容、Host 被响应回显、TLS 证书错误、400/421、DNS 解析、同一应用品牌页面、缓存旧响应或 SNI 已选择内部站点均是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is an external connection being routed by an internal or loopback Host to an unpublished virtual host and returning its unique canary, correlated in proxy and backend logs. Default-site content, reflected Host, TLS certificate errors, HTTP 400 or 421, DNS resolution, same-brand pages, stale cache, or SNI already selecting the internal site is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 首次读取一个内部虚拟主机 canary 后停止，不枚举其路径、接口或真实服务名。
opsecTips.en: Stop after first reading one internal virtual-host canary; do not enumerate its paths, APIs, or real service names.

opsecTips.zh: 删除 vhost fixture，清理代理/CDN 缓存和请求 trace，并恢复 authority 白名单、SNI/Host 一致性及默认拒绝。
opsecTips.en: Delete virtual-host fixtures, clear proxy and CDN caches and request traces, and restore authority allowlisting, SNI and Host consistency, and default denial.

name.zh: Host 头内部虚拟主机绕过

description.zh: 通过内部与环回 Host 值检查反向代理是否把外部请求路由到未公开虚拟主机或管理应用。
description.en: Uses internal and loopback Host values to test whether a reverse proxy routes external requests to unpublished virtual hosts or administrative applications.

overview.zh: 原始集合直接携带 Host 头和大量内部服务名称，重点是入口允许的 authority 与后端虚拟主机映射。本条按Host/authority 信任边界审查；应固定目标 IP、TLS SNI、身份与路径，逐项比较入口 authority、代理路由和后端虚拟主机。
overview.en: The original set supplies Host headers and many internal service names, focusing on permitted authorities at ingress and backend virtual-host mapping. This entry is reviewed as a Host and authority trust boundary; Fix target IP, TLS SNI, identity, and path and compare ingress authority, proxy routing, and backend virtual host one item at a time.

vulnerability.zh: 若共享入口接受任意 Host 并路由到内部 vhost，外部用户可能访问本应只在内网暴露的管理页面。确认标准是确认请求到达未公开虚拟主机并返回该服务独有的受限内容或审计事件；默认站点、统一错误页、DNS 无关回显或仅证书名称不匹配不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If a shared ingress accepts arbitrary Host values and routes to internal virtual hosts, an external user may reach administrative pages intended only for internal networks. Confirmation requires Confirm that the request reaches an unpublished virtual host and returns service-specific restricted content or audit events; Default sites, generic error pages, DNS-independent reflection, or certificate-name mismatch alone is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 用合法外部 Host 和随机不存在 Host 记录默认站点、TLS SNI 与路由拒绝基线；2. 逐项发送原始 Host 头值，固定目标 IP、协议、路径和身份并记录后端服务标识；3. 确认请求到达未公开虚拟主机并返回该服务独有的受限内容或审计事件。默认站点、统一错误页、DNS 无关回显或仅证书名称不匹配应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record default-site, TLS SNI, and routing-denial baselines using the legitimate external Host and a random nonexistent Host. 2. Send original Host values one at a time while fixing target IP, scheme, path, and identity and recording backend service identity. 3. Confirm that the request reaches an unpublished virtual host and returns service-specific restricted content or audit events. Treat Default sites, generic error pages, DNS-independent reflection, or certificate-name mismatch alone as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 入口严格允许已注册 Host/authority 并拒绝未知值；2. 内部管理虚拟主机使用独立监听地址、网络策略和认证；3. 让 TLS SNI、Host 与代理路由一致并测试默认虚拟主机行为。
mitigation.en: 1. Strictly allow registered Host or authority values at ingress and reject unknown values. 2. Place internal administrative virtual hosts on separate listeners with network policy and authentication. 3. Keep TLS SNI, Host, and proxy routing consistent and test default virtual-host behavior.

title.zh: 建立虚拟主机路由信任基线
title.en: Establish the Virtual-Host Routing Trust baseline

description.zh: 用合法外部 Host 和随机不存在 Host 记录默认站点、TLS SNI 与路由拒绝基线，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Record default-site, TLS SNI, and routing-denial baselines using the legitimate external Host and a random nonexistent Host, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行虚拟主机路由信任变体
title.en: Execute the Virtual-Host Routing Trust variants

description.zh: 逐项发送原始 Host 头值，固定目标 IP、协议、路径和身份并记录后端服务标识，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Send original Host values one at a time while fixing target IP, scheme, path, and identity and recording backend service identity, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

title.zh: 核验Host 头内部虚拟主机绕过证据
title.en: Verify evidence for Host Header Internal Virtual-Host Bypass

description.zh: 确认请求到达未公开虚拟主机并返回该服务独有的受限内容或审计事件；同时排除默认站点、统一错误页、DNS 无关回显或仅证书名称不匹配。
description.en: Confirm that the request reaches an unpublished virtual host and returns service-specific restricted content or audit events; also exclude Default sites, generic error pages, DNS-independent reflection, or certificate-name mismatch alone.

review.rationale: 原命令是完整 Host 头输入，归入 Host Header 安全而非泛认证漏洞。

prerequisites.zh: 建立公开路径与内部管理 canary 的代理/应用路由基线，确认 X-Original-URL 和 X-Rewrite-URL 只应由可信代理生成。
prerequisites.en: Establish proxy and application routing baselines for a public path and internal administration canary, confirming X-Original-URL and X-Rewrite-URL should be generated only by trusted proxies.

prerequisites.zh: 固定外层 URI、方法和无权限会话，分别发送单一重写头并记录边缘授权路径与后端有效路径。
prerequisites.en: Fix outer URI, method, and unauthorized session, sending one rewrite header at a time and recording edge-authorized path and backend-effective path.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求外层公开路径通过客户端重写 Header 被后端改为受保护路径，且边缘授权未重检，最终返回内部 canary。Header 被保留/删除、后端路由到公开页、返回登录页、404、日志显示重写值但 handler 未改变或可信代理主动设置正确值都不是绕过。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires a public outer path to become a protected backend path through a client rewrite header without edge reauthorization, returning the internal canary. A preserved or stripped header, routing to a public page, login response, HTTP 404, logged rewrite value without handler change, or a trusted proxy correctly setting the value is not bypass.

opsecTips.zh: 一个内部 canary 首次经外层公开路径返回后停止，不测试写方法或更多内部路由。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one internal canary is first returned through the public outer path; do not test write methods or additional internal routes.

opsecTips.zh: 删除路由 fixture 和会话，清除代理/应用 trace 与缓存，并恢复入口剥离内部重写头和最终路径授权。
opsecTips.en: Delete route fixtures and sessions, clear proxy and application traces and caches, and restore ingress stripping of internal rewrite headers and authorization on the final path.

name.zh: X-Original-URL/X-Rewrite-URL 路由绕过

description.zh: 验证外部客户端是否能控制代理内部重写头，使后端处理与边缘授权检查不同的路径。
description.en: Tests whether external clients can control internal rewrite headers so the backend handles a path different from the one authorized at the edge.

overview.zh: 原始集合针对 X-Original-URL 与 X-Rewrite-URL 的管理路径变体，关键是这些头应只由受信代理产生。本条按HTTP 授权与路由边界审查；应在隔离资源上逐项执行，固定身份、路径、方法和除当前变量外的所有请求条件。
overview.en: The original set targets administrative path variants in X-Original-URL and X-Rewrite-URL, which should be generated only by trusted proxies. This entry is reviewed as a HTTP authorization and routing boundary; Execute one item at a time against an isolated resource while fixing identity, path, method, and every request condition except the tested variable.

vulnerability.zh: 若边缘按公开路径授权而应用优先采用伪造重写头，攻击者可让请求落到受限处理器。确认标准是通过后端路由日志和资源内容确认应用采用了头中的管理路径并绕过授权；头部回显、代理删除后返回相同页面或公开登录入口不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If the edge authorizes a public path while the application prefers a forged rewrite header, an attacker may reach a restricted handler. Confirmation requires Confirm from backend route logs and resource content that the application adopted the administrative path from the header and bypassed authorization; Header reflection, identical responses after proxy stripping, or a public login entry point is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 记录公开路径和标准管理路径的边缘路由、后端路径与低权限授权结果；2. 逐项加入原始 URL 覆盖头，保持请求目标为公开路径并记录代理转发内容；3. 通过后端路由日志和资源内容确认应用采用了头中的管理路径并绕过授权。头部回显、代理删除后返回相同页面或公开登录入口应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record edge route, backend path, and low-privilege authorization results for a public path and the canonical administrative path. 2. Add original URL override headers one at a time while keeping the request target public and recording proxy forwarding. 3. Confirm from backend route logs and resource content that the application adopted the administrative path from the header and bypassed authorization. Treat Header reflection, identical responses after proxy stripping, or a public login entry point as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 入口删除所有客户端提供的内部重写头；2. 应用授权最终规范化路由，不信任外部覆盖值；3. 在代理与应用集成测试中覆盖重复头、大小写和路径编码。
mitigation.en: 1. Strip every client-supplied internal rewrite header at ingress. 2. Authorize the final normalized route and never trust external override values. 3. Cover duplicates, casing, and path encoding in proxy-to-application integration tests.

title.zh: 建立内部重写头基线
title.en: Establish the Internal Rewrite Headers baseline

description.zh: 记录公开路径和标准管理路径的边缘路由、后端路径与低权限授权结果，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Record edge route, backend path, and low-privilege authorization results for a public path and the canonical administrative path, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行内部重写头变体
title.en: Execute the Internal Rewrite Headers variants

description.zh: 逐项加入原始 URL 覆盖头，保持请求目标为公开路径并记录代理转发内容，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Add original URL override headers one at a time while keeping the request target public and recording proxy forwarding, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

title.zh: 核验X-Original-URL/X-Rewrite-URL 路由绕过证据
title.en: Verify evidence for X-Original-URL and X-Rewrite-URL Routing Bypass

description.zh: 通过后端路由日志和资源内容确认应用采用了头中的管理路径并绕过授权；同时排除头部回显、代理删除后返回相同页面或公开登录入口。
description.en: Confirm from backend route logs and resource content that the application adopted the administrative path from the header and bypassed authorization; also exclude Header reflection, identical responses after proxy stripping, or a public login entry point.

review.rationale: 原命令是内部 URL 重写头的直接绕过载荷。

prerequisites.zh: 定位一个会把受控输入写入响应 Header 值的测试 sink，并在代理与应用层记录解码次数和字符集。
prerequisites.en: Locate a test sink that writes controlled input into a response-header value, recording decode count and character set at proxy and application layers.

prerequisites.zh: 使用唯一 `X-Canary` 无害 Header，逐个测试大小写、单/双编码和换行组合，捕获原始响应字节。
prerequisites.en: Use a unique harmless X-Canary header and test case, single or double encoding, and newline combinations individually while capturing raw response bytes.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求某个分隔符变体被响应链解码成新的独立 Header 行，原始字节显示 CRLF 边界且客户端解析到 X-Canary。输入出现在请求/日志/正文、Header 值保留百分号文本、代理规范化为空格、浏览器开发者工具折叠显示或响应被拒绝都不构成响应分割。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires one separator variant to be decoded into a separate response-header line, with raw bytes showing the CRLF boundary and the client parsing X-Canary. Input in request, logs, or body, percent text retained in a header value, proxy normalization to spaces, folded developer-tool display, or rejected response is not response splitting.

opsecTips.zh: 一个 X-Canary Header 首次成功分行后停止，不注入 Cookie、Location、正文或缓存控制。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one X-Canary header is first split successfully; do not inject cookies, Location, body content, or cache control.

opsecTips.zh: 删除测试输入和原始捕获，清除代理/浏览器缓存，并恢复 Header 编码、单次解码和 CR/LF 拒绝。
opsecTips.en: Delete test input and raw captures, clear proxy and browser caches, and restore header encoding, single decoding, and CR or LF rejection.

name.zh: CRLF 分隔符编码探测

description.zh: 使用不同大小写、双重编码和换行组合检查输入是否进入 HTTP 响应头并被解码为行分隔符。
description.en: Uses casing, double encoding, and newline combinations to test whether input reaches an HTTP response header and decodes into line separators.

overview.zh: 原始集合只包含换行编码与转义形式，必须嵌入明确的响应头接收点并配合无害标记验证。本条按响应头结构边界审查；应在能写入响应头的测试接收点逐项验证，并查看原始响应字节而不是浏览器格式化结果。
overview.en: The original set contains newline encodings and escapes that require a known response-header sink and a harmless marker. This entry is reviewed as a response-header structural boundary; Validate one item at a time at a test sink that writes response headers and inspect raw response bytes rather than browser-formatted output.

vulnerability.zh: 若应用在写入 Location、Set-Cookie 或自定义响应头前解码用户输入，攻击者可能注入新头或拆分响应。确认标准是在原始响应字节中确认出现独立的新响应头，并与应用日志中的输入关联；代理界面折行、浏览器规范化、正文回显或日志转义显示换行不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If an application decodes user input before writing Location, Set-Cookie, or custom response headers, an attacker may inject new headers or split the response. Confirmation requires Confirm a distinct new response header in raw response bytes and correlate it with the input in application logs; Proxy UI wrapping, browser normalization, body reflection, or escaped newline display in logs is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 确定一个会把测试值写入响应头的授权端点，并记录未编码随机标记的原始响应字节；2. 逐项使用原始 CRLF 编码加上 X-Test-Marker 无害头名，避免注入 Cookie 或脚本；3. 在原始响应字节中确认出现独立的新响应头，并与应用日志中的输入关联。代理界面折行、浏览器规范化、正文回显或日志转义显示换行应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Identify an authorized endpoint that writes a test value into a response header and record raw response bytes for an unencoded random marker. 2. Use original CRLF encodings one at a time with a harmless X-Test-Marker header name, avoiding cookies or scripts. 3. Confirm a distinct new response header in raw response bytes and correlate it with the input in application logs. Treat Proxy UI wrapping, browser normalization, body reflection, or escaped newline display in logs as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 禁止任何 CR、LF 和其编码形式进入响应头值；2. 使用框架结构化响应头 API 而不是字符串拼接；3. 在所有解码阶段后再次验证，并测试代理与应用的规范化顺序。
mitigation.en: 1. Reject CR, LF, and encoded equivalents from response-header values. 2. Use framework response-header APIs rather than string concatenation. 3. Revalidate after every decoding stage and test normalization order across proxies and applications.

title.zh: 建立响应头分割基础输入基线
title.en: Establish the Response-Splitting Base Inputs baseline

description.zh: 确定一个会把测试值写入响应头的授权端点，并记录未编码随机标记的原始响应字节，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Identify an authorized endpoint that writes a test value into a response header and record raw response bytes for an unencoded random marker, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行响应头分割基础输入变体
title.en: Execute the Response-Splitting Base Inputs variants

description.zh: 逐项使用原始 CRLF 编码加上 X-Test-Marker 无害头名，避免注入 Cookie 或脚本，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Use original CRLF encodings one at a time with a harmless X-Test-Marker header name, avoiding cookies or scripts, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

title.zh: 核验CRLF 分隔符编码探测证据
title.en: Verify evidence for CRLF Separator Encoding Probes

description.zh: 在原始响应字节中确认出现独立的新响应头，并与应用日志中的输入关联；同时排除代理界面折行、浏览器规范化、正文回显或日志转义显示换行。
description.en: Confirm a distinct new response header in raw response bytes and correlate it with the input in application logs; also exclude Proxy UI wrapping, browser normalization, body reflection, or escaped newline display in logs.

review.rationale: 原集合是 CRLF 分隔符探测载荷，应改归 HTTP 响应分割。

prerequisites.zh: 使用隔离浏览器 profile 和专用响应 Header sink，选择与任何认证 Cookie 不同的随机 canary 名和值。
prerequisites.en: Use an isolated browser profile and dedicated response-header sink, selecting a random canary name and value distinct from every authentication cookie.

prerequisites.zh: 捕获代理/应用原始响应和浏览器 Cookie 存储，配对未编码、编码换行与无换行同值请求。
prerequisites.en: Capture raw proxy and application responses and browser cookie storage, pairing unencoded, encoded-newline, and no-newline requests with the same value.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求注入值形成独立 Set-Cookie Header，并由真实浏览器按预期域/路径存储随机 canary，原始响应可证明其来源。语料中的 admin 文本、请求 Header、正文回显、浏览器拒绝非法 Cookie、服务端本来就设置同名 Cookie、仅代理日志出现或 Cookie 未持久化都属于假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the injected value to form a separate Set-Cookie header and a real browser to store the random canary under the expected domain and path, with raw response proving its source. admin text in the corpus, a request header, body reflection, browser rejection, a cookie independently set by the server, proxy-log appearance only, or no persistence is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 随机非权限 canary Cookie 首次存储后停止，不使用 session、role 或真实认证 Cookie 名。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the random nonprivileged canary cookie is first stored; do not use session, role, or real authentication cookie names.

opsecTips.zh: 删除 canary Cookie、测试响应和浏览器 profile，清理缓存/trace，并恢复 Header 输出编码和 Cookie 属性策略。
opsecTips.en: Delete the canary cookie, test responses, and browser profile, clear caches and traces, and restore header output encoding and cookie-attribute policy.

name.zh: 通用响应 Set-Cookie CRLF 注入

description.zh: 验证可控响应头值是否允许换行后注入 Set-Cookie，并由真实浏览器接受测试 Cookie。
description.en: Tests whether a controllable response-header value permits newline injection of Set-Cookie and whether a real browser accepts a test cookie.

overview.zh: 原始集合将多种身份 Cookie 名附加在 CRLF 后，测试必须改用无权限的随机测试 Cookie 避免影响会话。本条按响应头结构边界审查；应在能写入响应头的测试接收点逐项验证，并查看原始响应字节而不是浏览器格式化结果。
overview.en: The original set appends many identity cookie names after CRLF; testing should substitute a random nonprivileged test cookie to avoid session impact. This entry is reviewed as a response-header structural boundary; Validate one item at a time at a test sink that writes response headers and inspect raw response bytes rather than browser-formatted output.

vulnerability.zh: 若响应分割允许注入 Set-Cookie，攻击者可能固定会话、覆盖安全属性或影响同站后续请求。确认标准是同时核对原始响应头、浏览器 Cookie 存储和后续无害请求是否携带该测试值；正文出现 Set-Cookie 文本、代理伪造显示或浏览器因域和 SameSite 拒绝保存不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If response splitting allows Set-Cookie injection, an attacker may fix sessions, override security attributes, or affect later same-site requests. Confirmation requires Verify raw response headers, browser cookie storage, and whether a later harmless request carries the test value; Set-Cookie text in the body, proxy-rendered displays, or browser rejection due to domain and SameSite rules is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 在隔离浏览器清空目标域 Cookie，并记录正常响应中不存在随机测试 Cookie；2. 逐项应用原始 CRLF 结构，但把 Cookie 名值替换为随机、无权限且短期的测试项；3. 同时核对原始响应头、浏览器 Cookie 存储和后续无害请求是否携带该测试值。正文出现 Set-Cookie 文本、代理伪造显示或浏览器因域和 SameSite 拒绝保存应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Clear target-domain cookies in an isolated browser and record that a random test cookie is absent from the normal response. 2. Apply original CRLF structures one at a time while replacing cookie names and values with random, nonprivileged, short-lived test values. 3. Verify raw response headers, browser cookie storage, and whether a later harmless request carries the test value. Treat Set-Cookie text in the body, proxy-rendered displays, or browser rejection due to domain and SameSite rules as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 对响应头数据拒绝 CR/LF 并在解码后重新校验；2. 通过框架 Cookie API 设置固定名称、Domain、Path、Secure、HttpOnly 与 SameSite；3. 对会话 Cookie 实施轮换、绑定与异常覆盖检测。
mitigation.en: 1. Reject CR and LF in response-header data and revalidate after decoding. 2. Set fixed cookie names and attributes through framework cookie APIs. 3. Rotate and bind session cookies and detect abnormal overwrites.

title.zh: 建立Cookie 响应注入基线
title.en: Establish the Cookie Response Injection baseline

description.zh: 在隔离浏览器清空目标域 Cookie，并记录正常响应中不存在随机测试 Cookie，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Clear target-domain cookies in an isolated browser and record that a random test cookie is absent from the normal response, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行Cookie 响应注入变体
title.en: Execute the Cookie Response Injection variants

description.zh: 逐项应用原始 CRLF 结构，但把 Cookie 名值替换为随机、无权限且短期的测试项，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Apply original CRLF structures one at a time while replacing cookie names and values with random, nonprivileged, short-lived test values, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

attackChain.payload:
%0d%0aSet-Cookie:admin=true
%0D%0ASet-Cookie:admin=true
%0d%0aSet-Cookie:session=admin
%0D%0ASet-Cookie:session=admin

%0D%0ASet-Cookie:role=admin

%0D%0ASet-Cookie:uid=1

%0D%0ASet-Cookie:isAdmin=true

%0D%0ASet-Cookie:is_admin=true

%0D%0ASet-Cookie:admin=1

%0D%0ASet-Cookie:authenticated=true

%0D%0ASet-Cookie:auth=true

%0D%0ASet-Cookie:login=true

%0D%0ASet-Cookie:loggedin=true

%0D%0ASet-Cookie:token=fake_admin_token

%0D%0ASet-Cookie:access_token=fake_admin_token
%0d%0aSet-Cookie:session_id=fake_session_id
%0D%0ASet-Cookie:session_id=fake_session_id

%0D%0ASet-Cookie:PHPSESSID=fake_session_id

%0D%0ASet-Cookie:JSESSIONID=fake_session_id

%0D%0ASet-Cookie:ASP.NET_SessionId=fake_session_id

%0D%0ASet-Cookie:connect.sid=fake_session_id

%0D%0ASet-Cookie:csrf_token=fake_csrf_token

%0D%0ASet-Cookie:_csrf=fake_csrf_token

title.zh: 核验CRLF Set-Cookie 响应头注入证据
title.en: Verify evidence for CRLF Set-Cookie Response Header Injection

description.zh: 同时核对原始响应头、浏览器 Cookie 存储和后续无害请求是否携带该测试值；同时排除正文出现 Set-Cookie 文本、代理伪造显示或浏览器因域和 SameSite 拒绝保存。
description.en: Verify raw response headers, browser cookie storage, and whether a later harmless request carries the test value; also exclude Set-Cookie text in the body, proxy-rendered displays, or browser rejection due to domain and SameSite rules.

review.rationale: 原命令是 Set-Cookie 响应头注入载荷，应归入 CRLF。

prerequisites.zh: 控制 HTTPS 接收域和无敏感重定向端点，在隔离浏览器中固定原始 Location、状态码和代理解码行为。
prerequisites.en: Control an HTTPS recipient and nonsensitive redirect endpoint, pinning original Location, status code, and proxy decoding behavior in an isolated browser.

prerequisites.zh: 使用唯一路径 canary 只验证新增 Location，Cookie 组合另行隔离；捕获原始 Header 与最终导航链。
prerequisites.en: Use a unique path canary to validate only an added Location, isolating cookie combinations separately, and capture raw headers and final navigation chain.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求 CRLF 产生独立或覆盖有效 Location，使真实浏览器最终导航到受控 canary 接收路径，原始响应和接收日志可关联。候选域出现在正文、浏览器仍按原 Location 导航、无效双 Location 被拒绝、只发生应用正常开放重定向、接收端无请求或 Cookie 文本未解析都不是 CRLF 重定向注入。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires CRLF to create or override an effective Location so a real browser finally navigates to the controlled canary path, correlated by raw response and recipient logs. A candidate domain in the body, navigation following the original Location, rejected duplicate Location, an ordinary application open redirect, no recipient request, or unparsed cookie text is not CRLF redirect injection.

opsecTips.zh: 浏览器首次到达受控 canary 路径后停止，不附带凭据、Cookie 注入或跨域链。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the browser first reaches the controlled canary path; do not attach credentials, inject cookies, or build cross-domain chains.

opsecTips.zh: 删除接收日志和重定向 fixture，清除浏览器历史/缓存与原始捕获，并恢复 Location 白名单和 CRLF 过滤。
opsecTips.en: Delete recipient logs and redirect fixtures, clear browser history, caches, and raw captures, and restore Location allowlisting and CRLF filtering.

name.zh: CRLF Location 重定向注入

description.zh: 验证重定向参数是否可通过 CRLF 注入新的 Location 或组合响应头，并改变浏览器最终导航。
description.en: Tests whether redirect parameters allow CRLF injection of a new Location or combined headers and change the browser's final navigation.

overview.zh: 原始集合组合 Location 与 Set-Cookie，评估时应先用自有 HTTPS 接收端和无害标记隔离重定向影响。本条按响应头结构边界审查；应在能写入响应头的测试接收点逐项验证，并查看原始响应字节而不是浏览器格式化结果。
overview.en: The original set combines Location and Set-Cookie; assessment should isolate redirect effects with an owned HTTPS receiver and harmless markers. This entry is reviewed as a response-header structural boundary; Validate one item at a time at a test sink that writes response headers and inspect raw response bytes rather than browser-formatted output.

vulnerability.zh: 若用户输入可拆分重定向响应，攻击者可能控制最终 Location、注入附加头或制造响应混淆。确认标准是从原始响应与浏览器导航日志确认注入的独立 Location 被客户端采用；应用正常开放重定向、正文链接、代理跟随后的最终 URL 或未被采用的重复头不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If user input can split a redirect response, an attacker may control the final Location, add headers, or create response ambiguity. Confirmation requires Confirm from raw responses and browser navigation logs that an injected independent Location was honored; A normal open redirect, body links, proxy-followed URLs, or duplicate headers not honored by the client is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 记录合法重定向参数产生的状态码、单一 Location 和浏览器最终目标；2. 逐项提交原始 CRLF Location 结构，但仅指向自有测试域且移除身份 Cookie 值；3. 从原始响应与浏览器导航日志确认注入的独立 Location 被客户端采用。应用正常开放重定向、正文链接、代理跟随后的最终 URL 或未被采用的重复头应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record status, the single Location header, and final browser destination for a legitimate redirect parameter. 2. Submit original CRLF Location structures one at a time, pointing only to an owned test domain and removing identity-cookie values. 3. Confirm from raw responses and browser navigation logs that an injected independent Location was honored. Treat A normal open redirect, body links, proxy-followed URLs, or duplicate headers not honored by the client as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 对重定向目标使用结构化 URL 解析和目的地允许列表；2. 拒绝所有换行及多阶段解码后的控制字符；3. 统一生成单一 Location，并测试重复头在代理和浏览器中的行为。
mitigation.en: 1. Use structured URL parsing and a destination allowlist for redirects. 2. Reject every newline and control character after all decoding stages. 3. Generate one Location header and test duplicate-header behavior across proxies and browsers.

title.zh: 建立重定向响应分割基线
title.en: Establish the Redirect Response Splitting baseline

description.zh: 记录合法重定向参数产生的状态码、单一 Location 和浏览器最终目标，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Record status, the single Location header, and final browser destination for a legitimate redirect parameter, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行重定向响应分割变体
title.en: Execute the Redirect Response Splitting variants

description.zh: 逐项提交原始 CRLF Location 结构，但仅指向自有测试域且移除身份 Cookie 值，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Submit original CRLF Location structures one at a time, pointing only to an owned test domain and removing identity-cookie values, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

title.zh: 核验CRLF Location 重定向注入证据
title.en: Verify evidence for CRLF Location Redirect Injection

description.zh: 从原始响应与浏览器导航日志确认注入的独立 Location 被客户端采用；同时排除应用正常开放重定向、正文链接、代理跟随后的最终 URL 或未被采用的重复头。
description.en: Confirm from raw responses and browser navigation logs that an injected independent Location was honored; also exclude A normal open redirect, body links, proxy-followed URLs, or duplicate headers not honored by the client.

review.rationale: 原集合是 Location 响应头注入与重定向混合载荷，应归入 CRLF。

prerequisites.zh: 将裸主机名只导入获准的虚拟主机发现工具，限定目标 IP、TLS SNI、路径、速率和测试时间窗。
prerequisites.en: Import bare hostnames only into an approved virtual-host discovery tool, scoping target IP, TLS SNI, path, rate, and test window.

prerequisites.zh: 建立随机 Host、默认站点和已知测试 vhost 基线，采集证书、状态、标题、正文哈希和后端路由。
prerequisites.en: Establish random-Host, default-site, and known test-vhost baselines, collecting certificate, status, title, body hash, and backend route.

analysis.zh: 阳性工具发现是某个候选稳定路由到与默认/随机 Host 不同的真实虚拟主机，并由唯一 canary 或后端路由确认；敏感性需另行授权审查。DNS 名称存在、状态码不同、相同品牌错误页、TLS 失败、Host 被回显、缓存差异或只匹配字典词都不是虚拟主机漏洞。
analysis.en: Positive tool evidence is a candidate reproducibly routing to a real virtual host distinct from random and default Host controls, confirmed by a unique canary or backend route; sensitivity requires separate authorization review. DNS existence, a different status, same-brand error page, TLS failure, reflected Host, cache variance, or wordlist match alone is not a virtual-host flaw.

opsecTips.zh: 首次确认一个真实测试 vhost 后停止该命名分组，不枚举其路径或扩大基础设施字典。
opsecTips.en: Stop that naming group after confirming one real test vhost; do not enumerate its paths or expand the infrastructure wordlist.

opsecTips.zh: 删除扫描响应和字典缓存，清除速率状态/请求日志，撤销临时凭据并关闭发现工具任务。
opsecTips.en: Delete scan responses and wordlist caches, clear rate state and request logs, revoke temporary credentials, and close the discovery-tool job.

name.zh: Host 内部名称候选字典

description.zh: 整理环回、内部服务和基础设施名称，适合作为虚拟主机发现工具输入而非独立请求载荷。
description.en: Catalogs loopback, internal-service, and infrastructure names for virtual-host discovery tools rather than standalone request payloads.

overview.zh: 原内容仅是裸 Host 值，没有头名、目标路径或请求语义，应由支持 Host fuzzing 的工具在明确作用域内使用。本条按工具目录与配置审查边界审查；原命令应导入已指定的现有工具作为字典、规则或分析标签，不应脱离上下文直接向业务端点发送。
overview.en: The original content contains bare Host values without header names, paths, or request semantics and belongs in scoped Host-fuzzing tooling. This entry is reviewed as a tool-catalog and configuration-review boundary; Import the original command into the specified existing tools as a wordlist, rule, or analysis label rather than sending it directly to business endpoints.

vulnerability.zh: 字典命中只有在未知虚拟主机暴露不同且受限的应用时才形成安全问题。确认标准是人工确认候选响应属于独立虚拟主机并检查其认证与网络暴露边界；默认站点、统一 404、通配符虚拟主机或仅标题反射不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: A wordlist match becomes a security issue only when an unknown virtual host exposes a distinct restricted application. Confirmation requires Manually confirm that a candidate response belongs to a distinct virtual host and inspect its authentication and network-exposure boundary; Default sites, generic 404 pages, wildcard virtual hosts, or title reflection is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 在发现工具中记录合法 Host、随机 Host 与默认虚拟主机的响应指纹；2. 把原始名称目录导入 Host fuzzing 位置，设置低速率并保持目标 IP 与路径固定；3. 人工确认候选响应属于独立虚拟主机并检查其认证与网络暴露边界。默认站点、统一 404、通配符虚拟主机或仅标题反射应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record response fingerprints for the legitimate Host, a random Host, and the default virtual host in the discovery tool. 2. Import the original name catalog into the Host fuzzing position with a low rate and fixed target IP and path. 3. Manually confirm that a candidate response belongs to a distinct virtual host and inspect its authentication and network-exposure boundary. Treat Default sites, generic 404 pages, wildcard virtual hosts, or title reflection as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 入口拒绝未知 Host 并配置安全默认虚拟主机；2. 内部应用使用独立网络监听和强认证；3. 在资产清单与部署测试中持续检查未预期虚拟主机。
mitigation.en: 1. Reject unknown Host values at ingress and configure a safe default virtual host. 2. Place internal applications on separate network listeners with strong authentication. 3. Continuously check for unexpected virtual hosts in asset inventories and deployment tests.

title.zh: 建立虚拟主机发现字典基线
title.en: Establish the Virtual-Host Discovery Wordlist baseline

description.zh: 在发现工具中记录合法 Host、随机 Host 与默认虚拟主机的响应指纹，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Record response fingerprints for the legitimate Host, a random Host, and the default virtual host in the discovery tool, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行虚拟主机发现字典变体
title.en: Execute the Virtual-Host Discovery Wordlist variants

description.zh: 把原始名称目录导入 Host fuzzing 位置，设置低速率并保持目标 IP 与路径固定，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Import the original name catalog into the Host fuzzing position with a low rate and fixed target IP and path, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

title.zh: 核验Host 内部名称候选字典证据
title.en: Verify evidence for Internal Hostname Candidate Wordlist

description.zh: 人工确认候选响应属于独立虚拟主机并检查其认证与网络暴露边界；同时排除默认站点、统一 404、通配符虚拟主机或仅标题反射。
description.en: Manually confirm that a candidate response belongs to a distinct virtual host and inspect its authentication and network-exposure boundary; also exclude Default sites, generic 404 pages, wildcard virtual hosts, or title reflection.

review.rationale: 原命令是裸主机名字典，应迁移到现有 Web 枚举工具。

prerequisites.zh: 把参数名目录导入获准的 API 参数发现工具，明确 query、form、JSON 或 Header 位置及低速率范围。
prerequisites.en: Import the parameter-name catalog into an approved API parameter-discovery tool, specifying query, form, JSON, or header location and low-rate scope.

prerequisites.zh: 使用随机不存在参数与一个已知测试参数作对照，记录网关 schema、应用 handler 和响应/副作用差异。
prerequisites.en: Use a random nonexistent parameter and one known test parameter as controls, recording gateway schema, application handler, and response or side-effect differences.

analysis.zh: 阳性工具结果是候选被实际 parser/handler 消费并产生可关联的无害 canary 差异；HPP 结论还必须随后构造重复值并证明各层选值不同。名称出现在字典或响应、状态变化、未知参数被忽略、WAF 告警、前端字段存在或仅发现路由都不是参数污染。
analysis.en: Positive tool evidence is a candidate being consumed by a real parser or handler and producing a correlated harmless canary differential; an HPP conclusion additionally requires duplicate values and proof that tiers select differently. A name in the wordlist or response, status variance, ignored unknown parameter, WAF alert, client field, or route discovery alone is not parameter pollution.

opsecTips.zh: 确认一个参数被消费后停止该类别，不自动尝试 cmd、file、redirect 等高影响名称。
opsecTips.en: Stop that category after confirming one consumed parameter; do not automatically try high-impact names such as cmd, file, or redirect.

opsecTips.zh: 删除发现结果和测试值，清理网关缓存/速率日志，并撤销临时 API token 与工具任务。
opsecTips.en: Delete discovery results and test values, clear gateway caches and rate logs, and revoke temporary API tokens and tool jobs.

name.zh: HTTP 参数名审计字典

description.zh: 汇总身份、权限、跳转和执行相关参数名，用于参数发现与重复参数测试工具，不是完整 HPP 载荷。
description.en: Catalogs identity, privilege, redirect, and execution-related parameter names for discovery and duplicate-parameter tools, not complete HPP payloads.

subCategory.zh: 参数发现与 HPP 候选

overview.zh: 原集合只有参数名，没有重复值、分隔符、位置或解析顺序，因此无法单独证明 HTTP 参数污染。本条按工具目录与配置审查边界审查；原命令应导入已指定的现有工具作为字典、规则或分析标签，不应脱离上下文直接向业务端点发送。
overview.en: The original set contains names only, with no duplicate values, separators, locations, or parsing order, so it cannot independently demonstrate HTTP parameter pollution. This entry is reviewed as a tool-catalog and configuration-review boundary; Import the original command into the specified existing tools as a wordlist, rule, or analysis label rather than sending it directly to business endpoints.

vulnerability.zh: 风险来自网关与应用对同名参数采用不同首值、末值或数组规则，而不是参数名称本身。确认标准是确认代理、框架和业务处理器对同名参数取值不一致且造成授权或状态差异；未知参数被忽略、响应长度波动或参数名出现在前端脚本不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: Risk comes from gateways and applications applying different first, last, or array semantics to duplicate names, not from the names themselves. Confirmation requires Confirm inconsistent duplicate-parameter selection across proxy, framework, and business handler that causes authorization or state differences; Ignored unknown parameters, response-length variation, or parameter names found only in client scripts is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 在参数发现工具中记录不存在参数和已知无害参数对响应结构的影响；2. 导入原始参数名，先发现实际使用项，再由专用流程构造首值与末值不同的重复参数；3. 确认代理、框架和业务处理器对同名参数取值不一致且造成授权或状态差异。未知参数被忽略、响应长度波动或参数名出现在前端脚本应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record response behavior for a nonexistent parameter and a known harmless parameter in the discovery tool. 2. Import original parameter names, discover those actually consumed, then use a dedicated workflow to construct duplicates with different first and last values. 3. Confirm inconsistent duplicate-parameter selection across proxy, framework, and business handler that causes authorization or state differences. Treat Ignored unknown parameters, response-length variation, or parameter names found only in client scripts as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 为请求参数定义严格 schema 并拒绝未知或重复字段；2. 在所有层统一参数解析规则和字符解码顺序；3. 对身份、权限和跳转参数加入重复值负向测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Define strict request schemas and reject unknown or duplicate fields. 2. Use one parameter parsing and decoding policy across all layers. 3. Add duplicate-value negative tests for identity, privilege, and redirect parameters.

title.zh: 建立参数发现与 HPP 候选基线
title.en: Establish the Parameter Discovery and HPP Candidates baseline

description.zh: 在参数发现工具中记录不存在参数和已知无害参数对响应结构的影响，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Record response behavior for a nonexistent parameter and a known harmless parameter in the discovery tool, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行参数发现与 HPP 候选变体
title.en: Execute the Parameter Discovery and HPP Candidates variants

description.zh: 导入原始参数名，先发现实际使用项，再由专用流程构造首值与末值不同的重复参数，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Import original parameter names, discover those actually consumed, then use a dedicated workflow to construct duplicates with different first and last values, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

title.zh: 核验HTTP 参数名审计字典证据
title.en: Verify evidence for HTTP Parameter-Name Audit Wordlist

description.zh: 确认代理、框架和业务处理器对同名参数取值不一致且造成授权或状态差异；同时排除未知参数被忽略、响应长度波动或参数名出现在前端脚本。
description.en: Confirm inconsistent duplicate-parameter selection across proxy, framework, and business handler that causes authorization or state differences; also exclude Ignored unknown parameters, response-length variation, or parameter names found only in client scripts.

review.rationale: 原内容仅为参数名字典，应并入参数发现工具，再由专门载荷构造重复参数。

prerequisites.zh: 使用可观测测试 API，记录原始 JSON 字节及网关、schema validator、框架和业务层各自的重复键选值策略。
prerequisites.en: Use an observable test API and record raw JSON bytes and duplicate-key selection at gateway, schema validator, framework, and business layers.

prerequisites.zh: 为同一无害 canary 字段准备单键、同值重复、冲突先后顺序和严格拒绝对照，认证主体保持不变。
prerequisites.en: Prepare single-key, same-value duplicate, conflicting order, and strict-rejection controls for one harmless canary field while keeping the principal fixed.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求安全层验证一个值而业务层消费另一个冲突值，并因此改变 canary 或授权结果，逐层解析 trace 可证明差异。JSON 语法被接受、最后值获胜且所有层一致、返回 400、正文回显、日志只保留一个值、admin 文本出现但主体不变都不是可利用重复键污染。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires a security tier to validate one value while the business tier consumes the conflicting one and changes the canary or authorization result, proven by per-tier parsing traces. JSON acceptance, consistent last-value behavior across all tiers, HTTP 400, body reflection, one value in logs, or admin text without principal change is not exploitable duplicate-key pollution.

opsecTips.zh: 一个无害字段首次出现跨层选值差异后停止，不使用权限、命令或路径字段扩大影响。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one harmless field first shows cross-tier value selection; do not expand into privilege, command, or path fields.

opsecTips.zh: 回滚 canary，删除原始请求和解析 trace，清除 schema 缓存并恢复入口拒绝重复键或统一解析。
opsecTips.en: Roll back the canary, delete raw requests and parser traces, clear schema caches, and restore ingress rejection of duplicate keys or one consistent parser.

name.zh: JSON 重复键解析差异

description.zh: 使用同名 JSON 键的冲突值检查网关、校验器和业务解析器是否选择不同值并造成授权偏差。
description.en: Uses conflicting duplicate JSON keys to test whether gateways, validators, and business parsers choose different values and create authorization discrepancies.

overview.zh: 原集合已构造身份、权限、路径和命令相关重复键，关键是各层对首值、末值或拒绝策略是否一致。本条按参数解析差异审查；应记录原始字节及网关、schema 校验器和业务框架各自解析后的参数集合与顺序。
overview.en: The original set constructs duplicate identity, privilege, path, and command keys, focusing on first-value, last-value, or rejection consistency across layers. This entry is reviewed as a parameter-parsing differential; Record raw bytes and the parameter set and ordering parsed by gateway, schema validator, and business framework.

vulnerability.zh: 若安全校验检查第一个值而业务逻辑采用最后一个值，攻击者可能绕过 schema、权限或输入过滤。确认标准是证明安全层与业务层选择不同值，并由最终状态或授权结果体现可观察影响；解析器统一拒绝、仅日志保留双键或响应回显原始正文不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If security validation inspects the first value while business logic uses the last, an attacker may bypass schemas, authorization, or input filters. Confirmation requires Prove that the security and business layers select different values and that final state or authorization shows observable impact; Uniform parser rejection, duplicate keys preserved only in logs, or raw-body reflection is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 对单一合法键值和单一非法键值分别记录网关、应用与数据库接收结果；2. 逐项发送原始重复键 JSON，保持字段顺序可见并记录每层解析后的对象；3. 证明安全层与业务层选择不同值，并由最终状态或授权结果体现可观察影响。解析器统一拒绝、仅日志保留双键或响应回显原始正文应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record gateway, application, and database outcomes for one valid key value and one invalid key value. 2. Send original duplicate-key JSON items one at a time, preserving field order and recording the object parsed at each layer. 3. Prove that the security and business layers select different values and that final state or authorization shows observable impact. Treat Uniform parser rejection, duplicate keys preserved only in logs, or raw-body reflection as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 在入口严格拒绝任何 JSON 重复键；2. 网关、schema 校验和应用使用同一解析实现与配置；3. 对权限字段、路径字段和嵌套对象建立顺序差异回归测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Strictly reject every duplicate JSON key at ingress. 2. Use the same parser implementation and configuration across gateway, schema validation, and application. 3. Add order-differential regression tests for privilege fields, path fields, and nested objects.

title.zh: 建立JSON 参数污染基线
title.en: Establish the JSON Parameter Pollution baseline

description.zh: 对单一合法键值和单一非法键值分别记录网关、应用与数据库接收结果，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Record gateway, application, and database outcomes for one valid key value and one invalid key value, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行JSON 参数污染变体
title.en: Execute the JSON Parameter Pollution variants

description.zh: 逐项发送原始重复键 JSON，保持字段顺序可见并记录每层解析后的对象，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Send original duplicate-key JSON items one at a time, preserving field order and recording the object parsed at each layer, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

title.zh: 核验JSON 重复键解析差异证据
title.en: Verify evidence for JSON Duplicate-Key Parsing Differential

description.zh: 证明安全层与业务层选择不同值，并由最终状态或授权结果体现可观察影响；同时排除解析器统一拒绝、仅日志保留双键或响应回显原始正文。
description.en: Prove that the security and business layers select different values and that final state or authorization shows observable impact; also exclude Uniform parser rejection, duplicate keys preserved only in logs, or raw-body reflection.

review.rationale: 原命令是完整 JSON 重复键输入，应作为 API 参数污染载荷。

prerequisites.zh: 固定测试端点与无害参数 `mode`，在 CDN、代理、框架和业务层捕获原始查询、解码顺序和最终参数集合。
prerequisites.en: Fix a test endpoint and harmless mode parameter, capturing raw query, decode order, and final parameter set at CDN, proxy, framework, and business layers.

prerequisites.zh: 为每个编码分隔符配对普通单值、显式重复参数、非法编码和交换顺序请求，保持认证与路径不变。
prerequisites.en: Pair each encoded separator with a normal single value, explicit duplicate, invalid encoding, and reversed-order request while keeping authentication and path fixed.

analysis.zh: 阳性是某层先解码再分割而另一层把内容视为单值，导致安全校验与业务消费不同的 `mode` 并改变 canary。请求返回 200、参数值包含 `%26`、某层产生两个参数但所有安全/业务层一致、解析错误、日志展示解码值或响应长度不同均是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is one tier decoding then splitting while another treats the content as one value, causing security validation and business logic to consume different mode values and change the canary. HTTP 200, a value containing %26, two parameters with consistent behavior across all tiers, parse errors, decoded log display, or response-length variance is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 一个编码分隔符首次造成 canary 选值差异后停止，不迁移到身份、文件或命令参数。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one encoded separator first changes canary value selection; do not migrate to identity, file, or command parameters.

opsecTips.zh: 删除测试请求/trace，清除各层查询缓存并恢复单次规范化、分隔符白名单与统一重复参数策略。
opsecTips.en: Delete test requests and traces, clear query caches at every tier, and restore single normalization, separator allowlisting, and one duplicate-parameter policy.

name.zh: URL 编码重复参数污染

description.zh: 使用编码分隔符把第二个同名参数隐藏在值中，检查代理与后端解码后是否产生不同参数集合。
description.en: Uses encoded separators to hide a second same-name parameter in a value and tests whether proxies and backends derive different parameter sets after decoding.

overview.zh: 原始集合覆盖与号、分号、逗号、控制字符和多种保留字符编码，目标是发现分割与解码顺序差异。本条按参数解析差异审查；应记录原始字节及网关、schema 校验器和业务框架各自解析后的参数集合与顺序。
overview.en: The original set covers encoded ampersands, semicolons, commas, controls, and reserved characters to reveal split-versus-decode order differences. This entry is reviewed as a parameter-parsing differential; Record raw bytes and the parameter set and ordering parsed by gateway, schema validator, and business framework.

vulnerability.zh: 若安全层在解码前检查单一参数，而后端解码后拆成两个值，攻击者可能控制后端采用的最终参数。确认标准是确认后端生成额外参数或选择与安全层不同的值，并导致状态或权限变化；编码字符留在普通值中、统一 400、代理仅规范化日志或无状态差异不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If a security layer checks one parameter before decoding while the backend splits two values after decoding, an attacker may control the backend's final value. Confirmation requires Confirm that the backend creates an extra parameter or selects a value different from the security layer and causes a state or privilege change; Encoded characters remaining in a normal value, uniform 400 responses, log-only proxy normalization, or no state difference is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 分别发送 param=1、param=2 和显式重复参数，记录每层解析后的值与顺序；2. 逐项发送原始编码双参数形式，固定端点与内容类型并采集原始和解码后的查询；3. 确认后端生成额外参数或选择与安全层不同的值，并导致状态或权限变化。编码字符留在普通值中、统一 400、代理仅规范化日志或无状态差异应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Send param=1, param=2, and an explicit duplicate parameter and record parsed values and order at each layer. 2. Send original encoded duplicate forms one at a time with fixed endpoint and content type, capturing raw and decoded queries. 3. Confirm that the backend creates an extra parameter or selects a value different from the security layer and causes a state or privilege change. Treat Encoded characters remaining in a normal value, uniform 400 responses, log-only proxy normalization, or no state difference as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 在统一解码后按严格 schema 验证参数集合；2. 拒绝重复参数、控制字符和非预期分隔符；3. 让代理与应用共享同一查询解析规则并记录规范化结果。
mitigation.en: 1. Validate the parameter set against a strict schema after one canonical decoding pass. 2. Reject duplicate parameters, control characters, and unexpected separators. 3. Share one query parsing policy across proxy and application and log the normalized result.

title.zh: 建立分隔符解码差异基线
title.en: Establish the Separator Decoding Differential baseline

description.zh: 分别发送 param=1、param=2 和显式重复参数，记录每层解析后的值与顺序，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Send param=1, param=2, and an explicit duplicate parameter and record parsed values and order at each layer, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行分隔符解码差异变体
title.en: Execute the Separator Decoding Differential variants

description.zh: 逐项发送原始编码双参数形式，固定端点与内容类型并采集原始和解码后的查询，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Send original encoded duplicate forms one at a time with fixed endpoint and content type, capturing raw and decoded queries, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.
