prerequisites.zh: 记录边缘 cache key、源站看到的 Header、生成链接/重定向和第二客户端 HIT，逐个测试端口与控制字符。
prerequisites.en: Record edge cache key, origin-visible header, generated links or redirects, and second-client HIT, testing ports and control characters one at a time.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求 X-Forwarded-Host 改变源站可缓存表示中的绝对 URL/重定向，而 Header 未入 cache key，第二无 Header 客户端收到相同污染 canary。响应只回显 Header、首个客户端看到变化、第二次回源、缓存未共享、无害错误页、非法 Host 被拒绝或链接来自客户端脚本均是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires X-Forwarded-Host to change an absolute URL or redirect in a cacheable origin representation while remaining outside the cache key, with a second header-free client receiving the same poisoned canary. Header reflection, first-client-only changes, second origin fetch, unshared cache, harmless error pages, rejected invalid hosts, or client-script-generated links is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 第二客户端首次看到受控主机 canary 后停止，不注入真实重置链接、Cookie 或外部资源。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the second client first sees the controlled-host canary; do not inject real reset links, cookies, or external resources.

opsecTips.zh: Purge 唯一 cache key，删除接收日志和 fixture，清除两客户端数据并恢复入口剥离/缓存键覆盖。
opsecTips.en: Purge the unique cache key, delete recipient logs and fixtures, clear both clients' data, and restore ingress stripping or cache-key coverage.

name.zh: 未入缓存键的 X-Forwarded-Host 注入

description.zh: 检查 X-Forwarded-Host 是否影响生成的链接、重定向或资源地址，却未包含在共享缓存键中。
description.en: Tests whether X-Forwarded-Host affects generated links, redirects, or resource URLs while being excluded from the shared cache key.

overview.zh: 原集合包含端口、控制字符和路径穿越形式，目标是识别应用采用的规范化主机值及缓存键覆盖。本条按共享缓存与源站差异审查；应使用唯一缓存键、短期测试内容和两个隔离客户端，分别记录源站生成与共享缓存命中。
overview.en: The original set includes ports, controls, and traversal-like forms to identify normalized host consumption and cache-key coverage. This entry is reviewed as a shared-cache and origin differential; Use unique cache keys, short-lived test content, and two isolated clients while recording origin generation and shared-cache hits separately.

vulnerability.zh: 若源站把该头写入可缓存响应而 CDN 不按其分区，攻击者可让恶意主机内容被其他用户命中。确认标准是确认污染值由源站生成、被共享缓存存储并在无头请求中复现；仅当前响应反射、缓存 MISS、私人缓存或代理调试头显示值不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If the origin reflects this header into a cacheable response while the CDN does not vary on it, attacker-controlled host content may be served to others. Confirmation requires Confirm that the origin generates the poisoned value, shared cache stores it, and a header-free request reproduces it; Reflection only in the current response, cache misses, private caches, or values shown only in proxy debug headers is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 使用唯一缓存破坏参数比较无该头与合法头时的正文、Location 和缓存状态；2. 逐项发送原始 X-Forwarded-Host 值到无敏感内容的测试路由，并随后用干净客户端请求同一缓存键；3. 确认污染值由源站生成、被共享缓存存储并在无头请求中复现。仅当前响应反射、缓存 MISS、私人缓存或代理调试头显示值应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Use unique cache busters to compare body, Location, and cache status without the header and with a legitimate value. 2. Send original X-Forwarded-Host values one at a time to a nonsensitive test route, then request the same cache key from a clean client. 3. Confirm that the origin generates the poisoned value, shared cache stores it, and a header-free request reproduces it. Treat Reflection only in the current response, cache misses, private caches, or values shown only in proxy debug headers as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 在入口删除不受信 X-Forwarded-Host 并使用固定外部基址；2. 让所有影响响应的输入进入缓存键或使响应不可缓存；3. 对生成链接与重定向使用配置值并测试干净客户端命中。
mitigation.en: 1. Strip untrusted X-Forwarded-Host at ingress and use a fixed external base URL. 2. Include every response-affecting input in the cache key or mark the response uncacheable. 3. Use configured values for generated links and redirects and test clean-client cache hits.

title.zh: 建立Host 派生缓存投毒基线
title.en: Establish the Host-Derived Cache Poisoning baseline

description.zh: 使用唯一缓存破坏参数比较无该头与合法头时的正文、Location 和缓存状态，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Use unique cache busters to compare body, Location, and cache status without the header and with a legitimate value, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行Host 派生缓存投毒变体
title.en: Execute the Host-Derived Cache Poisoning variants

description.zh: 逐项发送原始 X-Forwarded-Host 值到无敏感内容的测试路由，并随后用干净客户端请求同一缓存键，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Send original X-Forwarded-Host values one at a time to a nonsensitive test route, then request the same cache key from a clean client, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

attackChain.payload:
X-Forwarded-Host: evil.com:443
X-Forwarded-Host: evil.com:8080
X-Forwarded-Host: evil.com%00
X-Forwarded-Host: evil.com%0d%0a
X-Forwarded-Host: evil.com/../../../etc/passwd
X-Forwarded-Host: evil.com/%2e%2e/%2e%2e/etc/passwd

title.zh: 核验未入缓存键的 X-Forwarded-Host 注入证据
title.en: Verify evidence for Unkeyed X-Forwarded-Host Injection

description.zh: 确认污染值由源站生成、被共享缓存存储并在无头请求中复现；同时排除仅当前响应反射、缓存 MISS、私人缓存或代理调试头显示值。
description.en: Confirm that the origin generates the poisoned value, shared cache stores it, and a header-free request reproduces it; also exclude Reflection only in the current response, cache misses, private caches, or values shown only in proxy debug headers.

review.rationale: 原头部集合用于未入键 Host 派生缓存投毒，应归入缓存安全。

prerequisites.zh: 在缓存测试区创建公开唯一 URL 和内部无敏感 canary 路由，确认 X-Original-URL 的实际消费组件。
prerequisites.en: Create a public unique URL and internal nonsensitive canary route in a cache test zone, identifying the component that actually consumes X-Original-URL.

prerequisites.zh: 由客户端 A 带 Header 预热、客户端 B 无 Header 获取，记录边缘 key、源站有效路径、生成 ID 和 HIT/MISS。
prerequisites.en: Prime with client A carrying the header and fetch with header-free client B, recording edge key, origin-effective path, generation ID, and HIT or MISS.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求源站因 X-Original-URL 返回内部 canary，而缓存仍以公开外层路径入键，随后无 Header 客户端命中同一内容。首请求返回内部页、Header 被源站忽略、第二请求回源、缓存按 Header/Vary 隔离、内部路径本就公开或只有错误模板被缓存都不是敏感缓存错配。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the origin to return the internal canary because of X-Original-URL while the cache keys only on the public outer path, followed by a header-free client hitting the same content. First-request internal output, ignored headers, second origin fetch, cache separation by header or Vary, an intentionally public internal path, or only cached error templates is not sensitive cache mismatch.

opsecTips.zh: 第二客户端首次读取内部 canary 后停止，不尝试真实 config、actuator 或管理路径。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the second client first reads the internal canary; do not try real config, actuator, or administration paths.

opsecTips.zh: Purge 测试 key，删除内部路由和客户端数据，清除缓存日志并恢复入口剥离 Header 与最终路径入键。
opsecTips.en: Purge the test key, delete internal routes and client data, clear cache logs, and restore ingress stripping and final-path cache-keying.

name.zh: X-Original-URL 缓存键混淆

description.zh: 检查源站是否按 X-Original-URL 返回内部或调试内容，而 CDN 仍按公开请求路径共享缓存。
description.en: Tests whether the origin serves internal or debug content from X-Original-URL while the CDN shares cache by the public request path.

overview.zh: 原始集合指向 internal、config、debug、actuator 和 phpinfo 等敏感路径，目标是验证重写路径是否进入缓存键。本条按共享缓存与源站差异审查；应使用唯一缓存键、短期测试内容和两个隔离客户端，分别记录源站生成与共享缓存命中。
overview.en: The original set targets internal, config, debug, actuator, and phpinfo paths to test whether rewrite paths participate in the cache key. This entry is reviewed as a shared-cache and origin differential; Use unique cache keys, short-lived test content, and two isolated clients while recording origin generation and shared-cache hits separately.

vulnerability.zh: 若 CDN 忽略该头而源站采用它选路，内部响应可能污染公开 URL 的共享缓存。确认标准是确认内部端点内容在无该头的独立请求中以共享缓存 HIT 返回；仅当前请求内部路由、缓存 MISS、私有缓存或统一错误页不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If the CDN ignores this header while the origin uses it for routing, an internal response may poison the shared cache for a public URL. Confirmation requires Confirm that internal-endpoint content returns as a shared-cache hit to an independent request without the header; Internal routing only for the current request, cache misses, private caching, or generic error pages is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 使用唯一公开测试路径记录无头请求的源站路由、缓存键和响应哈希；2. 逐项发送原始 X-Original-URL 值，仅指向测试环境的无害内部端点，再由干净客户端重取公开路径；3. 确认内部端点内容在无该头的独立请求中以共享缓存 HIT 返回。仅当前请求内部路由、缓存 MISS、私有缓存或统一错误页应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record origin route, cache key, and response hash for a unique public test path without the header. 2. Send original X-Original-URL values one at a time to harmless internal test endpoints, then re-request the public path from a clean client. 3. Confirm that internal-endpoint content returns as a shared-cache hit to an independent request without the header. Treat Internal routing only for the current request, cache misses, private caching, or generic error pages as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 入口删除客户端提供的 X-Original-URL；2. 将最终路由纳入缓存键或让内部响应不可缓存；3. 对调试和管理端点执行独立认证与网络隔离。
mitigation.en: 1. Strip client-supplied X-Original-URL at ingress. 2. Include the final route in the cache key or make internal responses uncacheable. 3. Apply independent authentication and network isolation to debug and administrative endpoints.

title.zh: 建立内部路径未入缓存键基线
title.en: Establish the Unkeyed Internal Path baseline

description.zh: 使用唯一公开测试路径记录无头请求的源站路由、缓存键和响应哈希，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Record origin route, cache key, and response hash for a unique public test path without the header, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行内部路径未入缓存键变体
title.en: Execute the Unkeyed Internal Path variants

description.zh: 逐项发送原始 X-Original-URL 值，仅指向测试环境的无害内部端点，再由干净客户端重取公开路径，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Send original X-Original-URL values one at a time to harmless internal test endpoints, then re-request the public path from a clean client, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

attackChain.payload:
X-Original-URL: /internal
X-Original-URL: /api/config
X-Original-URL: /debug
X-Original-URL: /actuator/env
X-Original-URL: /console
X-Original-URL: /phpinfo.php
X-Original-URL: /server-status
X-Original-URL: /server-info
X-Original-URL: /wp-admin
X-Original-URL: /manager/html
X-Original-URL: /jmx-console
X-Original-URL: /web-console
X-Original-URL: /invoker/JMXInvokerServlet

title.zh: 核验X-Original-URL 缓存键混淆证据
title.en: Verify evidence for X-Original-URL Cache-Key Confusion

description.zh: 确认内部端点内容在无该头的独立请求中以共享缓存 HIT 返回；同时排除仅当前请求内部路由、缓存 MISS、私有缓存或统一错误页。
description.en: Confirm that internal-endpoint content returns as a shared-cache hit to an independent request without the header; also exclude Internal routing only for the current request, cache misses, private caching, or generic error pages.

review.rationale: 原头部值是内部路径缓存投毒载荷。

prerequisites.zh: 确认代理栈中只有哪一层识别 X-Rewrite-URL，并为公开 cache key 与受限测试路由设置不同 canary。
prerequisites.en: Identify the sole proxy tier recognizing X-Rewrite-URL and configure distinct canaries for the public cache key and restricted test route.

prerequisites.zh: 使用两个无共享 Cookie 的客户端按投毒/读取顺序请求，采集 Header 传递、后端 route ID、Age 与生成次数。
prerequisites.en: Use two clients without shared cookies in poison and read order, collecting header propagation, backend route ID, Age, and generation count.

analysis.zh: 阳性是 X-Rewrite-URL 让源站选择受限 canary，但 CDN 存储在公开 URL key 下并向第二普通客户端返回。Header 仅改变应用日志、首客户端看到内部内容、第二客户端 MISS、响应标记 private/no-store、缓存键含重写值、404 或不同节点各自生成都属于假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is X-Rewrite-URL making the origin select the restricted canary while the CDN stores it under the public URL key and returns it to a second normal client. A log-only change, first-client internal content, second-client MISS, private or no-store response, a key containing the rewrite value, HTTP 404, or separate generation by different nodes is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 公共 key 首次向第二客户端泄露测试 canary 后停止，不迁移到调试或环境配置端点。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the public key first exposes the test canary to the second client; do not move to debug or environment-configuration endpoints.

opsecTips.zh: Purge 相关 key，删除受限 fixture 和客户端会话，清理 CDN/源站 trace，并禁用外部重写 Header。
opsecTips.en: Purge related keys, delete restricted fixtures and client sessions, clear CDN and origin traces, and disable external rewrite headers.

name.zh: X-Rewrite-URL 缓存路由投毒

description.zh: 验证 X-Rewrite-URL 是否改变后端资源选择但不改变边缘缓存键，从而把受限响应存到公开键。
description.en: Tests whether X-Rewrite-URL changes backend resource selection without changing the edge cache key and stores restricted content under a public key.

overview.zh: 该集合与 X-Original-URL 条目相似但针对另一代理约定，必须单独确认具体组件是否消费该头。本条按共享缓存与源站差异审查；应使用唯一缓存键、短期测试内容和两个隔离客户端，分别记录源站生成与共享缓存命中。
overview.en: This set resembles X-Original-URL testing but targets a different proxy convention and must confirm which component consumes the header. This entry is reviewed as a shared-cache and origin differential; Use unique cache keys, short-lived test content, and two isolated clients while recording origin generation and shared-cache hits separately.

vulnerability.zh: 源站若采用未清洗重写头而缓存层忽略它，会造成公开路径与后端敏感路由之间的键值错配。确认标准是证明后端采用重写路由且其内容被边缘存入未包含该头的缓存键；代理删除头、源站返回同一公开内容或二次请求回源而非命中不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If the origin consumes an unsanitized rewrite header while the cache ignores it, public paths and sensitive backend routes may share one cache key. Confirmation requires Prove that the backend adopts the rewrite route and the edge stores its content under a key excluding the header; Proxy stripping, identical public content from origin, or the second request returning to origin rather than hitting cache is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 在无重写头时记录公开测试 URL 的后端处理器、缓存状态与正文指纹；2. 逐项应用原始 X-Rewrite-URL 值到无害测试路由，并使用独立客户端检查公开 URL；3. 证明后端采用重写路由且其内容被边缘存入未包含该头的缓存键。代理删除头、源站返回同一公开内容或二次请求回源而非命中应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record backend handler, cache state, and body fingerprint for a public test URL without rewrite headers. 2. Apply original X-Rewrite-URL values one at a time to harmless test routes and inspect the public URL from an independent client. 3. Prove that the backend adopts the rewrite route and the edge stores its content under a key excluding the header. Treat Proxy stripping, identical public content from origin, or the second request returning to origin rather than hitting cache as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 拒绝来自外部连接的内部重写头；2. 缓存决策使用规范化后的最终路由和身份属性；3. 跨代理升级持续测试内部头消费与缓存键。
mitigation.en: 1. Reject internal rewrite headers from external connections. 2. Base caching decisions on the normalized final route and identity attributes. 3. Continuously test internal-header consumption and cache keys across proxy upgrades.

title.zh: 建立重写路由缓存错配基线
title.en: Establish the Rewrite-Route Cache Mismatch baseline

description.zh: 在无重写头时记录公开测试 URL 的后端处理器、缓存状态与正文指纹，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Record backend handler, cache state, and body fingerprint for a public test URL without rewrite headers, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行重写路由缓存错配变体
title.en: Execute the Rewrite-Route Cache Mismatch variants

description.zh: 逐项应用原始 X-Rewrite-URL 值到无害测试路由，并使用独立客户端检查公开 URL，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Apply original X-Rewrite-URL values one at a time to harmless test routes and inspect the public URL from an independent client, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

attackChain.payload:
X-Rewrite-URL: /internal
X-Rewrite-URL: /api/config
X-Rewrite-URL: /debug
X-Rewrite-URL: /actuator/env
X-Rewrite-URL: /console
X-Rewrite-URL: /phpinfo.php
X-Rewrite-URL: /server-status

title.zh: 核验X-Rewrite-URL 缓存路由投毒证据
title.en: Verify evidence for X-Rewrite-URL Cache Routing Poisoning

description.zh: 证明后端采用重写路由且其内容被边缘存入未包含该头的缓存键；同时排除代理删除头、源站返回同一公开内容或二次请求回源而非命中。
description.en: Prove that the backend adopts the rewrite route and the edge stores its content under a key excluding the header; also exclude Proxy stripping, identical public content from origin, or the second request returning to origin rather than hitting cache.

review.rationale: 原集合用于 X-Rewrite-URL 导致的缓存路由错配。

prerequisites.zh: 在测试域固定 TLS、真实协议和共享缓存 key，使用只生成无敏感绝对链接/重定向 canary 的源站页面。
prerequisites.en: Pin TLS, real scheme, and shared cache key on a test domain, using an origin page that generates only nonsensitive absolute-link or redirect canaries.

prerequisites.zh: 逐个发送 scheme/proto 变体，记录入口覆盖、应用派生 scheme、cache key 和第二客户端无 Header 响应。
prerequisites.en: Send scheme and proto variants individually, recording ingress overwrite, application-derived scheme, cache key, and second-client header-free response.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求伪造 scheme Header 改变可缓存表示中的绝对链接或安全分支，且该 Header 未入 key，使第二客户端收到相同危险 scheme canary。首响应变化、Header 被回显、浏览器拒绝 javascript/data/gopher、缓存 MISS、页面 no-store、链接由客户端 location 生成或代理正确覆盖均是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires a forged scheme header to alter an absolute link or security branch in a cacheable representation while remaining outside the key, so a second client receives the same dangerous-scheme canary. First-response changes, header reflection, browser rejection of javascript, data, or gopher, cache MISS, no-store pages, client-location-generated links, or correct proxy overwrite is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 第二客户端首次看到受控非预期 scheme canary 后停止，不生成真实密码重置或外部导航链接。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the second client first sees the controlled unexpected-scheme canary; do not generate real reset or external-navigation links.

opsecTips.zh: Purge key，删除页面 fixture 与浏览器数据，清理派生 Header trace，并恢复可信代理 scheme 覆盖和安全生成。
opsecTips.en: Purge keys, delete page fixtures and browser data, clear derived-header traces, and restore trusted-proxy scheme overwrite and safe generation.

name.zh: X-Forwarded-Proto/Scheme 缓存投毒

description.zh: 检查伪造协议头是否影响绝对链接、重定向或安全分支，却未进入共享缓存键。
description.en: Tests whether forged scheme headers affect absolute links, redirects, or security branches while remaining outside the shared cache key.

overview.zh: 原始集合包含 nothttps、javascript、data、gopher 等值，重点是代理是否清洗以及应用如何生成外部 URL。本条按共享缓存与源站差异审查；应使用唯一缓存键、短期测试内容和两个隔离客户端，分别记录源站生成与共享缓存命中。
overview.en: The original set includes nothttps, javascript, data, and gopher values, focusing on proxy sanitization and application generation of external URLs. This entry is reviewed as a shared-cache and origin differential; Use unique cache keys, short-lived test content, and two isolated clients while recording origin generation and shared-cache hits separately.

vulnerability.zh: 若应用信任外部协议头并把派生 URL 写入可缓存响应，攻击者可污染后续用户获得的链接或重定向。确认标准是确认伪造协议改变源站输出并经共享缓存持续返回给干净客户端；当前响应变化但未缓存、代理标准化为 https 或浏览器拒绝无效协议不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If an application trusts external scheme headers and writes derived URLs into a cacheable response, an attacker may poison links or redirects served to later users. Confirmation requires Confirm that the forged scheme changes origin output and persists through shared cache to a clean client; Current-response changes without caching, proxy normalization to https, or browser rejection of invalid schemes is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 以正常 HTTPS 请求记录绝对链接、Location、安全 Cookie 与缓存状态；2. 逐项发送原始 scheme/proto 值到无害页面，再用不带头的干净客户端请求同一键；3. 确认伪造协议改变源站输出并经共享缓存持续返回给干净客户端。当前响应变化但未缓存、代理标准化为 https 或浏览器拒绝无效协议应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record absolute links, Location, secure-cookie attributes, and cache state for a normal HTTPS request. 2. Send original scheme or proto values one at a time to a harmless page, then request the same key from a clean client without the header. 3. Confirm that the forged scheme changes origin output and persists through shared cache to a clean client. Treat Current-response changes without caching, proxy normalization to https, or browser rejection of invalid schemes as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 入口删除外部 Forwarded-Proto/Scheme 并按 TLS 连接重建；2. 生成链接使用固定公开基址而非请求头；3. 将影响表示的协议纳入缓存键或使响应不可共享。
mitigation.en: 1. Strip external forwarded scheme headers and rebuild them from the TLS connection. 2. Generate links from a configured public base URL rather than request headers. 3. Include representation-affecting scheme data in the cache key or make the response unshareable.

title.zh: 建立派生协议未入缓存键基线
title.en: Establish the Unkeyed Derived Scheme baseline

description.zh: 以正常 HTTPS 请求记录绝对链接、Location、安全 Cookie 与缓存状态，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Record absolute links, Location, secure-cookie attributes, and cache state for a normal HTTPS request, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行派生协议未入缓存键变体
title.en: Execute the Unkeyed Derived Scheme variants

description.zh: 逐项发送原始 scheme/proto 值到无害页面，再用不带头的干净客户端请求同一键，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Send original scheme or proto values one at a time to a harmless page, then request the same key from a clean client without the header, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

attackChain.payload:
X-Forwarded-Scheme: nothttps
X-Forwarded-Scheme: javascript
X-Forwarded-Scheme: data
X-Forwarded-Proto: nothttps
X-Forwarded-Proto: javascript
X-Forwarded-Proto: gopher
X-Forwarded-Protocol: nothttps

title.zh: 核验X-Forwarded-Proto/Scheme 缓存投毒证据
title.en: Verify evidence for X-Forwarded-Proto and Scheme Cache Poisoning

description.zh: 确认伪造协议改变源站输出并经共享缓存持续返回给干净客户端；同时排除当前响应变化但未缓存、代理标准化为 https 或浏览器拒绝无效协议。
description.en: Confirm that the forged scheme changes origin output and persists through shared cache to a clean client; also exclude Current-response changes without caching, proxy normalization to https, or browser rejection of invalid schemes.

review.rationale: 原头部值属于协议派生缓存投毒测试。

prerequisites.zh: 在 CDN 测试区使用唯一 key、短时效 canary 和两个客户端，记录源站响应 Cache-Control 与各层实际 TTL。
prerequisites.en: Use a unique key, short-lived canary, and two clients in a CDN test zone, recording origin response Cache-Control and effective TTL at each tier.

prerequisites.zh: 区分请求可用与仅响应可用 directive，逐项测试冲突/极值组合，并采集 Age、生成 ID、HIT/MISS 和失效事件。
prerequisites.en: Distinguish request-applicable from response-only directives, test conflict and extreme combinations individually, and collect Age, generation ID, HIT or MISS, and invalidation events.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求客户端请求 directive 非预期改变共享缓存资格或寿命，使本应不共享/已更新的 canary 被另一客户端持续命中，且源站未重新生成。Header 被接受、Age 存在、浏览器本地缓存、公共资源 HIT、请求 no-cache 触发回源、响应 directive 优先或只改变性能都不是缓存安全缺陷。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires a client request directive to unexpectedly change shared-cache eligibility or lifetime so another client continues hitting a canary that should be private or updated, without origin regeneration. Header acceptance, an Age value, browser-local cache, HIT on public assets, request no-cache causing revalidation, response directives taking precedence, or performance-only changes is not a cache-security flaw.

opsecTips.zh: 确认一个错误共享或过期 canary 后停止，不使用长达语料极值的真实缓存时间。
opsecTips.en: Stop after confirming one incorrectly shared or stale canary; do not apply the corpus's extreme lifetime to real cache entries.

opsecTips.zh: Purge 唯一 key，删除 canary 与客户端缓存，清除 CDN trace，并恢复仅信任响应策略和 TTL 上限。
opsecTips.en: Purge the unique key, delete the canary and client caches, clear CDN traces, and restore response-policy authority and TTL caps.

name.zh: Cache-Control 请求指令操纵

description.zh: 使用冲突、极大寿命和非标准 Cache-Control 组合检查 CDN 与源站是否错误改变共享缓存行为。
description.en: Uses conflicting, extreme-lifetime, and nonstandard Cache-Control combinations to test incorrect shared-cache behavior across CDN and origin.

overview.zh: 原集合混合请求可用和响应专用指令，测试要记录每层实际采纳的指令而不是假设头值生效。本条按共享缓存与源站差异审查；应使用唯一缓存键、短期测试内容和两个隔离客户端，分别记录源站生成与共享缓存命中。
overview.en: The original set mixes request-applicable and response-only directives, so testing records what each tier actually honors rather than assuming effects. This entry is reviewed as a shared-cache and origin differential; Use unique cache keys, short-lived test content, and two isolated clients while recording origin generation and shared-cache hits separately.

vulnerability.zh: 若攻击者请求头可强制缓存私人响应、延长错误内容寿命或绕过重新验证，可能导致信息泄露或持久污染。确认标准是确认请求指令改变共享缓存的存储、寿命或验证决策，并由第二客户端复现；响应头回显请求值、浏览器私有缓存变化或 Age 不代表共享内容不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If attacker request headers can force caching of private responses, extend error lifetimes, or bypass revalidation, information leakage or persistent poisoning may result. Confirmation requires Confirm that a request directive changes shared-cache storage, lifetime, or validation decisions and is reproduced by a second client; Response reflection of request values, private browser-cache changes, or Age unrelated to shared content is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 记录无 Cache-Control 请求时的响应缓存策略、Age、ETag 和重新验证行为；2. 逐项发送原始 Cache-Control 组合到测试资源，并在每次前使用唯一缓存键；3. 确认请求指令改变共享缓存的存储、寿命或验证决策，并由第二客户端复现。响应头回显请求值、浏览器私有缓存变化或 Age 不代表共享内容应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record response cache policy, Age, ETag, and revalidation behavior without a Cache-Control request header. 2. Send original Cache-Control combinations one at a time to a test resource with a unique cache key for each run. 3. Confirm that a request directive changes shared-cache storage, lifetime, or validation decisions and is reproduced by a second client. Treat Response reflection of request values, private browser-cache changes, or Age unrelated to shared content as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 由源站响应策略决定敏感资源缓存资格；2. 在 CDN 明确忽略不受信请求中的响应专用指令；3. 对冲突指令、错误响应和认证内容做双客户端测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Let origin response policy determine cache eligibility for sensitive resources. 2. Explicitly ignore response-only directives supplied in untrusted requests at the CDN. 3. Run two-client tests for conflicting directives, error responses, and authenticated content.

title.zh: 建立缓存资格与寿命差异基线
title.en: Establish the Cache Eligibility and Lifetime Differential baseline

description.zh: 记录无 Cache-Control 请求时的响应缓存策略、Age、ETag 和重新验证行为，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Record response cache policy, Age, ETag, and revalidation behavior without a Cache-Control request header, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行缓存资格与寿命差异变体
title.en: Execute the Cache Eligibility and Lifetime Differential variants

description.zh: 逐项发送原始 Cache-Control 组合到测试资源，并在每次前使用唯一缓存键，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Send original Cache-Control combinations one at a time to a test resource with a unique cache key for each run, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

attackChain.payload:
Cache-Control: no-store
Cache-Control: no-cache
Cache-Control: max-age=0
Cache-Control: max-age=999999
Cache-Control: public, max-age=999999
Cache-Control: s-maxage=999999
Cache-Control: public, s-maxage=999999, max-age=999999
Cache-Control: immutable
Cache-Control: public, immutable
Pragma: no-cache
Pragma: public
Expires: Thu, 01 Jan 2099 00:00:00 GMT
Expires: 0
Surrogate-Control: max-age=999999
CDN-Cache-Control: max-age=999999
Cloudflare-CDN-Cache-Control: max-age=999999

title.zh: 核验Cache-Control 请求指令操纵证据
title.en: Verify evidence for Cache-Control Request-Directive Manipulation

description.zh: 确认请求指令改变共享缓存的存储、寿命或验证决策，并由第二客户端复现；同时排除响应头回显请求值、浏览器私有缓存变化或 Age 不代表共享内容。
description.en: Confirm that a request directive changes shared-cache storage, lifetime, or validation decisions and is reproduced by a second client; also exclude Response reflection of request values, private browser-cache changes, or Age unrelated to shared content.

review.rationale: 原命令是缓存指令操纵请求，可作为缓存行为载荷保留。

prerequisites.zh: 采集真实源站响应与 CDN 配置中的完整 Vary，而不是把目录值作为请求 Header 发送。
prerequisites.en: Collect complete Vary values from actual origin responses and CDN configuration rather than sending catalog values as request headers.

prerequisites.zh: 为每个声明/未声明维度生成两个不同但可预测的表示，使用唯一 URL key 记录缓存对象和第二客户端响应。
prerequisites.en: Generate two different predictable representations for each declared or undeclared dimension, using a unique URL key to record cache objects and second-client responses.

analysis.zh: 阳性工具发现是源站表示确实随某请求 Header 变化，而 Vary/cache key 未覆盖该维度，导致第二客户端收到第一表示，或 Vary:* 被错误缓存。目录中含某行、Header 字符串可解析、响应总有 Vary、两个客户端内容不同但都回源、公开内容共享或客户端本地缓存均不是错配。
analysis.en: Positive tool evidence is an origin representation truly varying by a request header while Vary or the cache key omits that dimension, causing a second client to receive the first representation, or Vary:* being cached incorrectly. A catalog line, parsable header text, any Vary response, differing client content with both reaching origin, public-content sharing, or browser-local cache is not mismatch.

opsecTips.zh: 一个表示维度首次发生跨客户端错配后停止，不测试 Cookie 中真实身份或敏感语言内容。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one representation dimension first mismatches across clients; do not test real identity cookies or sensitive localized content.

opsecTips.zh: Purge 测试 key，删除表示 fixture/响应捕获，清理 CDN 缓存并恢复完整 Vary 与 key 配置。
opsecTips.en: Purge test keys, delete representation fixtures and response captures, clear CDN caches, and restore complete Vary and key configuration.

name.zh: Vary 缓存键配置审查表

description.zh: 整理常见 Vary 值用于审查响应配置与缓存键覆盖；这些响应头文本不是可直接发送的攻击载荷。
description.en: Catalogs common Vary values for reviewing response configuration and cache-key coverage; these response-header strings are not directly sendable attack payloads.

overview.zh: 原集合是 Vary 响应头候选，正确用途是对照源站实际响应、CDN 配置和表示差异检查缓存分区。本条按工具目录与配置审查边界审查；原命令应导入已指定的现有工具作为字典、规则或分析标签，不应脱离上下文直接向业务端点发送。
overview.en: The original set contains Vary response-header candidates for comparing actual origin responses, CDN configuration, and representation differences. This entry is reviewed as a tool-catalog and configuration-review boundary; Import the original command into the specified existing tools as a wordlist, rule, or analysis label rather than sending it directly to business endpoints.

vulnerability.zh: 缺失必要 Vary 会混淆不同表示，过宽或 Vary:* 又可能造成缓存失效与资源消耗，但文本本身不是漏洞。确认标准是通过两个请求维度证明表示不同却共享键，或表示相同却被不必要拆分；单次响应出现 Vary、浏览器缓存行为或 CDN 文档中的示例配置不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: Missing required Vary can mix representations, while overly broad values or Vary:* can disable caching and consume resources, but the text itself is not a vulnerability. Confirmation requires Use two request dimensions to prove that different representations share a key or identical representations are unnecessarily split; A Vary value in one response, browser-cache behavior, or example configuration in CDN documentation is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 采集同一资源在语言、编码、身份和设备条件下的实际 Vary 与缓存键；2. 把原始 Vary 目录导入缓存配置审查工具，对照每个响应差异是否已入键；3. 通过两个请求维度证明表示不同却共享键，或表示相同却被不必要拆分。单次响应出现 Vary、浏览器缓存行为或 CDN 文档中的示例配置应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Collect actual Vary values and cache keys for one resource across language, encoding, identity, and device conditions. 2. Import the original Vary catalog into a cache-configuration review tool and compare every response difference with key coverage. 3. Use two request dimensions to prove that different representations share a key or identical representations are unnecessarily split. Treat A Vary value in one response, browser-cache behavior, or example configuration in CDN documentation as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 仅对真实影响表示的请求头发送精确 Vary；2. 确保 CDN 缓存键与源站 Vary 语义一致；3. 监控高基数维度和 Vary:* 导致的命中率与资源影响。
mitigation.en: 1. Send precise Vary values only for request headers that truly affect representation. 2. Keep CDN cache keys aligned with origin Vary semantics. 3. Monitor hit rate and resource impact from high-cardinality dimensions and Vary:*.

title.zh: 建立响应协商维度基线
title.en: Establish the Response Negotiation Dimensions baseline

description.zh: 采集同一资源在语言、编码、身份和设备条件下的实际 Vary 与缓存键，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Collect actual Vary values and cache keys for one resource across language, encoding, identity, and device conditions, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行响应协商维度变体
title.en: Execute the Response Negotiation Dimensions variants

description.zh: 把原始 Vary 目录导入缓存配置审查工具，对照每个响应差异是否已入键，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Import the original Vary catalog into a cache-configuration review tool and compare every response difference with key coverage, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

attackChain.payload:
Vary: X-Forwarded-Host
Vary: X-Original-URL
Vary: X-Rewrite-URL
Vary: User-Agent
Vary: Accept
Vary: Accept-Encoding
Vary: Accept-Language
Vary: Cookie
Vary: *
Vary: X-Custom-Header

title.zh: 核验Vary 缓存键配置审查表证据
title.en: Verify evidence for Vary Cache-Key Configuration Review Catalog

description.zh: 通过两个请求维度证明表示不同却共享键，或表示相同却被不必要拆分；同时排除单次响应出现 Vary、浏览器缓存行为或 CDN 文档中的示例配置。
description.en: Use two request dimensions to prove that different representations share a key or identical representations are unnecessarily split; also exclude A Vary value in one response, browser-cache behavior, or example configuration in CDN documentation.

review.rationale: 原内容是响应配置值目录，应并入缓存和响应头审查工具。

prerequisites.zh: 在 Akamai 测试 property 中确认哪些 Header 应由边缘生成/覆盖，源站只输出无敏感地区或会话 canary。
prerequisites.en: In an Akamai test property, identify headers that should be edge-generated or overwritten, with the origin emitting only nonsensitive geography or session canaries.

prerequisites.zh: 用两个客户端和唯一 cache key 记录外部 Header、边缘转发值、源站变体与缓存命中，逐个测试。
prerequisites.en: Use two clients and a unique cache key to record external headers, edge-forwarded values, origin variants, and cache hits, testing one at a time.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求客户端伪造的 Akamai 内部 Header 未被边缘覆盖，改变源站可缓存 canary，且未入 cache key 导致第二客户端继承。源站日志出现 Header、边缘正确重写、只影响不可缓存请求、第二次回源、X-True-Client-IP 仅用于日志或响应相同都不是缓存投毒。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires a client-forged Akamai internal header to survive edge overwrite, alter a cacheable origin canary, and remain outside the cache key so a second client inherits it. Header appearance in origin logs, correct edge rewrite, impact only on uncacheable requests, second origin fetch, X-True-Client-IP used only for logging, or identical responses is not cache poisoning.

opsecTips.zh: 第二客户端首次看到伪造属性 canary 后停止，不使用真实会话、地理限制或内部用户数据。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the second client first sees the forged-attribute canary; do not use real sessions, geographic restrictions, or internal user data.

opsecTips.zh: Purge key，删除 property fixture 和 trace，清理客户端缓存并恢复边缘剥离/重建内部 Header。
opsecTips.en: Purge keys, delete property fixtures and traces, clear client caches, and restore edge stripping and reconstruction of internal headers.

name.zh: Akamai 边缘头信任缓存投毒

description.zh: 检查外部请求是否能注入 Akamai 内部会话、EdgeScape 或真实客户端 IP 头并影响可缓存响应。
description.en: Tests whether external requests can inject Akamai session, EdgeScape, or true-client-IP headers and affect cacheable responses.

overview.zh: 原集合针对 Akamai 约定头，重点是入口是否覆盖客户端值以及源站是否据此定制内容。本条按共享缓存与源站差异审查；应使用唯一缓存键、短期测试内容和两个隔离客户端，分别记录源站生成与共享缓存命中。
overview.en: The original set targets Akamai convention headers, focusing on ingress overwrites and whether the origin customizes content from them. This entry is reviewed as a shared-cache and origin differential; Use unique cache keys, short-lived test content, and two isolated clients while recording origin generation and shared-cache hits separately.

vulnerability.zh: 若客户端可控制内部边缘头且其值不在缓存键中，地理、身份或调试响应可能被共享污染。确认标准是确认客户端值到达源站、改变表示并被共享缓存保存；边缘删除值、仅日志变化、源站内容不变或二次请求 MISS不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If clients control internal edge headers excluded from the cache key, geographic, identity, or debug responses may be shared incorrectly. Confirmation requires Confirm that client values reach the origin, alter the representation, and are stored by shared cache; Edge stripping, log-only changes, unchanged origin content, or a miss on the second request is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 记录正常边缘请求中的真实内部头、源站响应和唯一缓存键；2. 逐项发送原始 Akamai 头值到无害测试页，并由干净客户端检查同一缓存键；3. 确认客户端值到达源站、改变表示并被共享缓存保存。边缘删除值、仅日志变化、源站内容不变或二次请求 MISS应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record genuine internal headers, origin response, and a unique cache key for a normal edge request. 2. Send original Akamai header values one at a time to a harmless test page and inspect the same cache key from a clean client. 3. Confirm that client values reach the origin, alter the representation, and are stored by shared cache. Treat Edge stripping, log-only changes, unchanged origin content, or a miss on the second request as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 在 Akamai 边缘删除并重建所有内部约定头；2. 避免用客户端 IP 或地理头授予权限；3. 将确实影响表示的受信维度纳入缓存键。
mitigation.en: 1. Strip and rebuild all internal convention headers at the Akamai edge. 2. Avoid granting privileges from client IP or geolocation headers. 3. Include trusted dimensions that affect representation in the cache key.

title.zh: 建立Akamai 内部头伪造基线
title.en: Establish the Akamai Internal-Header Spoofing baseline

description.zh: 记录正常边缘请求中的真实内部头、源站响应和唯一缓存键，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Record genuine internal headers, origin response, and a unique cache key for a normal edge request, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行Akamai 内部头伪造变体
title.en: Execute the Akamai Internal-Header Spoofing variants

description.zh: 逐项发送原始 Akamai 头值到无害测试页，并由干净客户端检查同一缓存键，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Send original Akamai header values one at a time to a harmless test page and inspect the same cache key from a clean client, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

attackChain.payload:
X-Akamai-Session-Info: evil
X-Akamai-Edgescape: evil
X-True-Client-IP: 127.0.0.1

title.zh: 核验Akamai 边缘头信任缓存投毒证据
title.en: Verify evidence for Akamai Edge-Header Trust Cache Poisoning

description.zh: 确认客户端值到达源站、改变表示并被共享缓存保存；同时排除边缘删除值、仅日志变化、源站内容不变或二次请求 MISS。
description.en: Confirm that client values reach the origin, alter the representation, and are stored by shared cache; also exclude Edge stripping, log-only changes, unchanged origin content, or a miss on the second request.

review.rationale: 原头部是 Akamai 边缘信任与缓存投毒测试载荷。

prerequisites.zh: 在 Fastly/Varnish 测试服务列出 internal-only Header 及其源站用途，使用受控 Host/IP/surrogate canary。
prerequisites.en: List internal-only headers and their origin uses in a Fastly or Varnish test service, using controlled Host, IP, and surrogate canaries.

prerequisites.zh: 逐个 Header 由客户端 A 预热唯一 key，客户端 B 无 Header 读取，并记录 VCL 处理、源站输入、surrogate key 与 HIT。
prerequisites.en: Have client A prime a unique key with one header at a time and header-free client B read it, recording VCL handling, origin input, surrogate key, and HIT.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求外部 Fastly/Varnish Header 影响可缓存源站表示或错误 purge 分组，且未被剥离/入键，第二客户端收到受控污染 canary。Header 进入日志、VCL 正确覆盖、Surrogate-Key 只在响应、缓存 MISS、Host 无效返回错误、X-Varnish 被忽略或差异不共享均是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires an external Fastly or Varnish header to affect a cacheable origin representation or purge grouping without stripping or keying, causing a second client to receive the controlled poisoned canary. Logged headers, correct VCL overwrite, response-only Surrogate-Key, cache MISS, invalid-Host errors, ignored X-Varnish, or unshared differences is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 一个内部 Header 首次跨客户端传播 canary 后停止，不触发真实 purge 或主机路由。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one internal header first propagates a canary across clients; do not trigger real purges or host routing.

opsecTips.zh: Purge 测试对象，删除 VCL fixture/日志与客户端数据，并恢复入口 unset、可信重建和 key 覆盖。
opsecTips.en: Purge test objects, delete VCL fixtures and logs and client data, and restore ingress unset, trusted reconstruction, and key coverage.

name.zh: Fastly/Varnish 内部头缓存投毒
name.en: Fastly and Varnish Internal-Header Cache Poisoning

description.zh: 验证 Fastly-Orig-Host、Fastly-Client-IP、Surrogate-Key 等客户端值是否错误影响源站或缓存。
description.en: Tests whether client-supplied Fastly-Orig-Host, Fastly-Client-IP, Surrogate-Key, and related values incorrectly affect origin or cache behavior.

overview.zh: 原集合混合主机、客户端 IP、替代键和 Varnish 标识，需要分别确认哪些头仅供边缘内部使用。本条按共享缓存与源站差异审查；应使用唯一缓存键、短期测试内容和两个隔离客户端，分别记录源站生成与共享缓存命中。
overview.en: The original set mixes host, client-IP, surrogate-key, and Varnish identifiers and requires identifying which headers are internal-only. This entry is reviewed as a shared-cache and origin differential; Use unique cache keys, short-lived test content, and two isolated clients while recording origin generation and shared-cache hits separately.

vulnerability.zh: 未清洗的 Fastly 内部头可能改变生成链接、分组清除或内容变体，并在未入键时污染其他用户。确认标准是确认外部值未被覆盖、改变响应或替代键并影响独立客户端；头仅在请求日志出现、边缘覆盖、Surrogate-Key 不回显或无共享命中不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: Unsanitized Fastly internal headers may alter links, purge grouping, or representation variants and poison other users when unkeyed. Confirmation requires Confirm that the external value is not overwritten, changes response or surrogate behavior, and affects an independent client; Headers appearing only in request logs, edge overwrite, nonreflected Surrogate-Key, or no shared hit is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 采集正常 Fastly 请求中边缘生成的头、缓存状态和源站表示；2. 逐项伪造原始 Fastly/Varnish 头，在唯一测试对象上观察源站和二次缓存命中；3. 确认外部值未被覆盖、改变响应或替代键并影响独立客户端。头仅在请求日志出现、边缘覆盖、Surrogate-Key 不回显或无共享命中应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Collect edge-generated headers, cache status, and origin representation from a normal Fastly request. 2. Forge original Fastly or Varnish headers one at a time on a unique test object and observe origin and second cache hit. 3. Confirm that the external value is not overwritten, changes response or surrogate behavior, and affects an independent client. Treat Headers appearing only in request logs, edge overwrite, nonreflected Surrogate-Key, or no shared hit as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 在 VCL 或入口配置中删除客户端提供的 Fastly 内部头；2. 替代键和清除标签只能由可信源站生成；3. 对影响内容的主机和地理维度实施明确缓存键策略。
mitigation.en: 1. Strip client-supplied Fastly internal headers in VCL or ingress configuration. 2. Allow surrogate keys and purge labels only from trusted origins. 3. Use explicit cache-key policy for host and geographic dimensions that affect content.

title.zh: 建立Fastly 派生头信任基线
title.en: Establish the Fastly Derived-Header Trust baseline

description.zh: 采集正常 Fastly 请求中边缘生成的头、缓存状态和源站表示，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Collect edge-generated headers, cache status, and origin representation from a normal Fastly request, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行Fastly 派生头信任变体
title.en: Execute the Fastly Derived-Header Trust variants

description.zh: 逐项伪造原始 Fastly/Varnish 头，在唯一测试对象上观察源站和二次缓存命中，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Forge original Fastly or Varnish headers one at a time on a unique test object and observe origin and second cache hit, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

attackChain.payload:
Fastly-FF: evil
Fastly-Client-IP: 127.0.0.1
Fastly-Orig-Host: evil.com
Surrogate-Key: evil
X-Varnish: 12345

title.zh: 核验Fastly/Varnish 内部头缓存投毒证据
title.en: Verify evidence for Fastly and Varnish Internal-Header Cache Poisoning

description.zh: 确认外部值未被覆盖、改变响应或替代键并影响独立客户端；同时排除头仅在请求日志出现、边缘覆盖、Surrogate-Key 不回显或无共享命中。
description.en: Confirm that the external value is not overwritten, changes response or surrogate behavior, and affects an independent client; also exclude Headers appearing only in request logs, edge overwrite, nonreflected Surrogate-Key, or no shared hit.

review.rationale: 原集合针对 Fastly/Varnish 内部头信任与缓存投毒。

prerequisites.zh: 在 Cloudflare 测试 zone 确认 CF-* Header 的边缘生成行为，源站只用其选择合成地区/IP/scheme canary。
prerequisites.en: Confirm edge generation of CF-* headers in a Cloudflare test zone, with the origin using them only to select synthetic geography, IP, or scheme canaries.

prerequisites.zh: 固定唯一 URL key，由客户端注入一个 Header 并用第二客户端读取，采集边缘 trace、源站 Header 和 cache status。
prerequisites.en: Fix a unique URL key, inject one header from client A, and read with client B, collecting edge traces, origin headers, and cache status.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求客户端 CF-* 值穿过边缘未被可信值替换，改变可缓存表示且第二客户端命中相同 canary。请求含 Header、源站看到真实 Cloudflare 重写值、CF-Ray 格式错误、只影响日志/风控不可缓存响应、第二次 MISS 或公共地区内容按设计共享都不是缓存投毒。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires a client CF-* value to survive the edge without trusted replacement, alter a cacheable representation, and be hit by a second client as the same canary. A request containing the header, origin seeing Cloudflare's real rewrite, malformed CF-Ray, log- or risk-only effects on uncacheable responses, second-request MISS, or intentionally shared public geography content is not cache poisoning.

opsecTips.zh: 第二客户端首次继承一个合成 CF 属性后停止，不绕过真实地区、IP 或 Worker 授权。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the second client first inherits one synthetic CF attribute; do not bypass real geography, IP, or Worker authorization.

opsecTips.zh: Purge 唯一 key，删除 zone fixture 和 trace，清除客户端数据并恢复边缘覆盖和缓存分区。
opsecTips.en: Purge the unique key, delete zone fixtures and traces, clear client data, and restore edge overwrite and cache partitioning.

name.zh: Cloudflare 内部头缓存投毒

description.zh: 检查 CF-Connecting-IP、CF-IPCountry、CF-Visitor 和 CF-Worker 等头是否可由客户端伪造并改变缓存表示。
description.en: Tests whether CF-Connecting-IP, CF-IPCountry, CF-Visitor, and CF-Worker can be spoofed by clients and alter cached representations.

overview.zh: 原集合覆盖客户端地址、国家、scheme 与 Worker 标识，重点是 Cloudflare 是否在到源站前可靠覆盖。本条按共享缓存与源站差异审查；应使用唯一缓存键、短期测试内容和两个隔离客户端，分别记录源站生成与共享缓存命中。
overview.en: The original set covers client address, country, scheme, and Worker identity, focusing on reliable Cloudflare overwrite before origin. This entry is reviewed as a shared-cache and origin differential; Use unique cache keys, short-lived test content, and two isolated clients while recording origin generation and shared-cache hits separately.

vulnerability.zh: 若源站直接信任未验证 CF 头来定制地区、协议或权限内容，伪造值可能形成缓存污染或授权错误。确认标准是确认攻击者值到达源站、改变响应且由共享缓存返回给另一客户端；Cloudflare 正常覆盖、源站仅记录原始值或内容按正确键分区不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If the origin trusts unverified CF headers for regional, scheme, or privileged content, spoofed values may cause cache poisoning or authorization errors. Confirmation requires Confirm that attacker values reach the origin, alter the response, and are returned by shared cache to another client; Normal Cloudflare overwrite, origin logging only, or content correctly partitioned by cache key is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 通过真实 Cloudflare 路径记录边缘生成头、源站识别结果和缓存键；2. 逐项发送原始 CF 头值到无害资源，并比较直连源站与边缘访问的清洗行为；3. 确认攻击者值到达源站、改变响应且由共享缓存返回给另一客户端。Cloudflare 正常覆盖、源站仅记录原始值或内容按正确键分区应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record edge-generated headers, origin interpretation, and cache key over the genuine Cloudflare path. 2. Send original CF header values one at a time to a harmless resource and compare direct-origin and edge sanitization behavior. 3. Confirm that attacker values reach the origin, alter the response, and are returned by shared cache to another client. Treat Normal Cloudflare overwrite, origin logging only, or content correctly partitioned by cache key as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 阻止公网直连源站并只信任 Cloudflare 出口地址；2. 在边缘覆盖所有 CF 内部头并验证签名上下文；3. 地理与协议变体进入缓存键，权限不依赖这些头。
mitigation.en: 1. Block public direct access to origin and trust only Cloudflare egress addresses. 2. Overwrite all CF internal headers at the edge and validate trusted context. 3. Key geographic and scheme variants correctly and never derive privileges from these headers.

title.zh: 建立CF 派生属性信任基线
title.en: Establish the Cloudflare Derived-Attribute Trust baseline

description.zh: 通过真实 Cloudflare 路径记录边缘生成头、源站识别结果和缓存键，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Record edge-generated headers, origin interpretation, and cache key over the genuine Cloudflare path, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行CF 派生属性信任变体
title.en: Execute the Cloudflare Derived-Attribute Trust variants

description.zh: 逐项发送原始 CF 头值到无害资源，并比较直连源站与边缘访问的清洗行为，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Send original CF header values one at a time to a harmless resource and compare direct-origin and edge sanitization behavior, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

attackChain.payload:
CF-Connecting-IP: 127.0.0.1
CF-IPCountry: US
CF-Ray: evil
CF-Visitor: {"scheme":"https"}
CF-Worker: evil.com

title.zh: 核验Cloudflare 内部头缓存投毒证据
title.en: Verify evidence for Cloudflare Internal-Header Cache Poisoning

description.zh: 确认攻击者值到达源站、改变响应且由共享缓存返回给另一客户端；同时排除Cloudflare 正常覆盖、源站仅记录原始值或内容按正确键分区。
description.en: Confirm that attacker values reach the origin, alter the response, and are returned by shared cache to another client; also exclude Normal Cloudflare overwrite, origin logging only, or content correctly partitioned by cache key.

review.rationale: 原头部是 Cloudflare 派生属性和缓存投毒测试。

prerequisites.zh: 只在隔离 CDN 测试 key 使用短 TTL 和两个客户端，源站错误页包含随机 canary 且不承载真实用户流量。
prerequisites.en: Use only an isolated CDN test key with short TTL and two clients, with a random canary in the origin error page and no real user traffic.

prerequisites.zh: 逐个异常 X-Forwarded-Host 触发可控 4xx/5xx，记录源站生成 ID、缓存资格、Age 与正常无 Header 请求。
prerequisites.en: Trigger controlled 4xx or 5xx responses with one abnormal X-Forwarded-Host at a time, recording origin generation ID, cache eligibility, Age, and normal header-free requests.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求攻击者诱导的错误响应被共享缓存存入正常 key，随后第二客户端无恶意 Header 仍命中同一错误 canary，造成可持续可用性影响。首请求报错、模板表达式未执行、JNDI 字符串出现、第二请求回源、错误 no-store、仅攻击者连接失败或 TTL 立即失效都不是 cache DoS。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires an attacker-induced error response to be stored under the normal shared key and a second header-free client to hit the same error canary, creating persistent availability impact. First-request errors, unevaluated template expressions, JNDI text, second origin fetch, no-store errors, attacker-only failure, or immediate TTL expiry is not cache DoS.

opsecTips.zh: 第二客户端首次命中缓存错误后停止，不延长 TTL、扩大 key 范围或向共享生产缓存测试。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the second client first hits the cached error; do not extend TTL, broaden key scope, or test a shared production cache.

opsecTips.zh: 立即 purge 测试 key，删除错误 fixture/客户端缓存和 trace，并恢复错误响应 no-store 与 Header 校验。
opsecTips.en: Immediately purge the test key, delete error fixtures, client caches, and traces, and restore no-store on errors and header validation.

name.zh: 缓存投毒导致拒绝服务
name.en: Denial of Service through Cache Poisoning

description.zh: 使用无效主机、控制字符和模板片段检查攻击者是否能让错误响应进入共享缓存并阻断正常用户。
description.en: Uses invalid hosts, controls, and template-like fragments to test whether attacker-induced error responses enter shared cache and block normal users.

overview.zh: 原集合针对 X-Forwarded-Host 的异常值，目标是观察源站错误是否在正常缓存键下被持久保存。本条按共享缓存与源站差异审查；应使用唯一缓存键、短期测试内容和两个隔离客户端，分别记录源站生成与共享缓存命中。
overview.en: The original set targets abnormal X-Forwarded-Host values and observes whether origin errors persist under a normal cache key. This entry is reviewed as a shared-cache and origin differential; Use unique cache keys, short-lived test content, and two isolated clients while recording origin generation and shared-cache hits separately.

vulnerability.zh: 若攻击者可触发 4xx/5xx 或异常页面并让 CDN 缓存，后续正常用户会持续收到不可用响应。确认标准是确认攻击者诱发的错误被共享缓存命中，并由无头正常客户端重复获得；源站临时失败、二次请求回源、仅攻击者连接错误或缓存已隔离不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If an attacker can trigger a 4xx, 5xx, or malformed page that the CDN caches, later normal users may receive persistent failures. Confirmation requires Confirm that the attacker-induced error is served as a shared-cache hit and repeatedly received by a normal header-free client; Transient origin failures, second requests returning to origin, attacker-connection errors only, or isolated cache variants is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 在隔离缓存命名空间记录正常资源的状态、正文、TTL 与恢复时间；2. 逐项发送原始异常 X-Forwarded-Host 值，每次使用独立测试键并设置短 TTL；3. 确认攻击者诱发的错误被共享缓存命中，并由无头正常客户端重复获得。源站临时失败、二次请求回源、仅攻击者连接错误或缓存已隔离应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record status, body, TTL, and recovery time for a normal resource in an isolated cache namespace. 2. Send original abnormal X-Forwarded-Host values one at a time with an independent test key and short TTL. 3. Confirm that the attacker-induced error is served as a shared-cache hit and repeatedly received by a normal header-free client. Treat Transient origin failures, second requests returning to origin, attacker-connection errors only, or isolated cache variants as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 默认不缓存 4xx/5xx 和由未入键输入影响的响应；2. 清洗转发主机头并限制错误页 TTL；3. 监控异常状态缓存命中并提供快速清除和回源恢复。
mitigation.en: 1. Do not cache 4xx or 5xx responses or responses affected by unkeyed inputs by default. 2. Sanitize forwarded-host headers and cap error-page TTL. 3. Monitor cached error hits and provide rapid purge and origin-recovery paths.

title.zh: 建立错误响应持久缓存基线
title.en: Establish the Persistent Caching of Error Responses baseline

description.zh: 在隔离缓存命名空间记录正常资源的状态、正文、TTL 与恢复时间，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Record status, body, TTL, and recovery time for a normal resource in an isolated cache namespace, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行错误响应持久缓存变体
title.en: Execute the Persistent Caching of Error Responses variants

description.zh: 逐项发送原始异常 X-Forwarded-Host 值，每次使用独立测试键并设置短 TTL，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Send original abnormal X-Forwarded-Host values one at a time with an independent test key and short TTL, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

title.zh: 核验缓存投毒导致拒绝服务证据
title.en: Verify evidence for Denial of Service through Cache Poisoning

description.zh: 确认攻击者诱发的错误被共享缓存命中，并由无头正常客户端重复获得；同时排除源站临时失败、二次请求回源、仅攻击者连接错误或缓存已隔离。
description.en: Confirm that the attacker-induced error is served as a shared-cache hit and repeatedly received by a normal header-free client; also exclude Transient origin failures, second requests returning to origin, attacker-connection errors only, or isolated cache variants.

review.rationale: 原命令用于缓存错误响应导致的 DoS，应归入缓存与 CDN 安全。

prerequisites.zh: 按请求/响应方向整理 Pragma、Expires、Age 和厂商 HIT Header，只从真实流量捕获中分析。
prerequisites.en: Classify Pragma, Expires, Age, and vendor HIT headers by request or response direction and analyze them only from real traffic captures.

prerequisites.zh: 用唯一 cache key 与源站生成 ID 建立 MISS、HIT、revalidate 和过期基线，校准 CDN 时钟与多层缓存。
prerequisites.en: Use a unique cache key and origin generation ID to establish MISS, HIT, revalidation, and expiry baselines, calibrating CDN clocks and cache layers.

analysis.zh: 阳性工具结果是诊断 Header 与源站生成次数、Age 增长和缓存日志一致地识别真实缓存状态，或发现 Expires/Pragma 配置与实际行为冲突。单个 X-Cache:HIT 文本、客户端自造 Header、Age 大值、代理错误页、不同 CDN Header 命名或浏览器本地缓存都不能确认共享缓存或漏洞。
analysis.en: Positive tool evidence is diagnostic headers consistently identifying real cache state with origin generation count, Age growth, and cache logs, or revealing a conflict between Expires or Pragma configuration and behavior. One X-Cache:HIT string, a client-forged header, large Age, a proxy error page, different CDN header names, or browser-local cache does not confirm a shared cache or flaw.

opsecTips.zh: 一个 key 的缓存状态与策略冲突被确认后停止，不伪造响应 Header 或扩大到用户私有内容。
opsecTips.en: Stop after confirming cache state or a policy conflict for one key; do not forge response headers or expand to private user content.

opsecTips.zh: Purge 测试 key，删除捕获/诊断缓存，清理客户端状态并恢复正确 Expires、Pragma 和监测配置。
opsecTips.en: Purge test keys, delete captures and diagnostic caches, clear client state, and restore correct Expires, Pragma, and monitoring configuration.

name.zh: 缓存诊断头与过期策略审查表
name.en: Cache Diagnostic Headers and Expiry Policy Catalog

description.zh: 整理 Pragma、Expires、Age 和常见 CDN 命中头，用于响应分析与配置审查而不是独立攻击请求。
description.en: Catalogs Pragma, Expires, Age, and common CDN hit headers for response analysis and configuration review rather than standalone attack requests.

overview.zh: 原集合混合请求指令、响应过期值和供应商诊断头，必须按方向解析，不能整体发送给服务器。本条按工具目录与配置审查边界审查；原命令应导入已指定的现有工具作为字典、规则或分析标签，不应脱离上下文直接向业务端点发送。
overview.en: The original set mixes request directives, response expiry values, and vendor diagnostics and must be interpreted by direction rather than sent wholesale. This entry is reviewed as a tool-catalog and configuration-review boundary; Import the original command into the specified existing tools as a wordlist, rule, or analysis label rather than sending it directly to business endpoints.

vulnerability.zh: 错误的过期或缓存策略可能泄露私人响应或延长错误内容，但看到 HIT、Age 或 Expires 文本本身不是漏洞。确认标准是结合两个客户端与源站日志确认实际存储、命中和过期行为；伪造的 X-Cache 头、源站自行输出 Age 或浏览器私有缓存不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: Incorrect expiry or cache policy may leak private responses or prolong errors, but seeing HIT, Age, or Expires text alone is not a vulnerability. Confirmation requires Use two clients and origin logs to confirm actual storage, hits, and expiry behavior; Forged X-Cache headers, origin-generated Age values, or private browser caches is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 采集测试资源在 MISS、HIT、重新验证和过期阶段的完整响应头时间线；2. 将原始头目录导入响应分析工具，区分标准字段、供应商字段和仅请求侧指令；3. 结合两个客户端与源站日志确认实际存储、命中和过期行为。伪造的 X-Cache 头、源站自行输出 Age 或浏览器私有缓存应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Collect a complete response-header timeline for a test resource across miss, hit, revalidation, and expiry phases. 2. Import the original header catalog into a response-analysis tool and separate standard, vendor, and request-only fields. 3. Use two clients and origin logs to confirm actual storage, hits, and expiry behavior. Treat Forged X-Cache headers, origin-generated Age values, or private browser caches as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 由受信 CDN 生成并覆盖缓存诊断头；2. 为敏感响应设置明确 private/no-store 与正确 Expires；3. 用源站日志和 CDN API 验证命中而非依赖单一头。
mitigation.en: 1. Generate and overwrite cache diagnostic headers at the trusted CDN. 2. Set explicit private or no-store and correct expiry for sensitive responses. 3. Verify cache hits with origin logs and CDN APIs rather than one header.

title.zh: 建立缓存状态识别基线
title.en: Establish the Cache-State Identification baseline

description.zh: 采集测试资源在 MISS、HIT、重新验证和过期阶段的完整响应头时间线，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Collect a complete response-header timeline for a test resource across miss, hit, revalidation, and expiry phases, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行缓存状态识别变体
title.en: Execute the Cache-State Identification variants

description.zh: 将原始头目录导入响应分析工具，区分标准字段、供应商字段和仅请求侧指令，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Import the original header catalog into a response-analysis tool and separate standard, vendor, and request-only fields, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

attackChain.payload:
Pragma: no-cache, public
Expires: -1
X-Cache-Status: HIT
X-Cache: HIT
X-CDN-Cache: HIT
Age: 999999
X-Cache-Lookup: HIT
X-Served-By: cache
X-Cache-Hits: 1
X-Timer: S1234567890.123456

title.zh: 核验缓存诊断头与过期策略审查表证据
title.en: Verify evidence for Cache Diagnostic Headers and Expiry Policy Catalog

description.zh: 结合两个客户端与源站日志确认实际存储、命中和过期行为；同时排除伪造的 X-Cache 头、源站自行输出 Age 或浏览器私有缓存。
description.en: Use two clients and origin logs to confirm actual storage, hits, and expiry behavior; also exclude Forged X-Cache headers, origin-generated Age values, or private browser caches.

review.rationale: 原内容是混合方向的缓存诊断与配置头目录，应并入缓存分析工具。

prerequisites.zh: 在共享缓存测试路由定义 X-Cluster-Client-IP、X-Forwarded 与标准 Forwarded 的可信来源、优先级和合成表示。
prerequisites.en: Define trusted sources, precedence, and synthetic representations for X-Cluster-Client-IP, X-Forwarded, and standard Forwarded on a shared-cache test route.

prerequisites.zh: 用唯一 key 和两个客户端逐个及最小组合测试，记录源站选择的 IP/host、cache key、Vary 与第二次 HIT。
prerequisites.en: Use a unique key and two clients to test headers individually and in minimal combinations, recording origin-selected IP or host, cache key, Vary, and second HIT.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求客户端可控转发组合改变可缓存表示或路由，而缓存未覆盖决定性 Header，使第二无 Header 客户端继承 canary。Header 被日志记录、只改变风控分数、代理正确追加真实 IP、表示 private/no-store、第二请求 MISS、host 解析失败或组合值未被消费均是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires a client-controlled forwarding combination to alter a cacheable representation or route while the cache omits the decisive header, causing a second header-free client to inherit the canary. Logged headers, risk-score-only changes, correct proxy appending of the real IP, private or no-store output, second-request MISS, host parse failure, or unconsumed combinations is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 一个最小 Header 组合首次跨客户端传播 canary 后停止，不叠加更多代理头或真实身份条件。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one minimal header combination first propagates a canary across clients; do not stack more proxy headers or real identity conditions.

opsecTips.zh: Purge key，删除表示 fixture 和 trace，清除客户端缓存，并恢复入口剥离、可信追加和 cache key/Vary。
opsecTips.en: Purge keys, delete representation fixtures and traces, clear client caches, and restore ingress stripping, trusted appending, and cache key or Vary coverage.

name.zh: Forwarded 客户端与主机缓存键碰撞
name.en: Forwarded Client and Host Cache-Key Collision

description.zh: 检查组合 Forwarded/IP/host 值是否改变源站表示，而缓存键只覆盖部分或完全忽略这些维度。
description.en: Tests whether combined Forwarded, client-IP, and host values alter origin representation while the cache key covers only some or none of them.

overview.zh: 原集合包含 X-Cluster-Client-IP、X-Forwarded 和标准 Forwarded 组合，目标是多头优先级与缓存键一致性。本条按共享缓存与源站差异审查；应使用唯一缓存键、短期测试内容和两个隔离客户端，分别记录源站生成与共享缓存命中。
overview.en: The original set includes X-Cluster-Client-IP, X-Forwarded, and standard Forwarded combinations to test multi-header precedence and cache-key consistency. This entry is reviewed as a shared-cache and origin differential; Use unique cache keys, short-lived test content, and two isolated clients while recording origin generation and shared-cache hits separately.

vulnerability.zh: 源站若从一个头选择身份或主机，而 CDN 从另一个头构建键，可能发生跨用户或跨主机内容碰撞。确认标准是确认不同转发输入共享缓存键却产生并复用不同主体或主机表示；仅日志优先级变化、缓存正确分区或响应无身份相关内容不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If the origin selects identity or host from one header while the CDN keys from another, cross-user or cross-host content collisions may occur. Confirmation requires Confirm that different forwarding inputs share a cache key while producing and reusing different principal or host representations; Log-precedence changes only, correct cache partitioning, or responses without identity-dependent content is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 记录无转发头和受信代理正常头下的源站选择值、表示和缓存键；2. 逐项发送原始组合头，固定路径并使用唯一测试租户标记观察第二客户端命中；3. 确认不同转发输入共享缓存键却产生并复用不同主体或主机表示。仅日志优先级变化、缓存正确分区或响应无身份相关内容应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record origin-selected values, representation, and cache key with no forwarding headers and with normal trusted-proxy headers. 2. Send original combined headers one at a time on a fixed path with a unique test-tenant marker and observe a second client. 3. Confirm that different forwarding inputs share a cache key while producing and reusing different principal or host representations. Treat Log-precedence changes only, correct cache partitioning, or responses without identity-dependent content as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 入口只保留一种规范 Forwarded 表示并删除其他客户端值；2. 禁止使用转发 IP 作为身份授权依据；3. 所有影响表示的主机和区域维度与缓存键严格一致。
mitigation.en: 1. Keep one canonical Forwarded representation at ingress and remove other client values. 2. Never use forwarded IP as an identity-authorization control. 3. Keep every host and regional dimension affecting representation aligned with the cache key.

title.zh: 建立组合转发头未入键基线
title.en: Establish the Unkeyed Combined Forwarding Headers baseline

description.zh: 记录无转发头和受信代理正常头下的源站选择值、表示和缓存键，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Record origin-selected values, representation, and cache key with no forwarding headers and with normal trusted-proxy headers, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行组合转发头未入键变体
title.en: Execute the Unkeyed Combined Forwarding Headers variants

description.zh: 逐项发送原始组合头，固定路径并使用唯一测试租户标记观察第二客户端命中，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Send original combined headers one at a time on a fixed path with a unique test-tenant marker and observe a second client, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

attackChain.payload:
X-Cluster-Client-IP: 127.0.0.1
X-Forwarded: for=127.0.0.1
Forwarded: for=127.0.0.1;host=evil.com

title.zh: 核验Forwarded 客户端与主机缓存键碰撞证据
title.en: Verify evidence for Forwarded Client and Host Cache-Key Collision

description.zh: 确认不同转发输入共享缓存键却产生并复用不同主体或主机表示；同时排除仅日志优先级变化、缓存正确分区或响应无身份相关内容。
description.en: Confirm that different forwarding inputs share a cache key while producing and reusing different principal or host representations; also exclude Log-precedence changes only, correct cache partitioning, or responses without identity-dependent content.

review.rationale: 原组合头用于缓存键碰撞与转发头优先级测试。

prerequisites.zh: 使用专用测试账户、隔离邮件接收器和一次性重置 token，固定目标 IP、TLS SNI 与真实应用 base URL。
prerequisites.en: Use a dedicated test account, isolated mail receiver, and one-time reset token, fixing target IP, TLS SNI, and the application's true base URL.

prerequisites.zh: 逐个 Host 候选触发重置，记录边缘 authority、应用链接生成输入、邮件原文、最终域和 token 可用性。
prerequisites.en: Trigger reset with one Host candidate at a time, recording edge authority, application link-generation input, raw email, final domain, and token usability.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求应用用不可信 Host 构造含有效合成 token 的重置链接，并把链接发送到测试账户邮件，使受控外部域能接收该 token。Host 只在邮件正文普通文本出现、边缘拒绝、链接使用固定可信域、token 已无效、外域无请求、仅页面重定向或测试器手工改链接都不是重置投毒。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the application to build a reset link containing a valid synthetic token from an untrusted Host and send it in the test account's email so the controlled external domain can receive that token. Host text in mail, edge rejection, a fixed trusted link domain, invalid token, no external request, page redirect only, or manual link editing by the harness is not reset poisoning.

opsecTips.zh: 一封测试邮件首次包含受控外域的有效 token 后停止，不打开真实用户重置流程或提交新密码。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one test email first contains a valid token on the controlled external domain; do not open real-user reset flows or submit a new password.

opsecTips.zh: 撤销 token 和账户会话，删除邮件/接收日志与 DNS，清理缓存并恢复固定外部 base URL 和 Host 白名单。
opsecTips.en: Revoke the token and account sessions, delete mail, recipient logs, and DNS, clear caches, and restore a fixed external base URL and Host allowlist.

name.zh: 密码重置 Host Header 投毒

description.zh: 使用攻击者主机值检查密码重置邮件是否从不可信 Host 派生绝对链接并泄露一次性令牌。
description.en: Uses attacker-controlled host values to test whether password-reset email derives absolute links from untrusted Host and exposes one-time tokens.

overview.zh: 原集合列出恶意主机、端口和路径，目标是重置流程生成链接时采用的外部基址。本条按Host/authority 信任边界审查；应固定目标 IP、TLS SNI、身份与路径，逐项比较入口 authority、代理路由和后端虚拟主机。
overview.en: The original set lists malicious hosts, ports, and paths and targets the external base URL used when generating reset links. This entry is reviewed as a Host and authority trust boundary; Fix target IP, TLS SNI, identity, and path and compare ingress authority, proxy routing, and backend virtual host one item at a time.

vulnerability.zh: 若应用直接使用请求 Host 生成重置邮件，攻击者可让受害者收到指向其域名并携带令牌的链接。确认标准是确认服务端邮件中的完整重置链接采用不受信主机并把有效测试令牌发送到该地址；响应正文回显 Host、邮件模板显示文本但链接使用固定域名或令牌已失效不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If an application directly uses request Host to generate reset email, an attacker may cause victims to receive links carrying tokens to an attacker domain. Confirmation requires Confirm that the server-generated email uses the untrusted host in a complete reset link and sends a valid test token there; Host reflection in the response, email text showing the value while the link uses a fixed domain, or an expired token is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 为隔离账号发起正常重置并记录邮件链接主机、令牌与服务端事务；2. 逐项使用原始主机值发起测试重置，所有域名替换为自有不可转发接收端；3. 确认服务端邮件中的完整重置链接采用不受信主机并把有效测试令牌发送到该地址。响应正文回显 Host、邮件模板显示文本但链接使用固定域名或令牌已失效应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Initiate a normal reset for an isolated account and record link host, token, and server transaction. 2. Initiate test resets with original host values one at a time, replacing domains with an owned nonforwarding receiver. 3. Confirm that the server-generated email uses the untrusted host in a complete reset link and sends a valid test token there. Treat Host reflection in the response, email text showing the value while the link uses a fixed domain, or an expired token as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 生成外部链接使用固定配置的规范 HTTPS 基址；2. 入口严格允许 Host 并拒绝未知 authority；3. 重置令牌短期一次性绑定用户，并监控异常主机请求。
mitigation.en: 1. Generate external links from a configured canonical HTTPS base URL. 2. Strictly allow Host values at ingress and reject unknown authorities. 3. Use short-lived one-time user-bound reset tokens and monitor abnormal host requests.

title.zh: 建立重置链接主机派生基线
title.en: Establish the Reset-Link Host Derivation baseline

description.zh: 为隔离账号发起正常重置并记录邮件链接主机、令牌与服务端事务，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Initiate a normal reset for an isolated account and record link host, token, and server transaction, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行重置链接主机派生变体
title.en: Execute the Reset-Link Host Derivation variants

description.zh: 逐项使用原始主机值发起测试重置，所有域名替换为自有不可转发接收端，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Initiate test resets with original host values one at a time, replacing domains with an owned nonforwarding receiver, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

attackChain.payload:
evil.com
evil.com:443
evil.com:80
evil.com:8080
evil.com:8443
evil.com:3000
evil.com:5000
evil.com:9000
evil.com:9090
attacker.com
attacker.com:443
hacker.com
hacker.com:443
malicious.com
phishing.com
exploit.com
payload.com
evil.com/path
evil.com/reset
evil.com/token
evil.com/password

title.zh: 核验密码重置 Host Header 投毒证据
title.en: Verify evidence for Password Reset Host Header Poisoning

description.zh: 确认服务端邮件中的完整重置链接采用不受信主机并把有效测试令牌发送到该地址；同时排除响应正文回显 Host、邮件模板显示文本但链接使用固定域名或令牌已失效。
description.en: Confirm that the server-generated email uses the untrusted host in a complete reset link and sends a valid test token there; also exclude Host reflection in the response, email text showing the value while the link uses a fixed domain, or an expired token.

review.rationale: 原主机值是密码重置 Host Header 投毒载荷。

prerequisites.zh: 仅在隔离网络放置受控私网 HTTP 标记服务，并确认应用是否基于 Host/authority 创建第二条服务器连接。
prerequisites.en: Place a controlled private-network HTTP marker only in an isolated network and confirm whether the application creates a second server-side connection from Host or authority.

prerequisites.zh: 固定目标入口 IP、SNI、路径和客户端，记录代理路由、DNS/连接源、目标服务令牌与响应来源。
prerequisites.en: Fix ingress target IP, SNI, path, and client, recording proxy routing, DNS or connection source, marker token, and response origin.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求外部请求的 Host 值驱动服务器向受控私网标记地址建立独立连接，标记日志和入口请求令牌可关联。客户端直接连接该地址、入口虚拟主机切换、Host 被回显、仅 DNS 解析、连接失败、响应来自前端缓存或端口扫描超时都不是 Host 派生 SSRF。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires an external request's Host value to drive a separate server-side connection to the controlled private marker, correlated by marker logs and ingress token. Direct client connection, ingress virtual-host switching, Host reflection, DNS lookup alone, failed connection, front-end-cached response, or port-scan timeout is not Host-derived SSRF.

opsecTips.zh: 一个私网标记服务首次收到关联请求后停止，不探测真实路由器、管理端口或云元数据。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one private marker first receives the correlated request; do not probe real routers, management ports, or cloud metadata.

opsecTips.zh: 关闭私网标记，删除路由/DNS fixture 和日志，撤销临时出站规则并清理代理连接池。
opsecTips.en: Shut down the private marker, delete routing and DNS fixtures and logs, revoke temporary egress rules, and clear proxy connection pools.

name.zh: Host 派生内网路由器 SSRF

description.zh: 使用私网地址与端口检查代理或应用是否把 Host/authority 转换为服务器侧下游请求。
description.en: Uses private addresses and ports to test whether a proxy or application turns Host or authority into a server-side downstream request.

overview.zh: 原集合是常见私网网关与管理端口，只有目标确实根据 Host 建立二次连接时才属于 SSRF。本条按服务器侧下游请求边界审查；应使用自有回连和隔离内网模拟服务，关联 DNS、连接源、目标进程日志与响应影响。
overview.en: The original set contains common private gateways and management ports and is SSRF only when the target actually creates a second connection from Host. This entry is reviewed as a server-side downstream-request boundary; Use owned callbacks and isolated internal simulators and correlate DNS, connection source, target-process logs, and response impact.

vulnerability.zh: 若反向代理、截图器或 URL 获取服务信任 Host 选择上游，攻击者可能访问私网路由器与管理服务。确认标准是通过模拟服务连接日志和目标进程日志确认二次请求来自服务器且返回影响响应；虚拟主机本地路由、DNS 解析、浏览器请求或仅错误页包含地址不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If a reverse proxy, screenshotter, or URL-fetching service trusts Host to select an upstream, an attacker may reach private routers and administrative services. Confirmation requires Confirm from simulator connection logs and target-process logs that a second request originates from the server and affects the response; Local virtual-host routing, DNS resolution, browser requests, or error pages containing the address is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 使用自有外部回连主机确认目标是否会根据 Host 发起服务器侧连接，并记录来源；2. 在隔离网络逐项使用原始私网地址和端口，目标仅指向受控模拟路由器服务；3. 通过模拟服务连接日志和目标进程日志确认二次请求来自服务器且返回影响响应。虚拟主机本地路由、DNS 解析、浏览器请求或仅错误页包含地址应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Use an owned external callback host to determine whether the target makes a server-side connection from Host and record its source. 2. Use original private addresses and ports one at a time in an isolated network, pointing only to a controlled router simulator. 3. Confirm from simulator connection logs and target-process logs that a second request originates from the server and affects the response. Treat Local virtual-host routing, DNS resolution, browser requests, or error pages containing the address as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 不从客户端 Host 动态选择任意上游地址；2. 对解析后的每个地址阻断私网、环回和链路本地范围；3. 通过固定服务发现或受控出口代理访问下游。
mitigation.en: 1. Do not select arbitrary upstream addresses from client Host. 2. Block private, loopback, and link-local ranges for every resolved address. 3. Reach downstream services through fixed discovery or a controlled egress proxy.

title.zh: 建立私网 authority 请求基线
title.en: Establish the Private-Network Authority Requests baseline

description.zh: 使用自有外部回连主机确认目标是否会根据 Host 发起服务器侧连接，并记录来源，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Use an owned external callback host to determine whether the target makes a server-side connection from Host and record its source, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行私网 authority 请求变体
title.en: Execute the Private-Network Authority Requests variants

description.zh: 在隔离网络逐项使用原始私网地址和端口，目标仅指向受控模拟路由器服务，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Use original private addresses and ports one at a time in an isolated network, pointing only to a controlled router simulator, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

title.zh: 核验Host 派生内网路由器 SSRF证据
title.en: Verify evidence for Host-Derived Internal Router SSRF

description.zh: 通过模拟服务连接日志和目标进程日志确认二次请求来自服务器且返回影响响应；同时排除虚拟主机本地路由、DNS 解析、浏览器请求或仅错误页包含地址。
description.en: Confirm from simulator connection logs and target-process logs that a second request originates from the server and affects the response; also exclude Local virtual-host routing, DNS resolution, browser requests, or error pages containing the address.

review.rationale: 原地址列表用于 Host 派生服务器侧请求，应归入 SSRF。

prerequisites.zh: 在测试域用唯一 cache key 与受控 Host canary，记录边缘原始字节/规范化 authority 和源站 Host。
prerequisites.en: Use a unique cache key and controlled Host canary on a test domain, recording edge raw bytes, normalized authority, and origin Host.

prerequisites.zh: 逐个 null、CRLF、tab、space 编码由客户端 A 预热，客户端 B 用规范 Host 读取，采集 HIT/MISS 与生成 ID。
prerequisites.en: Prime null, CRLF, tab, and space encodings one at a time with client A and read with canonical Host from client B, collecting HIT or MISS and generation IDs.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求边缘用于 key 的 Host 与源站解析的 authority 不同，使受控 Host 派生 canary 缓存在规范 key 下并向第二客户端返回。非法请求被拒绝、控制字符保留文本、首客户端响应变化、第二次回源、默认错误缓存、代理统一规范化或源站不消费 Host 都是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the edge Host used for the key to differ from origin authority parsing, caching the controlled Host-derived canary under the canonical key and returning it to the second client. Rejected invalid requests, literal controls, first-client-only changes, second origin fetch, cached default errors, consistent proxy normalization, or an origin not consuming Host is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 第二客户端首次看到 Host canary 后停止，不尝试 CRLF Header 注入或真实外部域。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the second client first sees the Host canary; do not attempt CRLF header injection or real external domains.

opsecTips.zh: Purge key，删除 canary 和原始捕获，清除客户端/代理缓存，并恢复严格 authority 解析和统一 key。
opsecTips.en: Purge keys, delete canaries and raw captures, clear client and proxy caches, and restore strict authority parsing and one canonical key.

name.zh: Host 控制字符缓存规范化差异

description.zh: 使用空字节、换行、制表符和空格变体检查边缘缓存与源站对 Host 的清洗和键构造是否一致。
description.en: Uses null, newline, tab, and space variants to test consistent Host sanitization and cache-key construction between edge and origin.

overview.zh: 原集合围绕 evil.com 添加控制字符编码，目标是比较缓存键使用的 Host 与源站实际解析的 authority。本条按共享缓存与源站差异审查；应使用唯一缓存键、短期测试内容和两个隔离客户端，分别记录源站生成与共享缓存命中。
overview.en: The original set adds encoded controls around evil.com to compare the Host used for cache keys with the authority parsed by the origin. This entry is reviewed as a shared-cache and origin differential; Use unique cache keys, short-lived test content, and two isolated clients while recording origin generation and shared-cache hits separately.

vulnerability.zh: 若边缘截断而源站解码，或双方清洗顺序不同，跨主机响应可能落入同一缓存键。确认标准是确认边缘与源站规范化结果不同且导致跨 Host 共享响应；所有层统一 400、客户端拒绝发送、仅日志转义或无缓存命中不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If the edge truncates while the origin decodes, or sanitization order differs, cross-host responses may enter one cache key. Confirmation requires Confirm differing edge and origin normalization that causes a response to be shared across Host values; Uniform 400 responses, client refusal to send, log escaping only, or no cache hit is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 记录合法 Host、随机 Host 与规范恶意测试 Host 的边缘键和源站 authority；2. 逐项发送原始控制字符变体到隔离域名，并用第二客户端检查合法 Host 的缓存内容；3. 确认边缘与源站规范化结果不同且导致跨 Host 共享响应。所有层统一 400、客户端拒绝发送、仅日志转义或无缓存命中应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record edge keys and origin authorities for the legitimate Host, a random Host, and a canonical malicious test Host. 2. Send original control-character variants one at a time to an isolated domain and inspect legitimate-Host cache content from a second client. 3. Confirm differing edge and origin normalization that causes a response to be shared across Host values. Treat Uniform 400 responses, client refusal to send, log escaping only, or no cache hit as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 在最外层严格验证 Host 字节与允许列表；2. 边缘与源站共享同一 authority 规范化规则；3. 缓存键使用经验证的规范 Host，并拒绝控制字符。
mitigation.en: 1. Strictly validate Host bytes and allowlist at the outermost layer. 2. Use the same authority normalization rules at edge and origin. 3. Build cache keys from validated canonical Host and reject controls.

title.zh: 建立Host 键值规范化基线
title.en: Establish the Host Cache-Key Normalization baseline

description.zh: 记录合法 Host、随机 Host 与规范恶意测试 Host 的边缘键和源站 authority，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Record edge keys and origin authorities for the legitimate Host, a random Host, and a canonical malicious test Host, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行Host 键值规范化变体
title.en: Execute the Host Cache-Key Normalization variants

description.zh: 逐项发送原始控制字符变体到隔离域名，并用第二客户端检查合法 Host 的缓存内容，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Send original control-character variants one at a time to an isolated domain and inspect legitimate-Host cache content from a second client, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

attackChain.payload:
evil.com%00
evil.com%0d%0a
evil.com\t
evil.com\n
evil.com%09
evil.com%20

title.zh: 核验Host 控制字符缓存规范化差异证据
title.en: Verify evidence for Host Control-Character Cache Normalization Differential

description.zh: 确认边缘与源站规范化结果不同且导致跨 Host 共享响应；同时排除所有层统一 400、客户端拒绝发送、仅日志转义或无缓存命中。
description.en: Confirm differing edge and origin normalization that causes a response to be shared across Host values; also exclude Uniform 400 responses, client refusal to send, log escaping only, or no cache hit.

review.rationale: 原值用于 Host 规范化差异导致的缓存投毒。

prerequisites.zh: 使用自有 HTTPS 接收域和真实浏览器，记录服务端 URL parser 的 scheme/host/userinfo/fragment 与最终导航。
prerequisites.en: Use an owned HTTPS recipient and real browser, recording server URL parser scheme, host, userinfo, fragment, and final navigation.

prerequisites.zh: 固定重定向 sink 和允许目标，逐个测试 `@`、`#` 及编码 hash 的方向变体，并保留明确合法/非法 URL 对照。
