prerequisites.en: Fix redirect sink and allowed target, test direction variants of @, #, and encoded hash individually, and retain clearly valid and invalid URL controls.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求服务端校验认为 URL 属于可信 host，而浏览器最终 authority 为受控外域并请求唯一 canary 路径。字符串含 target.com、服务端返回 3xx、浏览器停在错误页、fragment 不发送给服务器、外域无请求、用户主动输入外域或校验已识别 userinfo 均是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires server validation to classify the URL as a trusted host while the browser's final authority is the controlled external domain and requests the unique canary path. target.com text, an HTTP 3xx, browser error page, fragments not sent to servers, no external request, user-entered external navigation, or validation correctly identifying userinfo is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 浏览器首次到达受控外域 canary 后停止，不携带 token、Cookie 或构造多跳重定向。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the browser first reaches the controlled external canary; do not carry tokens or cookies or build multihop redirects.

opsecTips.zh: 删除接收日志/DNS 和重定向 fixture，清除浏览器数据，并恢复结构化 URL 解析与精确 host 白名单。
opsecTips.en: Delete recipient logs, DNS, and redirect fixtures, clear browser data, and restore structured URL parsing and exact host allowlisting.

name.zh: URL userinfo/fragment 解析混淆
name.en: URL Userinfo and Fragment Parsing Confusion

description.zh: 使用 @、fragment 和编码井号组合检查安全校验与最终客户端对 URL 主机的识别是否一致。
description.en: Uses userinfo markers, fragments, and encoded hashes to test whether validation and final clients identify the same URL host.

subCategory.zh: 绝对 URL authority 判定

overview.zh: 原集合交叉排列 target.com 与 evil.com，目标是识别校验器按前缀判断而浏览器按 authority 选择主机的差异。本条按URL 解析与最终导航边界审查；应使用自有 HTTPS 接收域和真实浏览器逐项测试，并同时记录服务端解析结果与最终 authority。
overview.en: The original set crosses target.com and evil.com to reveal prefix-based validation versus browser authority selection. This entry is reviewed as a URL parsing and final-navigation boundary; Use an owned HTTPS receiver and a real browser one item at a time while recording both server parsing and final authority.

vulnerability.zh: 若重定向或回调允许列表只做子串和前缀检查，攻击者可构造看似可信但最终导航到外部主机的 URL。确认标准是确认服务端允许该值且浏览器最终 authority 为未允许的测试域；服务端拒绝、浏览器保持可信主机、仅页面文本显示外部域或 DNS 失败不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If redirect or callback allowlists use substring or prefix checks, an attacker may craft a trusted-looking URL that navigates to an external host. Confirmation requires Confirm that the server accepts the value and the browser's final authority is the unallowed test domain; Server rejection, browser retaining the trusted host, external text only, or DNS failure is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 记录合法目标 URL、明确外部 URL 和无效 URL 的结构化解析结果与最终导航；2. 逐项提交原始 userinfo/fragment 变体，但把外部域替换为自有测试接收端；3. 确认服务端允许该值且浏览器最终 authority 为未允许的测试域。服务端拒绝、浏览器保持可信主机、仅页面文本显示外部域或 DNS 失败应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record structured parse results and final navigation for a legitimate URL, an explicit external URL, and an invalid URL. 2. Submit original userinfo and fragment variants one at a time while replacing the external domain with an owned test receiver. 3. Confirm that the server accepts the value and the browser's final authority is the unallowed test domain. Treat Server rejection, browser retaining the trusted host, external text only, or DNS failure as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 使用标准 URL 解析器并精确比较规范 scheme、host 和 port；2. 拒绝 userinfo、反斜杠和歧义编码的外部跳转目标；3. 优先使用服务端映射的相对路径或目标标识。
mitigation.en: 1. Use a standard URL parser and exactly compare canonical scheme, host, and port. 2. Reject userinfo, backslashes, and ambiguous encodings in external redirect targets. 3. Prefer server-mapped relative paths or destination identifiers.

title.zh: 建立绝对 URL authority 判定基线
title.en: Establish the Absolute-URL Authority Resolution baseline

description.zh: 记录合法目标 URL、明确外部 URL 和无效 URL 的结构化解析结果与最终导航，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Record structured parse results and final navigation for a legitimate URL, an explicit external URL, and an invalid URL, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行绝对 URL authority 判定变体
title.en: Execute the Absolute-URL Authority Resolution variants

description.zh: 逐项提交原始 userinfo/fragment 变体，但把外部域替换为自有测试接收端，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Submit original userinfo and fragment variants one at a time while replacing the external domain with an owned test receiver, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

attackChain.payload:
target.com@evil.com
evil.com@target.com
target.com#@evil.com
evil.com#@target.com
target.com%23@evil.com
evil.com%23@target.com

title.zh: 核验URL userinfo/fragment 解析混淆证据
title.en: Verify evidence for URL Userinfo and Fragment Parsing Confusion

description.zh: 确认服务端允许该值且浏览器最终 authority 为未允许的测试域；同时排除服务端拒绝、浏览器保持可信主机、仅页面文本显示外部域或 DNS 失败。
description.en: Confirm that the server accepts the value and the browser's final authority is the unallowed test domain; also exclude Server rejection, browser retaining the trusted host, external text only, or DNS failure.

review.rationale: 原集合是 URL authority 解析与开放重定向绕过载荷。

prerequisites.zh: 在测试 WebDAV/API 路由定义扩展方法的启用状态、handler、授权与锁/集合副作用，使用可销毁对象。
prerequisites.en: Define enabled state, handler, authorization, and lock or collection side effects for extended methods on a test WebDAV or API route using disposable objects.

prerequisites.zh: 固定 URI、无权限主体和条件 Header，逐个发送 PROPFIND/MOVE/COPY 等并记录代理与应用有效方法。
prerequisites.en: Fix URI, unauthorized principal, and conditional headers, sending PROPFIND, MOVE, COPY, and others individually while recording proxy and application-effective methods.

analysis.zh: 阳性是未授权主体通过某扩展方法读取 canary 属性或对测试对象产生可回滚 MOVE/COPY/LOCK 等作用，服务端 handler 审计确认缺失授权。207 Multi-Status、Allow Header、方法启用、405/501、空集合、公开元数据、前置条件失败或客户端显示成功但对象未变都不是越权。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is an unauthorized principal reading canary properties or causing a reversible MOVE, COPY, LOCK, or similar effect on a test object through an extended method, with handler auditing confirming missing authorization. HTTP 207 Multi-Status, an Allow header, enabled methods, HTTP 405 or 501, empty collections, public metadata, failed preconditions, or client-reported success without object change is not bypass.

opsecTips.zh: 一个扩展方法首次读取或改变 canary 后停止，不锁定、移动或覆盖真实资源。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one extended method first reads or changes the canary; do not lock, move, or overwrite real resources.

opsecTips.zh: 解锁并回滚对象，删除测试集合/会话和方法 trace，并恢复禁用未用方法及逐 handler 授权。
opsecTips.en: Unlock and roll back objects, delete test collections, sessions, and method traces, and restore disabled unused methods and per-handler authorization.

name.zh: WebDAV 与冷门 HTTP 方法授权
name.en: WebDAV and Uncommon HTTP Method Authorization

description.zh: 使用 WebDAV、订阅和产品特定方法检查路由是否默认接收未授权动词或映射到敏感处理器。
description.en: Uses WebDAV, subscription, and product-specific methods to test whether routes accept unauthorized verbs or map them to sensitive handlers.

overview.zh: 原始请求行覆盖 PROPFIND、MOVE、COPY、LOCK 和多个扩展方法，适合检查服务器启用能力与方法级授权。本条按HTTP 授权与路由边界审查；应在隔离资源上逐项执行，固定身份、路径、方法和除当前变量外的所有请求条件。
overview.en: The original request lines cover PROPFIND, MOVE, COPY, LOCK, and other extension verbs for checking enabled capabilities and method authorization. This entry is reviewed as a HTTP authorization and routing boundary; Execute one item at a time against an isolated resource while fixing identity, path, method, and every request condition except the tested variable.

vulnerability.zh: 若未使用的方法被容器默认处理或映射到文件与管理操作，低权限用户可能读取元数据、写入或移动资源。确认标准是确认后端执行了对应扩展语义并产生资源读取、创建、移动或锁定状态；通用 200 登录页、自动 OPTIONS、501/405 变化或方法名回显不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If unused verbs are handled by the container or mapped to file and administrative operations, low-privilege users may read metadata, write, or move resources. Confirmation requires Confirm that the backend executes the extended semantics and produces resource read, creation, move, or lock state; Generic 200 login pages, automatic OPTIONS, 501 or 405 differences, or method-name reflection is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 记录标准 GET 与明确禁用方法在测试资源上的 Allow、状态和后端处理器；2. 逐项发送原始扩展方法请求行，只针对可撤销测试资源并限制正文；3. 确认后端执行了对应扩展语义并产生资源读取、创建、移动或锁定状态。通用 200 登录页、自动 OPTIONS、501/405 变化或方法名回显应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record Allow, status, and backend handler for standard GET and a clearly disabled method on a test resource. 2. Send original extended-method request lines one at a time only against reversible test resources with limited bodies. 3. Confirm that the backend executes the extended semantics and produces resource read, creation, move, or lock state. Treat Generic 200 login pages, automatic OPTIONS, 501 or 405 differences, or method-name reflection as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 在入口和应用明确允许必要动词并默认拒绝扩展方法；2. 关闭未使用 WebDAV、订阅和产品特定模块；3. 对每个有效方法执行资源级授权和审计。
mitigation.en: 1. Allow only required verbs at edge and application and deny extension methods by default. 2. Disable unused WebDAV, subscription, and product-specific modules. 3. Enforce resource-level authorization and auditing for every effective method.

title.zh: 建立扩展方法访问控制基线
title.en: Establish the Extended-Method Access Control baseline

description.zh: 记录标准 GET 与明确禁用方法在测试资源上的 Allow、状态和后端处理器，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Record Allow, status, and backend handler for standard GET and a clearly disabled method on a test resource, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行扩展方法访问控制变体
title.en: Execute the Extended-Method Access Control variants

description.zh: 逐项发送原始扩展方法请求行，只针对可撤销测试资源并限制正文，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Send original extended-method request lines one at a time only against reversible test resources with limited bodies, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

attackChain.payload:
PROPFIND /admin HTTP/1.1
PROPPATCH /admin HTTP/1.1
MKCOL /admin HTTP/1.1
COPY /admin HTTP/1.1
MOVE /admin HTTP/1.1
LOCK /admin HTTP/1.1
UNLOCK /admin HTTP/1.1
CHECKOUT /admin HTTP/1.1
CHECKIN /admin HTTP/1.1
UNCHECKOUT /admin HTTP/1.1
REPORT /admin HTTP/1.1
MERGE /admin HTTP/1.1
MKACTIVITY /admin HTTP/1.1
MKWORKSPACE /admin HTTP/1.1
VERSION-CONTROL /admin HTTP/1.1
BASELINE-CONTROL /admin HTTP/1.1
SEARCH /admin HTTP/1.1
NOTIFY /admin HTTP/1.1
SUBSCRIBE /admin HTTP/1.1
UNSUBSCRIBE /admin HTTP/1.1
POLL /admin HTTP/1.1
JBOSS /admin HTTP/1.1
INDEX /admin HTTP/1.1

title.zh: 核验WebDAV 与冷门 HTTP 方法授权证据
title.en: Verify evidence for WebDAV and Uncommon HTTP Method Authorization

description.zh: 确认后端执行了对应扩展语义并产生资源读取、创建、移动或锁定状态；同时排除通用 200 登录页、自动 OPTIONS、501/405 变化或方法名回显。
description.en: Confirm that the backend executes the extended semantics and produces resource read, creation, move, or lock state; also exclude Generic 200 login pages, automatic OPTIONS, 501 or 405 differences, or method-name reflection.

review.rationale: 原命令是扩展 HTTP 方法授权测试载荷。

prerequisites.zh: 确认框架是否支持 `_method`、允许的外层 POST Content-Type 和转换顺序，为 canary 对象建立方法/CSRF 矩阵。
prerequisites.en: Confirm framework support for _method, accepted outer POST Content-Type, and conversion order, defining a method and CSRF matrix for a canary object.

prerequisites.zh: 固定 POST 路径、认证和 body，只改变一个 `_method` 值，记录边缘方法、框架有效方法、handler 与授权。
prerequisites.en: Fix POST path, authentication, and body while changing one _method value, recording edge method, framework-effective method, handler, and authorization.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求边缘按 POST 放行而框架转换为受限方法，并在缺少该方法授权/CSRF 时改变 canary，跨层日志可证明。`_method` 被解析、返回 405、非法值回落 POST、路由存在、前端按钮隐藏被绕过但后端拒绝、或响应文本写 DELETE 而对象不变均是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the edge to allow POST while the framework converts it to a restricted method and changes the canary without that method's authorization or CSRF check, proven across tier logs. Parsed _method, HTTP 405, invalid fallback to POST, route existence, bypassed client controls followed by backend denial, or DELETE text without object change is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 可回滚 canary 首次被 `_method` 改变后停止，不对真实删除或 WebDAV handler 测试。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the reversible canary is first changed through _method; do not test real deletion or WebDAV handlers.

opsecTips.zh: 回滚对象，删除测试请求/会话和框架 trace，并恢复方法转换前安全校验或禁用覆盖。
opsecTips.en: Roll back the object, delete test requests, sessions, and framework traces, and restore security checks after conversion or disable overrides.

name.zh: _method 表单方法覆盖绕过

description.zh: 检查框架是否把 _method 参数转换为受限动词，而前置授权与 CSRF 仍按外层 POST 处理。
description.en: Tests whether a framework turns the _method parameter into a restricted verb while edge authorization and CSRF still process the outer POST.

overview.zh: 原集合针对常见 _method 约定并覆盖写入、跟踪和 WebDAV 动词，核心是转换发生在安全检查之前还是之后。本条按HTTP 授权与路由边界审查；应在隔离资源上逐项执行，固定身份、路径、方法和除当前变量外的所有请求条件。
overview.en: The original set targets the common _method convention with write, trace, and WebDAV verbs, focusing on whether conversion occurs before or after security checks. This entry is reviewed as a HTTP authorization and routing boundary; Execute one item at a time against an isolated resource while fixing identity, path, method, and every request condition except the tested variable.

vulnerability.zh: 若网关忽略 _method 而应用在路由后采用它，攻击者可能绕过方法白名单或 CSRF 保护执行写操作。确认标准是从路由日志与资源版本确认框架采用了伪方法并执行受限操作；参数被忽略、仅响应显示方法名、统一 405 或事务回滚不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If the gateway ignores _method while the application applies it during routing, an attacker may bypass method allowlists or CSRF protections and perform writes. Confirmation requires Confirm from routing logs and resource version that the framework adopted the pseudo-method and executed a restricted operation; Ignored parameters, method names displayed only in responses, uniform 405 responses, or rolled-back transactions is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 以低权限账号记录正常 POST 与直接 DELETE/PUT 对同一测试资源的拒绝结果；2. 逐项提交原始 _method 值，保持外层 POST、身份、CSRF 令牌和资源一致；3. 从路由日志与资源版本确认框架采用了伪方法并执行受限操作。参数被忽略、仅响应显示方法名、统一 405 或事务回滚应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record denied outcomes for normal POST and direct DELETE or PUT on the same test resource as a low-privilege user. 2. Submit original _method values one at a time while holding outer POST, identity, CSRF token, and resource constant. 3. Confirm from routing logs and resource version that the framework adopted the pseudo-method and executed a restricted operation. Treat Ignored parameters, method names displayed only in responses, uniform 405 responses, or rolled-back transactions as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 若无兼容需求则完全禁用参数式方法覆盖；2. 在转换为最终方法后执行授权与 CSRF 校验；3. 限制允许覆盖的安全方法并拒绝重复方法参数。
mitigation.en: 1. Disable parameter-based method override unless compatibility requires it. 2. Perform authorization and CSRF validation after resolving the final method. 3. Restrict permitted overrides and reject duplicate method parameters.

title.zh: 建立框架伪方法参数基线
title.en: Establish the Framework Pseudo-Method Parameter baseline

description.zh: 以低权限账号记录正常 POST 与直接 DELETE/PUT 对同一测试资源的拒绝结果，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Record denied outcomes for normal POST and direct DELETE or PUT on the same test resource as a low-privilege user, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行框架伪方法参数变体
title.en: Execute the Framework Pseudo-Method Parameter variants

description.zh: 逐项提交原始 _method 值，保持外层 POST、身份、CSRF 令牌和资源一致，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Submit original _method values one at a time while holding outer POST, identity, CSRF token, and resource constant, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

attackChain.payload:
_method=PUT
_method=DELETE
_method=PATCH
_method=OPTIONS
_method=TRACE
_method=CONNECT
_method=PROPFIND
_method=MOVE
_method=COPY
_method=HEAD
_method=INVALID

title.zh: 核验_method 表单方法覆盖绕过证据
title.en: Verify evidence for _method Form Method-Override Bypass

description.zh: 从路由日志与资源版本确认框架采用了伪方法并执行受限操作；同时排除参数被忽略、仅响应显示方法名、统一 405 或事务回滚。
description.en: Confirm from routing logs and resource version that the framework adopted the pseudo-method and executed a restricted operation; also exclude Ignored parameters, method names displayed only in responses, uniform 405 responses, or rolled-back transactions.

review.rationale: 原集合是 _method 方法覆盖负向输入。

prerequisites.zh: 从应用代码确认自定义 `method` 参数是否被消费及转换位置，不假设与标准 `_method` 行为相同。
prerequisites.en: Confirm from application code whether the custom method parameter is consumed and where conversion occurs, without assuming standard _method behavior.

prerequisites.zh: 在合成对象上固定外层 POST、认证、body 和 CSRF，只改变 `method` 值并记录业务分支/handler。
prerequisites.en: Fix outer POST, authentication, body, and CSRF on a synthetic object, changing only method value and recording business branch or handler.

analysis.zh: 阳性是应用确实把自定义参数转换为受限操作，并绕过边缘/服务端授权改变 canary，日志显示该参数是 handler 选择依据。参数被当普通字段、响应回显、非法方法报错、路由代码含同名变量、授权仍拒绝、对象未变或 `_method` 另有漏洞都不是本条阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is the application actually converting the custom parameter into a restricted operation and bypassing edge or server authorization to change the canary, with logs showing it selected the handler. An ordinary field, reflection, invalid-method errors, a same-named code variable, continued authorization denial, unchanged object, or a separate _method flaw is not positive evidence for this entry.

opsecTips.zh: 自定义参数首次改变 canary 后停止，不扩展到命令式 method 值或真实资源。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the custom parameter first changes the canary; do not expand into command-like method values or real resources.

opsecTips.zh: 回滚并删除合成对象，清除业务 trace/缓存和测试会话，并恢复显式操作白名单与授权。
opsecTips.en: Roll back and delete synthetic objects, clear business traces, caches, and test sessions, and restore explicit operation allowlisting and authorization.

name.zh: method 参数动词覆盖

description.zh: 验证自定义 method 参数是否被业务框架转换为 HTTP 动词并绕过边缘方法控制。
description.en: Tests whether a custom method parameter is converted into an HTTP verb by business logic and bypasses edge method controls.

overview.zh: 该集合与 _method 条目分开，针对无下划线的自定义约定，必须确认应用是否真实消费该参数。本条按HTTP 授权与路由边界审查；应在隔离资源上逐项执行，固定身份、路径、方法和除当前变量外的所有请求条件。
overview.en: This set is separate from _method and targets a custom unprefixed convention, requiring proof that the application consumes it. This entry is reviewed as a HTTP authorization and routing boundary; Execute one item at a time against an isolated resource while fixing identity, path, method, and every request condition except the tested variable.

vulnerability.zh: 如果应用根据 method 参数分派写操作而安全层只检查真实请求方法，可能产生方法级授权缺口。确认标准是确认参数触发了与真实受限动词等价的服务端动作并绕过基线拒绝；参数只是普通业务字段、被忽略、回显或映射到无害查询不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If the application dispatches write actions from the method parameter while security checks only the actual request method, method-level authorization gaps may result. Confirmation requires Confirm that the parameter triggers a server action equivalent to the restricted verb and bypasses the baseline denial; The parameter being an ordinary business field, ignored, reflected, or mapped to a harmless query is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 记录无 method 参数的外层 POST 与直接目标方法在测试端点的授权结果；2. 逐项提交原始 method 值并记录路由、控制器动作和最终资源状态；3. 确认参数触发了与真实受限动词等价的服务端动作并绕过基线拒绝。参数只是普通业务字段、被忽略、回显或映射到无害查询应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record authorization outcomes for an outer POST without the parameter and for the direct target method on a test endpoint. 2. Submit original method values one at a time and record routing, controller action, and final resource state. 3. Confirm that the parameter triggers a server action equivalent to the restricted verb and bypasses the baseline denial. Treat The parameter being an ordinary business field, ignored, reflected, or mapped to a harmless query as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 避免用普通参数模拟 HTTP 方法；2. 在控制器动作内部执行与真实方法相同的授权；3. 为 method 与 _method 约定分别建立负向测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Avoid simulating HTTP methods through ordinary parameters. 2. Apply the same authorization inside controller actions as for real methods. 3. Add separate negative tests for method and _method conventions.

title.zh: 建立自定义方法参数基线
title.en: Establish the Custom Method Parameter baseline

description.zh: 记录无 method 参数的外层 POST 与直接目标方法在测试端点的授权结果，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Record authorization outcomes for an outer POST without the parameter and for the direct target method on a test endpoint, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行自定义方法参数变体
title.en: Execute the Custom Method Parameter variants

description.zh: 逐项提交原始 method 值并记录路由、控制器动作和最终资源状态，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Submit original method values one at a time and record routing, controller action, and final resource state, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

attackChain.payload:
method=PUT
method=DELETE
method=PATCH
method=OPTIONS
method=TRACE
method=CONNECT
method=PROPFIND
method=MOVE
method=COPY

title.zh: 核验method 参数动词覆盖证据
title.en: Verify evidence for method Parameter Verb Override

description.zh: 确认参数触发了与真实受限动词等价的服务端动作并绕过基线拒绝；同时排除参数只是普通业务字段、被忽略、回显或映射到无害查询。
description.en: Confirm that the parameter triggers a server action equivalent to the restricted verb and bypasses the baseline denial; also exclude The parameter being an ordinary business field, ignored, reflected, or mapped to a harmless query.

review.rationale: 原集合测试自定义 method 参数，应保留为 API 授权载荷。

prerequisites.zh: 在隔离代理链固定 TCP 目标、TLS SNI、Host、无权限主体和 `/admin` canary，确认是否接受 absolute-form。
prerequisites.en: In an isolated proxy chain, fix TCP target, TLS SNI, Host, unauthorized principal, and /admin canary, confirming whether absolute-form is accepted.

prerequisites.zh: 逐个改变 request-target authority，记录代理选取 authority、转发 Host/路径和后端 vhost/授权 handler。
prerequisites.en: Change request-target authority one at a time, recording proxy-selected authority, forwarded Host and path, and backend virtual host or authorization handler.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求代理按 absolute-form authority 路由到内部/环回后端，而授权仍依据另一 Host/路径并返回内部 canary，跨层日志可关联。代理拒绝 absolute-form、400/421、直接外部代理功能按设计、DNS 解析、默认站点、SNI 已选择目标或无权限仍被拒绝都不是绕过。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the proxy to route by absolute-form authority to an internal or loopback backend while authorization relies on another Host or path and returns the internal canary, correlated across tiers. Rejected absolute-form, HTTP 400 or 421, intentional forward-proxy behavior, DNS resolution, default site, SNI already selecting the target, or continued authorization denial is not bypass.

opsecTips.zh: 一个内部 canary 首次由 absolute-form 路由返回后停止，不代理到真实外域或内网服务。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one internal canary is first returned through absolute-form routing; do not proxy to real external or internal services.

opsecTips.zh: 删除 vhost/canary fixture，关闭代理连接并清理 trace/缓存，恢复 authority 一致性和非代理入口拒绝。
opsecTips.en: Delete virtual-host and canary fixtures, close proxy connections, clear traces and caches, and restore authority consistency and rejection at nonproxy ingress.

name.zh: 绝对形式 Request-Target 路由绕过

description.zh: 使用绝对 URI 请求行检查代理是否按请求目标中的 authority 路由，而应用授权仍依据 Host 或路径。
description.en: Uses absolute-URI request lines to test whether proxies route by request-target authority while application authorization relies on Host or path.

overview.zh: 原集合把外部、环回和内部主机写入 absolute-form 请求目标，针对代理与源站的 authority 优先级。本条按HTTP 授权与路由边界审查；应在隔离资源上逐项执行，固定身份、路径、方法和除当前变量外的所有请求条件。
overview.en: The original set places external, loopback, and internal hosts in absolute-form request targets to test authority precedence between proxy and origin. This entry is reviewed as a HTTP authorization and routing boundary; Execute one item at a time against an isolated resource while fixing identity, path, method, and every request condition except the tested variable.

vulnerability.zh: 若代理采用绝对 URI 主机而安全规则采用 Host，攻击者可能让请求转发到非预期内部上游或绕过虚拟主机控制。确认标准是确认代理实际连接到请求目标 authority 指定的测试上游且绕过预期路由策略；统一 400、代理规范化到 Host、仅日志显示 URI 或浏览器不支持发送不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If a proxy uses the absolute-URI host while security rules use Host, an attacker may route to an unintended internal upstream or bypass virtual-host controls. Confirmation requires Confirm that the proxy connects to the test upstream named by request-target authority and bypasses expected routing policy; Uniform 400 responses, proxy normalization to Host, URI shown only in logs, or browser inability to send is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 记录 origin-form 请求与合法 absolute-form 请求在代理和后端的目标主机与路由；2. 逐项发送原始 absolute-form 请求行，在隔离代理环境固定 Host、SNI 和客户端身份；3. 确认代理实际连接到请求目标 authority 指定的测试上游且绕过预期路由策略。统一 400、代理规范化到 Host、仅日志显示 URI 或浏览器不支持发送应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record proxy and backend target host and route for origin-form and legitimate absolute-form requests. 2. Send original absolute-form request lines one at a time in an isolated proxy environment while fixing Host, SNI, and client identity. 3. Confirm that the proxy connects to the test upstream named by request-target authority and bypasses expected routing policy. Treat Uniform 400 responses, proxy normalization to Host, URI shown only in logs, or browser inability to send as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 对非代理入口拒绝 absolute-form 请求目标；2. 统一校验 request-target authority、Host 和 TLS SNI；3. 上游路由使用固定映射并阻断客户端选择私网目标。
mitigation.en: 1. Reject absolute-form request targets on nonproxy ingress. 2. Validate request-target authority, Host, and TLS SNI consistently. 3. Use fixed upstream mappings and prevent clients from selecting private targets.

title.zh: 建立代理 absolute-form 解析基线
title.en: Establish the Proxy Absolute-Form Parsing baseline

description.zh: 记录 origin-form 请求与合法 absolute-form 请求在代理和后端的目标主机与路由，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Record proxy and backend target host and route for origin-form and legitimate absolute-form requests, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行代理 absolute-form 解析变体
title.en: Execute the Proxy Absolute-Form Parsing variants

description.zh: 逐项发送原始 absolute-form 请求行，在隔离代理环境固定 Host、SNI 和客户端身份，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Send original absolute-form request lines one at a time in an isolated proxy environment while fixing Host, SNI, and client identity, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

attackChain.payload:
GET http://evil.com/admin HTTP/1.1
GET http://127.0.0.1/admin HTTP/1.1
GET http://localhost/admin HTTP/1.1
GET http://internal/admin HTTP/1.1

title.zh: 核验绝对形式 Request-Target 路由绕过证据
title.en: Verify evidence for Absolute-Form Request-Target Routing Bypass

description.zh: 确认代理实际连接到请求目标 authority 指定的测试上游且绕过预期路由策略；同时排除统一 400、代理规范化到 Host、仅日志显示 URI 或浏览器不支持发送。
description.en: Confirm that the proxy connects to the test upstream named by request-target authority and bypasses expected routing policy; also exclude Uniform 400 responses, proxy normalization to Host, URI shown only in logs, or browser inability to send.

review.rationale: 原请求行测试 absolute-form authority 解析与路由边界。

prerequisites.zh: 在可销毁目录树中放置随机 marker 文件，固定应用字符集、Unicode normalization、URL 解码和文件系统 realpath。
prerequisites.en: Place a random marker file in a disposable directory tree, pinning application charset, Unicode normalization, URL decoding, and filesystem realpath behavior.

prerequisites.zh: 逐个 lookalike 点序列配对 ASCII `../`、普通文件名和不存在路径，记录每层 code point 与最终规范路径。
prerequisites.en: Pair each lookalike-dot sequence with ASCII ../, a normal filename, and a nonexistent path, recording code points and final canonical path at every layer.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求过滤层允许 Unicode 点变体，后续兼容规范化把它还原为父目录跳转，并读取沙箱外随机 marker，realpath 日志证明边界越过。字符串被显示、文件不存在/403、ASCII 版本同样允许、浏览器字体看似双点、路径只在日志变化或访问仍位于根目录内都是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the filter to allow a Unicode-dot variant, later compatibility normalization to restore parent traversal, and the random marker outside the sandbox root to be read, with realpath logs proving the boundary crossing. Displayed text, missing file or HTTP 403, equally allowed ASCII traversal, font-level visual similarity, log-only path changes, or access remaining inside the root is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 随机 marker 首次被读取后停止，不请求 `/etc`、`/proc`、日志、配置或真实 flag 路径。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the random marker is first read; do not request /etc, /proc, logs, configuration, or real flag paths.

opsecTips.zh: 删除目录树和 marker，清除路径 trace/缓存，并恢复规范化后 realpath 边界校验与允许目录。
opsecTips.en: Delete the directory tree and marker, clear path traces and caches, and restore post-normalization realpath boundary checks and allowed directories.

name.zh: Unicode 点字符路径穿越

description.zh: 使用 Unicode 相似点字符构造父目录序列，检查过滤器与文件系统规范化是否产生路径穿越。
description.en: Uses Unicode lookalike dot characters to construct parent-directory sequences and test filtering versus filesystem normalization.

subCategory.zh: 路径规范化与文件访问

overview.zh: 原始集合把双点替换为相似字符并指向系统、日志和配置文件，风险依赖 Unicode 映射与路径解码顺序。本条按路径规范化与文件访问边界审查；应只读取一次性目录中的随机标记文件，记录每一层解码、规范化和真实路径解析结果。
overview.en: The original set replaces double dots with lookalike characters and targets system, log, and configuration files, with risk depending on Unicode mapping and path-decoding order. This entry is reviewed as a path normalization and file-access boundary; Read only random marker files in a disposable directory and record decoding, normalization, and real-path resolution at every layer.

vulnerability.zh: 若安全层未识别相似点而后端库规范化为 ../，攻击者可能逃离允许目录读取服务器文件。确认标准是确认规范化后的实际文件路径越过根目录并返回随机标记内容；文件名文本回显、统一错误、路由重写或测试文件位于公开目录不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If the security layer misses lookalike dots while a backend library normalizes them to ../, an attacker may escape the allowed directory and read server files. Confirmation requires Confirm that the normalized filesystem path escapes the root and returns the random marker content; Filename reflection, generic errors, route rewriting, or the test file residing in a public directory is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 在一次性目录创建随机测试文件，记录合法文件、普通 ../ 和不存在路径的响应；2. 逐项使用原始 Unicode 路径结构但只指向该随机测试文件，避免读取真实系统文件；3. 确认规范化后的实际文件路径越过根目录并返回随机标记内容。文件名文本回显、统一错误、路由重写或测试文件位于公开目录应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Create a random test file in a disposable directory and record responses for a valid file, ordinary ../, and a nonexistent path. 2. Use original Unicode path structures one at a time but target only the random test file, avoiding real system files. 3. Confirm that the normalized filesystem path escapes the root and returns the random marker content. Treat Filename reflection, generic errors, route rewriting, or the test file residing in a public directory as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 先执行明确 Unicode 规范化再解析路径；2. 解析后验证真实路径仍位于允许根目录内；3. 使用文件 ID 映射并拒绝路径分隔符和点段。
mitigation.en: 1. Apply explicit Unicode normalization before path parsing. 2. Verify after resolution that the real path remains under the allowed root. 3. Use file-ID mappings and reject separators and dot segments.

title.zh: 建立路径规范化与文件访问基线
title.en: Establish the Path Normalization and File Access baseline

description.zh: 在一次性目录创建随机测试文件，记录合法文件、普通 ../ 和不存在路径的响应，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Create a random test file in a disposable directory and record responses for a valid file, ordinary ../, and a nonexistent path, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行路径规范化与文件访问变体
title.en: Execute the Path Normalization and File Access variants

description.zh: 逐项使用原始 Unicode 路径结构但只指向该随机测试文件，避免读取真实系统文件，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Use original Unicode path structures one at a time but target only the random test file, avoiding real system files, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

title.zh: 核验Unicode 点字符路径穿越证据
title.en: Verify evidence for Unicode Dot-Character Path Traversal

description.zh: 确认规范化后的实际文件路径越过根目录并返回随机标记内容；同时排除文件名文本回显、统一错误、路由重写或测试文件位于公开目录。
description.en: Confirm that the normalized filesystem path escapes the root and returns the random marker content; also exclude Filename reflection, generic errors, route rewriting, or the test file residing in a public directory.

review.rationale: 原集合是 Unicode 规范化路径穿越，应归入文件漏洞。

prerequisites.zh: 使用隔离数据库和合成 marker 行，固定输入编码、框架 normalization、驱动字符集与 SQL 审计。
prerequisites.en: Use an isolated database and synthetic marker row, pinning input encoding, framework normalization, driver charset, and SQL auditing.

prerequisites.zh: 为全宽引号/运算符构造结构相同的恒真、恒假和规范 ASCII 配对，参数位置与其他请求条件不变。
prerequisites.en: Build structurally matched true, false, and canonical ASCII pairs for full-width quotes and operators, keeping parameter position and all other request conditions fixed.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求入口校验接受全宽变体，后续层将其转换为 SQL 元字符并让恒真/恒假结果稳定分离或返回 marker，数据库审计显示查询结构改变。数据库把全宽字符当普通数据、语法错误、输入回显、应用只规范化显示、WAF 放行但参数化仍安全或一次响应差异都属于假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires entry validation to accept a full-width variant, a later tier to convert it into SQL metacharacters, and matched true and false results to separate or return the marker, with database auditing showing query-structure change. Treating full-width characters as data, syntax errors, reflection, display-only normalization, WAF acceptance with safe parameterization, or one response difference is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 一个 Unicode 变体首次产生 marker 真/假差异后停止，不继续 UNION、目录枚举或数据读取。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one Unicode variant first produces the marker true or false differential; do not continue to UNION, catalog enumeration, or data reads.

opsecTips.zh: 回滚 marker 数据，删除请求/SQL trace，清除 normalization 缓存并恢复参数化与规范化后校验。
opsecTips.en: Roll back marker data, delete request and SQL traces, clear normalization caches, and restore parameterization and post-normalization validation.

name.zh: 全角引号 SQL 注入规范化

description.zh: 使用全角引号和运算符检查输入层是否放行，而数据库驱动或预处理阶段将其转换为 SQL 元字符。
description.en: Uses full-width quotes and operators to test whether input validation permits them while a later driver or preprocessing stage converts them into SQL metacharacters.

overview.zh: 原集合覆盖布尔、注释和 UNION 结构的全角引号版本，关键是各层是否发生兼容映射而非字符外观。本条按Unicode 规范化与 SQL 语法边界审查；应在参数化的测试查询和隔离数据上逐项验证，并同时记录应用字符转换与数据库审计结果。
overview.en: The original set covers full-width quote variants of boolean, comment, and UNION structures, focusing on compatibility mapping across layers rather than appearance. This entry is reviewed as a Unicode normalization and SQL syntax boundary; Validate one item at a time using parameterized test queries and isolated data while recording application character conversion and database audit results.

vulnerability.zh: 若过滤器在规范化前检查而后续层映射为 ASCII 引号，拼接 SQL 的应用可能出现注入。确认标准是通过数据库审计与结果差异确认字符被规范化后改变了 SQL 语法结构；应用错误、字符被当作普通数据、WAF 命中或仅响应编码变化不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If a filter checks before normalization while a later layer maps characters to ASCII quotes, applications that concatenate SQL may become injectable. Confirmation requires Confirm through database audit and result differences that character normalization changes SQL syntax structure; Application errors, characters treated as ordinary data, WAF matches, or response-encoding changes only is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 使用参数化测试查询记录普通文本、ASCII 引号和全角引号的数据库参数值与结果；2. 逐项提交原始 Unicode SQL 结构到授权测试字段，保持账号和查询条件一致；3. 通过数据库审计与结果差异确认字符被规范化后改变了 SQL 语法结构。应用错误、字符被当作普通数据、WAF 命中或仅响应编码变化应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record database parameter values and outcomes for plain text, ASCII quotes, and full-width quotes in a parameterized test query. 2. Submit original Unicode SQL structures one at a time to an authorized test field while holding account and query conditions constant. 3. Confirm through database audit and result differences that character normalization changes SQL syntax structure. Treat Application errors, characters treated as ordinary data, WAF matches, or response-encoding changes only as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 所有查询使用参数化语句，禁止拼接输入；2. 在统一 Unicode 规范化后执行类型和长度验证；3. 对兼容字符映射和数据库字符集建立回归测试。
mitigation.en: 1. Use parameterized statements for every query and never concatenate input. 2. Perform type and length validation after one Unicode normalization policy. 3. Add regression tests for compatibility mappings and database character sets.

title.zh: 建立Unicode SQL 元字符基线
title.en: Establish the Unicode SQL Metacharacters baseline

description.zh: 使用参数化测试查询记录普通文本、ASCII 引号和全角引号的数据库参数值与结果，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Record database parameter values and outcomes for plain text, ASCII quotes, and full-width quotes in a parameterized test query, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行Unicode SQL 元字符变体
title.en: Execute the Unicode SQL Metacharacters variants

description.zh: 逐项提交原始 Unicode SQL 结构到授权测试字段，保持账号和查询条件一致，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Submit original Unicode SQL structures one at a time to an authorized test field while holding account and query conditions constant, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

＂ UNION SELECT NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL--

＂ UNION SELECT NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL--

title.zh: 核验全角引号 SQL 注入规范化证据
title.en: Verify evidence for Full-Width Quote SQL Injection Normalization

description.zh: 通过数据库审计与结果差异确认字符被规范化后改变了 SQL 语法结构；同时排除应用错误、字符被当作普通数据、WAF 命中或仅响应编码变化。
description.en: Confirm through database audit and result differences that character normalization changes SQL syntax structure; also exclude Application errors, characters treated as ordinary data, WAF matches, or response-encoding changes only.

review.rationale: 原命令是 Unicode 规范化 SQLi 载荷，应归入 SQL 注入。

prerequisites.zh: 固定应用和浏览器的 Unicode normalization、HTML parser、输出上下文与 CSP，记录最终 DOM code point。
prerequisites.en: Pin application and browser Unicode normalization, HTML parser, output context, and CSP, recording final DOM code points.

prerequisites.zh: 将 alert/外部资源替换为随机 DOM canary，配对全宽标签、ASCII 标签和纯文本安全输出。
prerequisites.en: Replace alert and external resources with a random DOM canary, pairing full-width tags, ASCII tags, and safe plaintext output.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求过滤层保留全宽分隔符，后续规范化将其转换为真实 `< >`，浏览器构建元素并执行事件/脚本设置 canary。全宽字符只显示为文本、DOM 为 text node、ASCII 也被安全编码、CSP 拦截、事件不触发、浏览器不做兼容转换或 canary 由测试器预设均是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the filter to retain full-width delimiters, later normalization to convert them into real angle brackets, and the browser to build an element and execute an event or script that sets the canary. Full-width text display, a DOM text node, safely encoded ASCII, CSP blocking, an untriggered event, no browser compatibility conversion, or a harness-set canary is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 一个全宽标签首次执行 DOM canary 后停止，不读取 Cookie、加载外部资源或持久化输入。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one full-width tag first executes the DOM canary; do not read cookies, load external resources, or persist input.

opsecTips.zh: 删除页面 fixture 与浏览器 profile，清除 DOM/缓存 trace，并恢复统一规范化、上下文编码和 CSP。
opsecTips.en: Delete page fixtures and browser profiles, clear DOM and cache traces, and restore consistent normalization, contextual encoding, and CSP.

name.zh: 全角标签 XSS 规范化

description.zh: 使用全角尖括号构造标签，检查后续规范化是否把过滤后文本恢复为可执行 HTML。
description.en: Uses full-width angle brackets to construct tags and tests whether later normalization restores filtered text to executable HTML.

overview.zh: 原集合覆盖 script、媒体、表单和事件元素的全角标签版本，风险取决于是否发生兼容规范化。本条按浏览器解析与脚本执行边界审查；应把所有外部地址和敏感动作替换为自有无害标记，在真实浏览器记录最终 DOM、CSP 与调用栈。
overview.en: The original set covers full-width forms of script, media, form, and event elements, with risk depending on compatibility normalization. This entry is reviewed as a browser parsing and script-execution boundary; Replace external destinations and sensitive actions with owned harmless markers and record final DOM, CSP, and stack traces in a real browser.

vulnerability.zh: 若净化器在 NFKC 等转换前运行而后续层把全角分隔符转换为 ASCII，危险标签可能在过滤后重现。确认标准是确认某个后续阶段转换出真实标签，并由浏览器执行页面源中的标记代码；全角字符保持文本、浏览器不解析、输出编码或扩展脚本触发不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If sanitization runs before a compatibility transform such as NFKC and a later layer converts delimiters to ASCII, dangerous tags may reappear after filtering. Confirmation requires Confirm that a later stage creates real tags and the browser executes marker code in the page origin; Full-width characters remaining text, browser nonparsing, output encoding, or extension-triggered script is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 记录全角普通文本和标准安全标签经过存储、模板、DOM 的每阶段字节与字符；2. 逐项提交原始全角标签，但将脚本动作替换为随机 DOM 标记并在隔离浏览器观察；3. 确认某个后续阶段转换出真实标签，并由浏览器执行页面源中的标记代码。全角字符保持文本、浏览器不解析、输出编码或扩展脚本触发应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record bytes and characters at storage, template, and DOM stages for full-width plain text and a standard safe tag. 2. Submit original full-width tags one at a time while replacing script actions with a random DOM marker in an isolated browser. 3. Confirm that a later stage creates real tags and the browser executes marker code in the page origin. Treat Full-width characters remaining text, browser nonparsing, output encoding, or extension-triggered script as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 在规范化后执行上下文输出编码和 HTML 净化；2. 定义单一 Unicode 规范并避免过滤后再次转换；3. 部署 CSP 与 Trusted Types 并测试全角和兼容字符。
mitigation.en: 1. Perform context-aware output encoding and HTML sanitization after normalization. 2. Define one Unicode normalization policy and avoid transformations after filtering. 3. Deploy CSP and Trusted Types and test full-width and compatibility characters.

title.zh: 建立Unicode HTML 分隔符基线
title.en: Establish the Unicode HTML Delimiters baseline

description.zh: 记录全角普通文本和标准安全标签经过存储、模板、DOM 的每阶段字节与字符，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Record bytes and characters at storage, template, and DOM stages for full-width plain text and a standard safe tag, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行Unicode HTML 分隔符变体
title.en: Execute the Unicode HTML Delimiters variants

description.zh: 逐项提交原始全角标签，但将脚本动作替换为随机 DOM 标记并在隔离浏览器观察，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Submit original full-width tags one at a time while replacing script actions with a random DOM marker in an isolated browser, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

title.zh: 核验全角标签 XSS 规范化证据
title.en: Verify evidence for Full-Width Tag XSS Normalization

description.zh: 确认某个后续阶段转换出真实标签，并由浏览器执行页面源中的标记代码；同时排除全角字符保持文本、浏览器不解析、输出编码或扩展脚本触发。
description.en: Confirm that a later stage creates real tags and the browser executes marker code in the page origin; also exclude Full-width characters remaining text, browser nonparsing, output encoding, or extension-triggered script.

review.rationale: 原集合属于 Unicode 规范化 XSS，应归入 XSS。

prerequisites.zh: 把 `xn--` 仅视为路径前缀，在可销毁目录树创建根内与根外随机 marker，并固定 URL/文件路径解析。
prerequisites.en: Treat xn-- only as a path prefix, create random markers inside and outside a disposable root, and pin URL and filesystem path parsing.

prerequisites.zh: 配对 `xn--/../../../`、普通目录名、ASCII traversal 与不存在路径，记录每层解码和最终 realpath。
prerequisites.en: Pair xn--/../../../ with a normal directory name, ASCII traversal, and nonexistent path, recording every decode and final realpath.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求应用把含 xn-- 前缀的路径错误通过校验，随后仍解析 `../` 并读取根外随机 marker，realpath 证明越界。系统将其当普通目录、文件不存在、请求被拒绝、IDNA 库参与主机解析但非路径、只返回错误页、ASCII traversal 同样被允许或未读取 marker 都是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the application to incorrectly pass a path with an xn-- prefix, still resolve ../ segments, and read the random marker outside the root, with realpath proving escape. Treating it as an ordinary directory, missing file, rejection, IDNA host parsing unrelated to path, an error page, equally allowed ASCII traversal, or no marker read is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 根外随机 marker 首次读取后停止，不请求系统文件、日志、环境或真实 flag。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the outside-root random marker is first read; do not request system files, logs, environment data, or real flags.

opsecTips.zh: 删除测试目录/marker，清除 URL 与 realpath trace，并恢复路径规范化后根目录约束。
opsecTips.en: Delete test directories and markers, clear URL and realpath traces, and restore root confinement after path normalization.

name.zh: xn-- 前缀路径穿越混淆

description.zh: 使用看似 Punycode 的 xn-- 路径前缀拼接 ../，检查 URL 主机识别与文件路径解析是否被错误混合。
description.en: Uses an xn-- looking path prefix followed by ../ sequences to test whether URL host recognition and filesystem path parsing are incorrectly mixed.

subCategory.zh: IDN 前缀误用与路径解析
subCategory.en: IDN Prefix Misuse and Path Parsing

overview.zh: 原内容并不是合法 IDN 域名集合，而是 xn--/../../../ 形式的文件路径，因此应按路径穿越验证。本条按路径规范化与文件访问边界审查；应只读取一次性目录中的随机标记文件，记录每一层解码、规范化和真实路径解析结果。
overview.en: The original content is not a valid IDN domain set; it contains xn--/../../../ file paths and must be evaluated as path traversal. This entry is reviewed as a path normalization and file-access boundary; Read only random marker files in a disposable directory and record decoding, normalization, and real-path resolution at every layer.

vulnerability.zh: 若过滤器把 xn-- 前缀误判为已处理域名并跳过点段校验，后端文件操作可能解析后续 ../。确认标准是确认前置层放行而后端解析后的真实路径逃离允许根目录；xn-- 被当作普通目录、文件不存在、统一错误或没有文件系统接收点不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If a filter mistakes the xn-- prefix for a handled domain and skips dot-segment validation, backend file operations may resolve the following ../. Confirmation requires Confirm that the edge permits the value while the backend-resolved real path escapes the allowed root; xn-- treated as a normal directory, missing files, generic errors, or no filesystem sink is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 在一次性文件根中创建随机标记并记录合法相对路径与普通 ../ 的处理；2. 逐项提交原始 xn-- 路径结构但只指向随机标记，记录 URL 与文件解析的中间结果；3. 确认前置层放行而后端解析后的真实路径逃离允许根目录。xn-- 被当作普通目录、文件不存在、统一错误或没有文件系统接收点应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Create a random marker under a disposable file root and record handling of a valid relative path and ordinary ../. 2. Submit original xn-- path structures one at a time targeting only the random marker and record intermediate URL and filesystem parsing. 3. Confirm that the edge permits the value while the backend-resolved real path escapes the allowed root. Treat xn-- treated as a normal directory, missing files, generic errors, or no filesystem sink as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 明确区分 URL authority 与路径数据，不以字符串前缀推断类型；2. 对路径完成解码和规范化后验证真实根目录；3. 拒绝点段、分隔符和不符合 schema 的 xn-- 使用。
mitigation.en: 1. Separate URL authority from path data and never infer type from string prefixes. 2. Validate the real root after all path decoding and normalization. 3. Reject dot segments, separators, and xn-- usage that violates the input schema.

title.zh: 建立IDN 前缀误用与路径解析基线
title.en: Establish the IDN Prefix Misuse and Path Parsing baseline

description.zh: 在一次性文件根中创建随机标记并记录合法相对路径与普通 ../ 的处理，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Create a random marker under a disposable file root and record handling of a valid relative path and ordinary ../, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行IDN 前缀误用与路径解析变体
title.en: Execute the IDN Prefix Misuse and Path Parsing variants

description.zh: 逐项提交原始 xn-- 路径结构但只指向随机标记，记录 URL 与文件解析的中间结果，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Submit original xn-- path structures one at a time targeting only the random marker and record intermediate URL and filesystem parsing, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

attackChain.payload:
xn--/../../../etc/passwd
xn--/../../../flag
xn--/../../../flag.txt
xn--/../../../proc/self/environ
xn--/../../../proc/self/cmdline
xn--/../../../proc/version
xn--/../../../proc/cpuinfo
xn--/../../../proc/meminfo
xn--/../../../proc/net/tcp
xn--/../../../var/log/apache2/access.log
xn--/../../../var/log/apache2/error.log
xn--/../../../var/log/nginx/access.log
xn--/../../../var/log/nginx/error.log
xn--/../../../var/log/httpd/access_log
xn--/../../../var/log/httpd/error_log
xn--/../../../var/log/auth.log
xn--/../../../var/log/syslog
xn--/../../../var/log/messages
xn--/../../../var/log/secure
xn--/../../../var/www/html/index.php
xn--/../../../var/www/html/config.php
xn--/../../../var/www/html/.htaccess
xn--/../../../var/www/html/wp-config.php
xn--/../../../var/www/html/configuration.php
xn--/../../../var/www/html/sites/default/settings.php
xn--/../../../root/.bash_history
xn--/../../../root/.ssh/id_rsa
xn--/../../../root/.ssh/authorized_keys
xn--/../../../home/*/.bash_history
xn--/../../../home/*/.ssh/id_rsa
xn--/../../../tmp/sess_*

title.zh: 核验xn-- 前缀路径穿越混淆证据
title.en: Verify evidence for xn-- Prefix Path-Traversal Confusion

description.zh: 确认前置层放行而后端解析后的真实路径逃离允许根目录；同时排除xn-- 被当作普通目录、文件不存在、统一错误或没有文件系统接收点。
description.en: Confirm that the edge permits the value while the backend-resolved real path escapes the allowed root; also exclude xn-- treated as a normal directory, missing files, generic errors, or no filesystem sink.

review.rationale: 原命令实际是带 xn-- 前缀的路径穿越，不应误归 IDN。

prerequisites.zh: 使用自有 HTTPS 接收域和真实目标浏览器，固定重定向 sink、允许路径与服务端 URL parser。
prerequisites.en: Use an owned HTTPS recipient and target browser, fixing redirect sink, allowed path, and server URL parser.

prerequisites.zh: 逐个测试斜杠/反斜杠数量和尾部形式，记录服务端规范 URL、Location 原始值和浏览器最终 authority。
prerequisites.en: Test slash and backslash counts and suffix forms individually, recording the server-canonical URL, raw Location, and browser-final authority.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求服务端把混合分隔符值判为相对/可信路径，而 WHATWG 浏览器最终导航到受控 evil.com canary，接收日志可确认。值出现在 Location、返回 3xx、浏览器将反斜杠保持为路径、外域无请求、用户手工导航、服务器已拒绝或仅非目标浏览器存在理论差异均是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the server to classify a mixed-separator value as relative or trusted while a WHATWG browser finally navigates to the controlled evil.com canary, confirmed by recipient logs. A value in Location, HTTP 3xx, browser retaining backslashes as path, no external request, manual user navigation, server rejection, or theoretical difference only in a nontarget browser is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 浏览器首次到达受控 canary 后停止，不附加凭据、token 或多跳重定向。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the browser first reaches the controlled canary; do not append credentials, tokens, or multihop redirects.

opsecTips.zh: 删除接收日志、DNS 和重定向 fixture，清除浏览器历史/缓存，并恢复结构化 URL 解析和目标白名单。
opsecTips.en: Delete recipient logs, DNS, and redirect fixtures, clear browser history and caches, and restore structured URL parsing and destination allowlisting.

name.zh: 反斜杠 URL 解析开放重定向

description.zh: 使用 /\evil.com 等混合分隔符检查服务端 URL 校验与浏览器导航对 authority 的识别是否不同。
description.en: Uses mixed separators such as /\evil.com to test whether server URL validation and browser navigation identify different authorities.

subCategory.zh: 斜杠/反斜杠 authority 混淆

overview.zh: 原集合改变反斜杠数量与尾分隔符，针对 WHATWG 风格浏览器和 RFC 解析器之间的差异。本条按URL 解析与最终导航边界审查；应使用自有 HTTPS 接收域和真实浏览器逐项测试，并同时记录服务端解析结果与最终 authority。
overview.en: The original set varies backslash count and trailing separators to target differences between WHATWG-style browser and RFC parsers. This entry is reviewed as a URL parsing and final-navigation boundary; Use an owned HTTPS receiver and a real browser one item at a time while recording both server parsing and final authority.

vulnerability.zh: 若服务端把反斜杠视为普通路径而浏览器按斜杠处理，允许的相对 URL 可能导航到外部主机。确认标准是确认服务端允许该值且真实浏览器最终导航到未允许测试域；浏览器停留原站、值被编码、网络库拒绝或仅服务端日志显示外域不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If the server treats backslashes as path characters while a browser treats them as slashes, an allowed relative URL may navigate to an external host. Confirmation requires Confirm that the server accepts the value and a real browser ultimately navigates to the unallowed test domain; Browser remaining on origin, encoded values, network-library rejection, or external domain shown only in server logs is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 记录普通相对路径、协议相对外部 URL 和单反斜杠值的结构化解析与浏览器目标；2. 逐项提交原始混合分隔符变体，并把 evil.com 替换为自有测试接收域；3. 确认服务端允许该值且真实浏览器最终导航到未允许测试域。浏览器停留原站、值被编码、网络库拒绝或仅服务端日志显示外域应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record structured parsing and browser destinations for a normal relative path, protocol-relative external URL, and a single-backslash value. 2. Submit original mixed-separator variants one at a time and replace evil.com with an owned test receiver. 3. Confirm that the server accepts the value and a real browser ultimately navigates to the unallowed test domain. Treat Browser remaining on origin, encoded values, network-library rejection, or external domain shown only in server logs as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 使用与最终客户端一致的标准 URL 解析并拒绝反斜杠；2. 仅允许服务端映射的相对路径或精确外部 origin；3. 在浏览器端到端测试协议相对、userinfo 和混合分隔符。
mitigation.en: 1. Use a standard URL parser aligned with the final client and reject backslashes. 2. Allow only server-mapped relative paths or exact external origins. 3. End-to-end test protocol-relative, userinfo, and mixed-separator cases in browsers.

title.zh: 建立斜杠/反斜杠 authority 混淆基线
title.en: Establish the Slash and Backslash Authority Confusion baseline

description.zh: 记录普通相对路径、协议相对外部 URL 和单反斜杠值的结构化解析与浏览器目标，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Record structured parsing and browser destinations for a normal relative path, protocol-relative external URL, and a single-backslash value, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行斜杠/反斜杠 authority 混淆变体
title.en: Execute the Slash and Backslash Authority Confusion variants

description.zh: 逐项提交原始混合分隔符变体，并把 evil.com 替换为自有测试接收域，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Submit original mixed-separator variants one at a time and replace evil.com with an owned test receiver, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

attackChain.payload:
/\\evil.com
/\\\\evil.com
/\\\\\\evil.com
/\\\\\\\\evil.com
/\\evil.com/
/\\evil.com//

title.zh: 核验反斜杠 URL 解析开放重定向证据
title.en: Verify evidence for Backslash URL Parsing Open Redirect

description.zh: 确认服务端允许该值且真实浏览器最终导航到未允许测试域；同时排除浏览器停留原站、值被编码、网络库拒绝或仅服务端日志显示外域。
description.en: Confirm that the server accepts the value and a real browser ultimately navigates to the unallowed test domain; also exclude Browser remaining on origin, encoded values, network-library rejection, or external domain shown only in server logs.

review.rationale: 原集合是反斜杠 URL 解析差异的开放重定向载荷。

prerequisites.zh: 离线解析每个样本的 A-label、U-label、注册域、脚本组成和 Unicode confusable，不访问样本域。
prerequisites.en: Parse each sample's A-label, U-label, registrable domain, script composition, and Unicode confusables offline without visiting sample domains.

prerequisites.zh: 用明确标注的真实品牌、同脚本安全域和混合脚本 fixture 校准 URL UI、allowlist 或告警规则。
prerequisites.en: Calibrate URL UI, allowlist, or warning rules with labeled real-brand, safe same-script, and mixed-script fixtures.

analysis.zh: 阳性工具结果是样本解码后包含与基准品牌混淆的 code point，且目标 UI/规则未显著展示真实注册域或未告警；应用漏洞还需存在具体信任决策。域名带 `xn--`、视觉相似的截图、域名可注册、DNS 存在、工具给出风险分或字符串来自公开样例都不是凭据盗取或 HTTP 绕过证据。
analysis.en: Positive tool evidence is a decoded sample containing code points confusable with the reference brand while the target UI or rule fails to prominently show the true registrable domain or warn; an application flaw additionally requires a concrete trust decision. An xn-- label, similar screenshot, registrability, DNS existence, a tool risk score, or a public sample string is not credential theft or HTTP bypass evidence.

opsecTips.zh: 一个 UI/规则漏报 fixture 被确认后停止，不注册、访问或投递这些样本域。
opsecTips.en: Stop after confirming one missed UI or rule fixture; do not register, visit, or distribute the sample domains.

opsecTips.zh: 删除离线渲染、解码缓存与测试截图，清理浏览器/威胁情报索引，并保留聚合规则结果。
opsecTips.en: Delete offline renderings, decode caches, and test screenshots, clear browser and threat-intelligence indexes, and retain aggregated rule results.

name.zh: IDN 同形异义域名识别

description.zh: 使用品牌相似 Punycode 域名检查界面、允许列表和安全告警是否能区分 Unicode 同形字符。
description.en: Uses brand-like Punycode domains to test whether interfaces, allowlists, and security warnings distinguish Unicode confusable characters.

overview.zh: 原名称损坏而内容是可解析的 xn-- 域名候选，风险属于钓鱼与域名校验而非 HTTP 授权绕过。本条按IDNA 与视觉同形边界审查；应离线比较 A-label、U-label、注册域和脚本组成，不把示例域名当作真实恶意基础设施。
overview.en: The original name is corrupted while the content contains parseable xn-- domain candidates, making this a phishing and domain-validation concern rather than HTTP authorization bypass. This entry is reviewed as a IDNA and visual-confusable boundary; Compare A-label, U-label, registrable domain, and script composition offline without treating sample domains as live malicious infrastructure.

vulnerability.zh: 若界面只显示 Unicode 形式或允许列表按视觉相似判断，用户和系统可能把攻击者域误认为可信品牌。确认标准是确认系统把不同注册域错误标记为可信或向用户隐藏关键脚本差异；浏览器显示 Punycode、注册域不同即被拒绝或仅视觉上相似不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: If interfaces display only Unicode form or allowlists rely on visual similarity, users and systems may mistake an attacker domain for a trusted brand. Confirmation requires Confirm that the system labels a different registrable domain as trusted or hides critical script differences from users; Browser displaying Punycode, rejection due to a different registrable domain, or visual similarity alone is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 记录真实品牌域、随机 IDN 和原始候选的 ASCII/Punycode 与 Unicode 双重显示；2. 逐项把原始域名输入链接预览、邮件告警和允许列表测试环境，不访问真实第三方站点；3. 确认系统把不同注册域错误标记为可信或向用户隐藏关键脚本差异。浏览器显示 Punycode、注册域不同即被拒绝或仅视觉上相似应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record both ASCII Punycode and Unicode display for the real brand, a random IDN, and original candidates. 2. Feed original domains one at a time into link previews, mail warnings, and allowlist test environments without visiting third-party sites. 3. Confirm that the system labels a different registrable domain as trusted or hides critical script differences from users. Treat Browser displaying Punycode, rejection due to a different registrable domain, or visual similarity alone as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 安全界面同时显示规范 ASCII 域名和注册域；2. 允许列表比较规范化 A-label 的精确 origin 而非品牌文本；3. 应用 Unicode 脚本混用与 confusable 检测并训练用户。
mitigation.en: 1. Display canonical ASCII domain and registrable domain in security-sensitive interfaces. 2. Allowlist exact origins using canonical A-labels rather than brand text. 3. Apply mixed-script and confusable detection and train users.

title.zh: 建立Punycode 品牌仿冒基线
title.en: Establish the Punycode Brand Impersonation baseline

description.zh: 记录真实品牌域、随机 IDN 和原始候选的 ASCII/Punycode 与 Unicode 双重显示，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Record both ASCII Punycode and Unicode display for the real brand, a random IDN, and original candidates, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行Punycode 品牌仿冒变体
title.en: Execute the Punycode Brand Impersonation variants

description.zh: 逐项把原始域名输入链接预览、邮件告警和允许列表测试环境，不访问真实第三方站点，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Feed original domains one at a time into link previews, mail warnings, and allowlist test environments without visiting third-party sites, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

attackChain.payload:
xn--pple-43d.com
xn--googl-7ve.com
xn--mazon-2ve.com
xn--fcebook-0ve.com
xn--twittr-5ve.com
xn--linkdin-7ve.com
xn--ggle-55daa.com
xn--pypal-4ve.com
xn--microsft-5ve.com
xn--netfli-4ve.com
xn--ubr-0ve.com
xn--irbnb-9ve.com
xn--spotify-5ve.com

title.zh: 核验IDN 同形异义域名识别证据
title.en: Verify evidence for IDN Homograph Domain Identification

description.zh: 确认系统把不同注册域错误标记为可信或向用户隐藏关键脚本差异；同时排除浏览器显示 Punycode、注册域不同即被拒绝或仅视觉上相似。
description.en: Confirm that the system labels a different registrable domain as trusted or hides critical script differences from users; also exclude Browser displaying Punycode, rejection due to a different registrable domain, or visual similarity alone.

review.rationale: 该条仅列出 Punycode 域名样本，没有请求入口或可验证的应用漏洞条件，应归入域名威胁情报工具参考。

prerequisites.zh: 将每行作为离线 A-label/U-label 映射 fixture，固定 IDNA/Unicode 版本并校验括号说明而非信任文本。
prerequisites.en: Treat each line as an offline A-label and U-label mapping fixture, pinning IDNA and Unicode versions and validating rather than trusting parenthetical descriptions.

prerequisites.zh: 准备有效映射、无效 Punycode、纯 ASCII 和多脚本对照，测试解析器、显示层与 allowlist 的一致性。
prerequisites.en: Prepare valid mappings, invalid Punycode, pure ASCII, and mixed-script controls to test parser, display layer, and allowlist consistency.

analysis.zh: 阳性工具结果是映射被标准 IDNA 正确往返，且测试系统对真实注册域/混淆脚本作出预期标注；若发现解析器与 allowlist 使用不同规范结果才形成安全缺陷。目录中的括号翻译、字符串相似、解码失败、浏览器显示 Punycode、DNS 不存在或没有任何信任决策都不是漏洞。
analysis.en: Positive tool evidence is a mapping round-tripping under standard IDNA and the test system labeling the true registrable domain and confusable script as expected; a security flaw requires parser and allowlist to use different canonical results. Parenthetical translations, similar strings, decode failure, browser Punycode display, absent DNS, or no trust decision is not a vulnerability.

opsecTips.zh: 首个映射或规范化不一致被确认后停止，不把样本转换为网络请求或注册域。
opsecTips.en: Stop after confirming the first mapping or canonicalization inconsistency; do not turn samples into network requests or registered domains.

opsecTips.zh: 删除映射输出、缓存和 UI fixture，清理工具索引并恢复统一 IDNA 库和注册域比较。
opsecTips.en: Delete mapping outputs, caches, and UI fixtures, clear tool indexes, and restore one IDNA library and registrable-domain comparison.

name.zh: Punycode/Unicode 域名对照表
name.en: Punycode and Unicode Domain Mapping Catalog

description.zh: 提供 xn-- A-label 与 Unicode 显示形式的对照，适合域名分析工具和告警界面测试，不是网络攻击载荷。
description.en: Provides mappings between xn-- A-labels and Unicode display forms for domain-analysis tools and warning-interface tests, not network attack payloads.

overview.zh: 原集合每行同时包含 Punycode 与括号中的 Unicode 解释，明显是参考字典而非可直接请求的 URL 列表。本条按工具目录与配置审查边界审查；原命令应导入已指定的现有工具作为字典、规则或分析标签，不应脱离上下文直接向业务端点发送。
overview.en: Each original line pairs Punycode with a parenthesized Unicode interpretation, making it a reference catalog rather than directly requestable URLs. This entry is reviewed as a tool-catalog and configuration-review boundary; Import the original command into the specified existing tools as a wordlist, rule, or analysis label rather than sending it directly to business endpoints.

vulnerability.zh: 工具若错误解码、隐藏脚本差异或只显示视觉名称，可能降低钓鱼检测质量，但目录文本本身没有漏洞。确认标准是确认工具输出与标准 IDNA 转换一致，并能突出注册域与混用脚本；示例域不可注册、仅视觉相似或括号说明与实际 DNS 无关不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: A tool that decodes incorrectly, hides script differences, or shows only visual names may weaken phishing detection, but the catalog text itself is not a vulnerability. Confirmation requires Confirm that tool output matches standard IDNA conversion and highlights registrable domains and mixed scripts; Example domains being unregistrable, visual similarity alone, or parenthesized notes unrelated to DNS is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 用已知安全 IDN 和纯 ASCII 域测试工具的 A-label/U-label 双向转换；2. 将原始对照表导入域名分析工具，逐行验证解码、脚本分类和 confusable 标记；3. 确认工具输出与标准 IDNA 转换一致，并能突出注册域与混用脚本。示例域不可注册、仅视觉相似或括号说明与实际 DNS 无关应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Test bidirectional A-label and U-label conversion with a known safe IDN and a pure ASCII domain. 2. Import the original mapping catalog into a domain-analysis tool and verify decoding, script classification, and confusable flags row by row. 3. Confirm that tool output matches standard IDNA conversion and highlights registrable domains and mixed scripts. Treat Example domains being unregistrable, visual similarity alone, or parenthesized notes unrelated to DNS as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 使用标准 IDNA 库执行 A-label/U-label 转换；2. 在告警中保留 ASCII 域名、注册域和 Unicode 脚本信息；3. 维护有来源的测试夹具并标注示例而非真实恶意域。
mitigation.en: 1. Use a standards-compliant IDNA library for A-label and U-label conversion. 2. Retain ASCII domain, registrable domain, and Unicode script information in alerts. 3. Maintain sourced test fixtures and label examples rather than treating them as live malicious domains.

title.zh: 建立IDN 规范化参考基线
title.en: Establish the IDN Normalization Reference baseline

description.zh: 用已知安全 IDN 和纯 ASCII 域测试工具的 A-label/U-label 双向转换，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Test bidirectional A-label and U-label conversion with a known safe IDN and a pure ASCII domain, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行IDN 规范化参考变体
title.en: Execute the IDN Normalization Reference variants

description.zh: 将原始对照表导入域名分析工具，逐行验证解码、脚本分类和 confusable 标记，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Import the original mapping catalog into a domain-analysis tool and verify decoding, script classification, and confusable flags row by row, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

xn--pple-43d.com (punycode for аpple.com)
xn--googl-7ve.com (punycode for googlе.com)
xn--mazon-2ve.com (punycode for аmazon.com)
xn--fcebook-0ve.com (punycode for fаcebook.com)
xn--twittr-5ve.com (punycode for twittеr.com)
xn--ggle-55daa.com (punycode for gооgle.com)
xn--pypal-4ve.com (punycode for pаypal.com)
xn--microsft-5ve.com (punycode for microsоft.com)
xn--netfli-4ve.com (punycode for netfliх.com)

title.zh: 核验Punycode/Unicode 域名对照表证据
title.en: Verify evidence for Punycode and Unicode Domain Mapping Catalog

description.zh: 确认工具输出与标准 IDNA 转换一致，并能突出注册域与混用脚本；同时排除示例域不可注册、仅视觉相似或括号说明与实际 DNS 无关。
description.en: Confirm that tool output matches standard IDNA conversion and highlights registrable domains and mixed scripts; also exclude Example domains being unregistrable, visual similarity alone, or parenthesized notes unrelated to DNS.

review.rationale: 原内容是 Punycode 与 Unicode 对照字典，应并入域名分析工具。

prerequisites.zh: 离线拆分每个候选的 subdomain 与 registrable domain，并使用标注 fixture 测试品牌监测规则，不解析真实 DNS。
prerequisites.en: Split each candidate into subdomain and registrable domain offline and test brand-monitoring rules with labeled fixtures without resolving live DNS.

prerequisites.zh: 配对相同服务前缀下的真实品牌域、同形注册域和随机安全域，固定 IDNA/PSL 版本与告警阈值。
prerequisites.en: Pair real-brand, homograph registrable, and random safe domains under the same service prefixes, pinning IDNA, Public Suffix List version, and alert threshold.

analysis.zh: 阳性工具结果是规则识别真正同形的注册域，而不会因 account/secure 等可信子域词忽略它，并在正常品牌域上保持低误报。前缀看似官方、字符串命中字典、DNS/证书存在、浏览器显示 Unicode、域未注册或工具只按子域关键词报警都不是钓鱼活动或应用绕过证明。
analysis.en: Positive tool evidence is the rule recognizing the genuinely homographic registrable domain without being distracted by trusted-looking subdomains such as account or secure, while maintaining low false positives on the real brand. Official-looking prefixes, wordlist matches, DNS or certificate existence, Unicode display, an unregistered domain, or subdomain-keyword-only alerts is not proof of phishing activity or application bypass.

opsecTips.zh: 一个子域/注册域解析漏报被确认后停止，不访问、注册或投递候选域。
opsecTips.en: Stop after confirming one subdomain or registrable-domain parsing miss; do not visit, register, or distribute candidate domains.

opsecTips.zh: 删除候选输出、PSL/IDNA 缓存和测试告警，清理监测索引并保留脱敏规则指标。
opsecTips.en: Delete candidate outputs, PSL and IDNA caches, and test alerts, clear monitoring indexes, and retain redacted rule metrics.

name.zh: IDN 同形域子域候选字典

description.zh: 整理 account、secure、mail、support 等子域与同形域组合，用于离线品牌监控规则测试。
description.en: Catalogs account, secure, mail, support, and similar subdomains combined with a homograph domain for offline brand-monitoring rule tests.

overview.zh: 原集合只是一个同形注册域前附常见服务子域，适合测试解析注册域与子域权重的工具逻辑。本条按工具目录与配置审查边界审查；原命令应导入已指定的现有工具作为字典、规则或分析标签，不应脱离上下文直接向业务端点发送。
overview.en: The original set prefixes common service labels to one homograph registrable domain and suits testing how tools separate registrable domains from subdomains. This entry is reviewed as a tool-catalog and configuration-review boundary; Import the original command into the specified existing tools as a wordlist, rule, or analysis label rather than sending it directly to business endpoints.

vulnerability.zh: 检测系统若只匹配首个标签或把 secure、account 等词视为可信，可能漏报仿冒链接。确认标准是确认规则始终以注册域为信任边界并对同形脚本发出明确告警；子域词本身敏感、域名仅格式相似或示例被误标为真实活动不能作为漏洞证据。
vulnerability.en: Detection systems that match only the first label or treat words such as secure and account as trusted may miss impersonation links. Confirmation requires Confirm that rules consistently use the registrable domain as the trust boundary and alert on confusable scripts; Sensitive-looking subdomain words, format similarity alone, or examples mislabeled as active campaigns is not vulnerability evidence.

exploitation.zh: 1. 用真实品牌域、品牌的合法子域和随机外部注册域记录监控规则结果；2. 把原始子域候选导入离线 URL 与邮件检测测试，不对这些域发起 DNS 或 HTTP 请求；3. 确认规则始终以注册域为信任边界并对同形脚本发出明确告警。子域词本身敏感、域名仅格式相似或示例被误标为真实活动应记录为误报。
exploitation.en: 1. Record monitoring-rule outcomes for the real brand domain, a legitimate brand subdomain, and a random external registrable domain. 2. Import original subdomain candidates into offline URL and mail-detection tests without making DNS or HTTP requests. 3. Confirm that rules consistently use the registrable domain as the trust boundary and alert on confusable scripts. Treat Sensitive-looking subdomain words, format similarity alone, or examples mislabeled as active campaigns as false positives.

mitigation.zh: 1. 安全判断使用公共后缀后的注册域而非左侧子域文本；2. 结合 IDNA、脚本混用和品牌 confusable 规则；3. 将示例字典与实时威胁情报分开管理。
mitigation.en: 1. Base trust decisions on the registrable domain after the public suffix, not left-hand labels. 2. Combine IDNA, mixed-script, and brand-confusable rules. 3. Manage example wordlists separately from live threat intelligence.

title.zh: 建立仿冒子域组合基线
title.en: Establish the Impersonation Subdomain Combinations baseline

description.zh: 用真实品牌域、品牌的合法子域和随机外部注册域记录监控规则结果，并保存原始请求、响应与服务端关联标识。
description.en: Record monitoring-rule outcomes for the real brand domain, a legitimate brand subdomain, and a random external registrable domain, retaining raw requests, responses, and server correlation identifiers.

title.zh: 执行仿冒子域组合变体
title.en: Execute the Impersonation Subdomain Combinations variants

description.zh: 把原始子域候选导入离线 URL 与邮件检测测试，不对这些域发起 DNS 或 HTTP 请求，严格保持其他变量不变并设置停止阈值。
description.en: Import original subdomain candidates into offline URL and mail-detection tests without making DNS or HTTP requests, holding all other variables constant and defining a stop threshold.

title.zh: 核验IDN 同形域子域候选字典证据
title.en: Verify evidence for IDN Homograph Subdomain Candidate Wordlist

description.zh: 确认规则始终以注册域为信任边界并对同形脚本发出明确告警；同时排除子域词本身敏感、域名仅格式相似或示例被误标为真实活动。
description.en: Confirm that rules consistently use the registrable domain as the trust boundary and alert on confusable scripts; also exclude Sensitive-looking subdomain words, format similarity alone, or examples mislabeled as active campaigns.

review.rationale: 原集合是同形域子域字典，应迁移到 URL/威胁情报分析工具。
